Bus 277 may be caught from the Shenyang North Railway Station. Bus 175 and bus 300 may be caught from Qigong Street, just outside the Qigong Street Station on Metro Line 1 ), ☏ +86 24 25702088 . Tu-Su 09:00-16:00 . Tells the story of the industrialisation of China. The museum is built on the site of an old foundry, which has been largely preserved in its original state. Free .

title: 41.6758 123.4544 13 Liaoning Provincial Museum ( 辽宁省博物馆 )
content: 41.6758 123.4544 13 Liaoning Provincial Museum ( 辽宁省博物馆 ), 157 Zhihui San Street, Hunnan District (浑南区智慧三街157号) ( The nearest bus stop is 'Zhihui Si Street & Quanyun San Road' (智慧四街全运三路), which is served by bus routes 100, 108, 130, 198 (north circle), 198 (west circle) and v112. You may catch bus v112 from the Baitahe Road Station on Metro Line 2 ), ☏ +86 24 23205102 5100 . April to October: Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00. November to March: Tu-Su 09:30-16:30, no entry after 15:30 . A high-quality museum featuring Liaoning history from the stone age to the Qing dynasty, with many relics of China's past found in the area (3rd floor). Also houses large collections of Chinese traditional art and calligraphy, plus temporary exhibitions. There may be queues to enter during main public holidays. Free .

title: 41.905809 123.404193 14 Paleontological Museum of Liaoning ( 辽宁古生物博物馆 )
content: 41.905809 123.404193 14 Paleontological Museum of Liaoning ( 辽宁古生物博物馆 ), Shenyang Normal University, 253 Huanghe North Street, Huanggu District (皇姑区黄河北大街253号沈阳师范大学院内) ( Shenyang Normal University Station, Metro Line 2 ), ☏ +86 24 86591170 , service@pmol.org.cn . 09:30-16:00, no entry after 15:30, closed on Mondays and Thursdays . Claims to be the largest paleontological museum in China. Maintains a huge collection of fossils. Free . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: 41.6807 123.3558 16 Shenyang Railway Museum ( 沈阳铁路陈列馆 )
content: 41.6807 123.3558 16 Shenyang Railway Museum ( 沈阳铁路陈列馆 ), 8 Shandan Street, Sujiatun District (苏家屯区山丹街8号) ( the nearest bus stop with bus services to the downtown area is the Keji Pharmaceuticals (可济药业) bus stop, which is served by bus nos. 137, 165, 327, and k802. You can catch bus no. 327 from the south side of Shenyang Railway Station ), ☏ +86 24 62077705 . 09:00-16:00, closed on Mondays . Housing 15 historical locomotives and 3 duplicated historical locomotives. It is the biggest steam locomotive museum in China. ¥80 .

title: Shenyang Huangsi Temple Fair , No
content: Shenyang Huangsi Temple Fair , No. 206, Huangsi Road, Heping District . Shenyang Shisheng Temple is also known as Huangsi. Founded in 1636 (the first year of Chongde in the Qing Dynasty), it is a large-scale and early Lama temple in Shenyang. In Shenyang, as long as the temple fair is mentioned, the first reaction of most Shenyang people is Huangsi Temple Fair. To this day, Shenyang holds Huangsi Temple Fair every year. During the temple fair, there are colorful performances and a variety of delicacies. ( updated Dec 2018 )

title: BaoFaYuan 宝发园
content: BaoFaYuan 宝发园 , No.1 Tianyuan, Xiaoshizi Street, Dadong District, Shenyang 沈阳市大东区小什字街天源巷1号 ( Dong Zhong Jie Metro Line 1 A exit, across the street ), ☏ +86 24 24314173 . Famous for its 四绝 (Four Outstanding). While locals might not remember the name "BaFaYuan", everyone knows "Four Outstanding" given the name was giving by Zhang Xueliang. ¥60/person .

title: Cafe Lido ( Sheraton Shenyang Lido Hotel ), Qingnian St
content: Cafe Lido ( Sheraton Shenyang Lido Hotel ), Qingnian St . It is recognized as being the best Western food in Shenyang. Serving Australian beef, mashed potatoes Irish style, Guinness meat pies, fresh fish, salads and the tastiest pastries in town. Special on Friday's Seafood Night, small price for all you can eat and drink! ¥180-200 .

title: La Bellevue
content: La Bellevue . For bigger budget there is also a fine dining French restaurant, "La Bellevue".

title: Black Sheep ( hei yang xi can ting )
content: Black Sheep ( hei yang xi can ting ), Sanjing Jie and Shisanwei Lu ( across the street from Party 98 ). Very popular with expats. A bar and pub with frequent social events. ( updated Nov 2020 )

title: Pure Colours ( 米亚本色 mi ya ben si ), 6-328 Fengtian Street (奉天街) , ☏ +86 24-24125678
content: Pure Colours ( 米亚本色 mi ya ben si ), 6-328 Fengtian Street (奉天街) , ☏ +86 24-24125678 . The second popular club for foreigners and rich Chinese. They have an informal special for foreigners: buy one get two (for longdrinks only).

title: Sunny's Night Club
content: Sunny's Night Club . A popular spot for foreigners but staff and service are low quality.

title: Party 98 ( 98 俱乐部
content: Party 98 ( 98 俱乐部 - 98 jù lè bù ), Xita St (西塔街), in Korea town . Noisy Chinese music, close to the 24/24h barbecue restaurants.

title: Club 97 ( 97号会所 )
content: Club 97 ( 97号会所 ), No 97 Zhongshan Lu, 100 m W of Zhongshan Sq and its Mao statue (中山路97号，中山广场西100米) , ☏ +86 24 2341 9997 . A shiny, trendy club with an outdoor patio frequented by expats, mostly Russian ones. Not too crappy music, great food before 23:00, a bit pricey though.

title: Sophie's World Bar ( 苏菲的世界酒吧 ), Er Jing St, Bawei Rd (二经街 八伟路 , ☏ +86 24 2282 6691
content: Sophie's World Bar ( 苏菲的世界酒吧 ), Er Jing St, Bawei Rd (二经街 八伟路 , ☏ +86 24 2282 6691 . The oldest foreigner bar in town is like an institution for both expats and locals. Cheap alcohol, darts, soccer games on TV.

title: Eletel ( 沈阳璟星大酒店 )
content: Eletel ( 沈阳璟星大酒店 ), 235 Zhong St ( set back from the main road in a pedestrianized area ), ☏ +86 24 31307777 . The rooms are designed in an ultra modern style that some will like and others will hate. The location is on a main shopping street within walking distance of several attractions such as the Imperial Palace. ¥267 .

title: Somerset Heping Shenyang
content: Somerset Heping Shenyang , No 80 Taiyuan North Street, Heping district , ☏ +86 24 2397 5555 , enquiry.shenyang@the-ascott.com . The residence offers 270 fully-furnished serviced apartments ranging from one-bedroom deluxe to three-bedroom executive. Each apartment is equipped with broadband internet access, a private IDD telephone with voicemail facility and business support services. ( updated Sep 2017 )

title: New World Shenyang Hotel ( 沈阳新世界酒店 )
content: New World Shenyang Hotel ( 沈阳新世界酒店 ), 2 Nanjing Nan Street, Heping District , ☏ +86 24 2386 9888 , fax +86 24 2386 0018 , reservations.shenyang@newworldhotels.com .

title: 18.30345 109.154017 3 Dongtian Park ( 大小洞天 )
content: 18.30345 109.154017 3 Dongtian Park ( 大小洞天 ), Yacheng Town, Yazhou District (崖州区崖城镇) ( take bus no. 25 or 30 from the city or catch Yazhou 6 from the Yazhou Railway Station ), ☏ +86 898 88830188 , +86 898 88830029 . 08:30-17:30 . A coastal park in Sanya's far west. Famous for its rocky beach and historical calligraphy. Swimming is prohibited and climbing on the rocks is also not permitted. The area is popular with couples who come here to take wedding photos. ¥90 (peak season), ¥75 (slack season) . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.319955 109.68846 4 Paddy Field National Park ( 水稻国家公园 )
content: 18.319955 109.68846 4 Paddy Field National Park ( 水稻国家公园 ), Wanpo Road, Haitang District (海棠区湾坡路) ( bus nos. 23 and 33 ), ☏ +86 898 38895599 . 08:30-18:00, no entry after 17:30 . A park comprised of picturesque rice paddies and filled with life-sized dinosaur models. ¥75 (entry ticket only), ¥110 (entry ticket + sightseeing train) . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.258388 109.54599 5 Phoenix Hill ( 凤凰岭 Fenghuangling
content: 18.258388 109.54599 5 Phoenix Hill ( 凤凰岭 Fenghuangling, 凤凰岭海誓山盟景区 Fenghuangling Haishishanmeng Scenic Area ), 300 Longling Road, Jiyang District (吉阳区龙陵路300号) ( bus nos. 17, 22, 24 and 55 ), ☏ +86 898 88665778 . 08:00-21:00, no tickets sold after 19:30, no entry after 19:40 . The tallest land formation in the central part of Sanya. Take the cable car to the top for a panoramic view of the city, but be careful not to take pictures of the military base. ¥106 (Oct-Apr), ¥88 (May-Sept), including two-way cable car ticket . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.29423 109.34857 6 Tianya Haijiao ( 天涯海角; Tianya Haijiao
content: 18.29423 109.34857 6 Tianya Haijiao ( 天涯海角; Tianya Haijiao - Edges of the heaven, corners of the sea ) ( 30 minutes from Sanya by bus nos 16, 25, 26, 30, 57 (tickets ¥4 per person, one way), and the double-decker sightseeing bus ), ☏ +86 898 88910131 , tianya@aitianya.cn . 07:30-18:00 . One of the most famous beaches in China, and a traditionally popular spot for romantic couples. The beach is often too overrun by tourists for visitors to be able to appreciate its natural beauty, but has been famously alluded to by various ancient Chinese writers and in modern Chinese pop culture. Free .

title: 18.241854 109.612331 7 Yalong Bay International Rose Valley ( 亚龙湾国际玫瑰谷 )
content: 18.241854 109.612331 7 Yalong Bay International Rose Valley ( 亚龙湾国际玫瑰谷 ), 9 Bohou North Road, Jiyang Town, Jiyang District (吉阳区吉阳镇博后北路9号) ( bus no. 27 ), ☏ +86 898 88568895 , +86 898 88567881 . 08:30-18:00, no entry after 17:30 . ¥60 (entry ticket only), ¥90 (entry ticket + sightseeing car) . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.303352 109.435762 11 Jingrun Pearl Museum ( 京润珍珠博物馆 )
content: 18.303352 109.435762 11 Jingrun Pearl Museum ( 京润珍珠博物馆 ), Haiyu Highway West, Tianya District (天涯区海榆(西)线) ( close to the airport; take bus no. 16, 34 or 42 and get off at the Jingrun Pearl Museum bus stop ), ☏ +86 898 88341805 , +86 898 88341167 . 08:30-17:30 . A museum run by a pearl retailer. There's a shop here too, as well as a pearl-themed hotel and restaurant. Free . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.23768 109.633268 2 Yalong Bay Golf Club ( 亚龙湾高尔夫球会 )
content: 18.23768 109.633268 2 Yalong Bay Golf Club ( 亚龙湾高尔夫球会 ), 22 Longhai Road, Jiyang District (吉阳区龙海路22号) ( bus nos. 24 and 27 ), ☏ +86 898 88565888 , toll-free +86 400 1661868 , welcome@yalongbaygolfclub.com , reservation@yalongbaygolfclub.com MULTIPLE EMAIL . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.256081 109.515855 3 Beauty Crown Theater ( 美丽之冠大剧院 )
content: 18.256081 109.515855 3 Beauty Crown Theater ( 美丽之冠大剧院 ), Xinfeng Street, Jiyang District (吉阳区新风街) ( the nearest bus stop is the Hospital of Traditional Chinese Medicine (中医院), which is served by bus nos. 9, 10, 29, 36, 50 and 53 ). At the site of a self-declared 7-star hotel, the Beauty Crown Hotel (aka Beauty Crown Grand Tree Hotel).

title: 18.338045 109.483646 4 Red Detachment of Women Performance Park ( 红色娘子军演艺公园 )
content: 18.338045 109.483646 4 Red Detachment of Women Performance Park ( 红色娘子军演艺公园 ), Liyun Road, Tianya District (天涯区黎韵路) ( bus no. 54 terminates here ), ☏ +86 898 88818588 . The park is open every day from 09:00 to 22:00. The performance begins at 20:00 and runs for 60 minutes . The Red Detachment of Women ballet was one of the few officially approved ballets during the Cultural Revolution and was famously performed for US President Richard Nixon during his visit to China in 1972. Here it is performed daily and with special effects not seen elsewhere. Travellers interested in the real story of the Red Detachment of Women should consider a visit to Qionghai where the detachment was founded. Ticket prices start from ¥238 . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.337615 109.152989 6 Sanya Beluga Discovery Ocean World ( 大白鲸·三亚海洋探索世界 )
content: 18.337615 109.152989 6 Sanya Beluga Discovery Ocean World ( 大白鲸·三亚海洋探索世界 ), Xindao Street, Yazhou District (崖州区新道街) ( take bus no. 30 if coming from the city; take Yazhou Bus no. 6 if coming from Yazhou Railway Station or Dongtian Park ), ☏ +86 898 88825888 . M-F 10:00-17:00, Sa Su 10:00-18:00 . Standard adult tickets are ¥124 if bought on site. Cheaper prices are available online . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.315433 109.72303 7 Sanya Haichang Fantasy Town ( 三亚海昌梦幻海洋不夜城 )
content: 18.315433 109.72303 7 Sanya Haichang Fantasy Town ( 三亚海昌梦幻海洋不夜城 ), 168 Hai'an Avenue, Haitang District (海棠区海岸大道168号) ( take bus no. 33, 35, or Haitang 3 and get off at Haitang Bay; or use the double-decker sightseeing bus and get off at the Haichang Fantasy Town bus stop ), toll-free +86 400 6016699 . 10:00-22:00 (amusement rides begin operating at 16:00) . Part of a major Chinese theme park chain. General entry is free. Fees for each attraction are charged separately. For example, a ride on the Ferris wheel costs ¥98. Children under 1.2 meters in height, however, are exempt from all charges provided they are accompanied by an adult . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.292887 109.526905 8 Sanya Romance Park ( 三亚千古情景区 )
content: 18.292887 109.526905 8 Sanya Romance Park ( 三亚千古情景区 ), 333 Yingbin Road, Jiyang District (吉阳区迎宾路333号) ( take bus nos. 1, 6, 7, 9, 23, 27, 40, 45 or 53 and get off at the Sanya Romance Park bus stop ), ☏ +86 898 88658333 . 15:00-21:30 . Includes Sanya Ice & Snow World, which has ice sculptures and ice-skating facilities. There is also a theater where a reportedly spectacular song and dance show is performed twice a day. The first performance starts at 17:30 and ends at 18:30. The second performance begins at 20:00 and finishes at 21:00. ¥280 (general entry + admission to the theater), ¥340 (general entry + entry to Sanya Ice & Snow World + admission to the theater). Discounts are available for children and family groups . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 18.2702 109.48122 3 Casamia Italian Restaurant ( 卡萨米亚意大利餐厅 )
content: 18.2702 109.48122 3 Casamia Italian Restaurant ( 卡萨米亚意大利餐厅 ), 三亚湾路蓝色海岸门面旁B211号,2nd Floor ( by the entrance of Lan Se Hai An Complex ), ☏ +86 898 88889828 . A really upscale restaurant with two locations in Sanya with excellent service with authentic Italian dishes. Prices are fair, the presentation is good as is the taste, as is the quality of food. Clean and well run. Recommended for western foods that will delight the palate. All wines and beer served. English speaking staff. Italian owner who is the Maitre D aided by his Chinese wife.

title: 18.22306 109.51698 4 Coffee World ( 考菲乌 )
content: 18.22306 109.51698 4 Coffee World ( 考菲乌 ), Herton Hotel at Dadonghai Beach-1st floor (东海旅游区荷泰海景酒店1楼) ( opposite Resort and Time Hotel ), ☏ +86 898 88677995 , office@emperorfoods.cn . 10:30-23:30 . Offers pizza, pastas, salads, soups and the tastiest BBQ chicken wings in Hainan. Dining on a lovely balcony which overlooks Dadonghai Beach. Tel: 0898-88677995. The restaurant delivers to customers within a 5 mile radius of Dadonghai Beach. English is spoken. Moderate price .

title: 18.27952 109.50745 7 Jing Fu Gong ( 景福宫 )
content: 18.27952 109.50745 7 Jing Fu Gong ( 景福宫 ), 三亚市凤凰路三永凤凰城4号 ( Phoenix Road, right next door to the Bohemian ), ☏ +86 898 38295105 . Korean restaurant run by South Koreans. Part of a chain, there is one in Haikou too. Very authentic, to the extent that it is a favourite for Korean tour groups who want a taste of home. Attentive service. They have an upper level where you can take off your shoes and sit on the floor and private rooms. Reasonable prices .

title: 18.2702 109.48122 8 Lemon Grass Thai Restaurant ( 柠檬草泰式餐厅 )
content: 18.2702 109.48122 8 Lemon Grass Thai Restaurant ( 柠檬草泰式餐厅 ), 三亚湾蓝色海岸餐饮街二楼 ( Next to Casamia in Sanya Bay ), ☏ +86 898 88290819 .

title: 18.2253 109.51799 9 Marco Polo ( Italian restaurant )
content: 18.2253 109.51799 9 Marco Polo ( Italian restaurant ), 海韵路8号 ( look for the big Marco Polo sign ), ☏ +86 13518095143 . Offers a slightly more upscale take on Italian. There is a large, outdoor seating area and the pizzas are highly recommended. Offers pizzas, pastas, soups and meats. The food and the service are great. As of May 2013, they don't have adequate wait staff, so the only way to get a meal there is to show up around 18:00 and maybe the owner is in and can cook a meal for you. Expect ¥80-100 for a meal .

title: 18.225556 109.518922 10 Mr Cat ( 张猫猫的店 )
content: 18.225556 109.518922 10 Mr Cat ( 张猫猫的店 ), 2-2 Haiyun Road, Jiyang District (吉阳区海韵路2-2号) ( in the Dadonghai area, close to Summer Plaza ), ☏ +86 898 88281685 . 10:00-22:00 . A well-established and very popular Hainanese restaurant. Serves a wide variety of Hainanese dishes. Try to get here early, as there's a good chance you'll have to wait in a queue. ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: The Mana Pool
content: The Mana Pool Dadonghai, behind Summer Mall. 📱 WeChat: adamreyn / 18889428900. Open Weekends and occasional weeknights. A local expat bar run by a Canadian and a Brit, having a decent selection of board games to choose from. Very chill, a nice place to chill or relax when tired of the party. Sometimes big parties happen after quiz nights or movie nights on Fridays / Saturdays. Usually open all day Saturday and Sunday for board games, and often on Friday nights for quiz nights or movie nights, and other weeknights for nerdy games. Coffee, tea, beer, and mixed-drinks available. Entry is ¥25, which also gives you a choice of one free cheap drink. Beer ¥15-50. (updated 2026)

title: Beer Factory , Intercontinental Hotel
content: Beer Factory , Intercontinental Hotel . They have their own brewery with German beer. Chinese owners brought German brewmasters over from Europe, had them set up the brewery, and then kicked them out (thinking they could run the place without them). As a result, the beer is not very good. You can see all the big canisters and pipes where the beer is brewed and served to you. There's outdoor and indoor seating. Indoor seating has a live band from the Philippines, sometimes. If you come here on Wednesdays, all the beer is half price. ¥36, ¥50, ¥80 for small, medium, big draft beer . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: Mos Blues
content: Mos Blues . at the Mandarin Oriental Resort. A beautiful sunset bar with usually very tasty cocktails, however it's very expensive. Go at happy hour to make it reasonable. ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: 18.26259 109.49451 2 Ajiya ( Haitang Bay Gloria Sanya ), No
content: 18.26259 109.49451 2 Ajiya ( Haitang Bay Gloria Sanya ), No. 9 Haitang Bay, 301 Road, Haitang Bay ( Highway G98 ), ☏ +86 898 3888 8855 . French Teppanyakki.

title: 18.246 109.5077 3 Hao Shi Ya Yu ( 豪士雅娱乐城 ), 三亚市河西区文明路金河公寓一楼 , ☏ +86 898 88368889
content: 18.246 109.5077 3 Hao Shi Ya Yu ( 豪士雅娱乐城 ), 三亚市河西区文明路金河公寓一楼 , ☏ +86 898 88368889 . A run down local club. The second floor is the main lounge. They have a dance floor with live entertainment. They also have KTV rooms. The crowd is a more local young crowd. Not as sophisticated as the crowd on bar street.

title: 18.24704 109.50122 4 Xun Mi ( 寻宓海景音乐吧 )
content: 18.24704 109.50122 4 Xun Mi ( 寻宓海景音乐吧 ), 三亚湾路8-1（凤凰岛公交站） ( across from Phoenix Island, 2nd Floor ), ☏ +86 898 8819898 . close 02:00 . They have live music on the second floor, and a quieter section on the rooftop level.

title: 18.21985 109.49364 10 Banyan Tree Resort
content: 18.21985 109.49364 10 Banyan Tree Resort . This is a five-star resort with its own private beach. You can have a romantic dinner right on the beach.

title: Line 2
content: Line 2 This line connects the north of the river, islands in the middle, and south together. Stops at Harbin station, Zhongyang Dajie, can change onto line 1 at the provincial museum.

title: Old Quarter
content: Old Quarter . A section of the city just west of Zhongyang Dajie is still dominated by Russian buildings built around the turn of the century. Not well maintained but an interesting walk and you can maybe find Russian antiques in some of the thrift stores.

title: 45.7684 126.6171 3 Harbin Jewish New Synagogue ( 哈尔滨犹太新会堂 Hā'ěrbīn Yóutài Xīnhuìtáng )
content: 45.7684 126.6171 3 Harbin Jewish New Synagogue ( 哈尔滨犹太新会堂 Hā'ěrbīn Yóutài Xīnhuìtáng ), 162 Jing Wei Jie . Has been restored and contains an impressive collection detailing the history of Jews in Harbin. There were 20,000 at one point and the synagogue is well worth a visit. Further up Tong Jiang Jie is the old synagogue that is now a youth hostel and cafe, with the old Jewish school next door -both worth a detour to look at from the outside. ¥25 . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 45.7764 126.665 4 Temple of Heavenly Bliss ( 极乐寺 Jílèsì )
content: 45.7764 126.665 4 Temple of Heavenly Bliss ( 极乐寺 Jílèsì ), Dongdazhi Street (东大直街; Dōngdàzhíjiē) ( In the eastern part of the city ). Large and active Buddhist temple. ¥10 . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 45.773851 126.668838 5 Harbin Confucius Temple ( 哈尔滨文庙 )
content: 45.773851 126.668838 5 Harbin Confucius Temple ( 哈尔滨文庙 ), 25 Wenmiao Street (文庙街25号) ( right beside the campus of the Harbin Engineering University, about 1km east of the Harbin Engineering University metro station on Line 1 ), ☏ +86 451 82538438 . 08ː30-16ː30, closed on Wednesdays . This Confucius temple is one of the largest of its kind in northeast China. The Heilongjiang Museum of Nationalities can be found inside the temple. Free .

title: 45.501 126.974 6 Huining Fu
content: 45.501 126.974 6 Huining Fu . A few kilometres south of Acheng centre, you'll find the ruins of, the capital of the 12th century Jin dynasty. It's been declared a national historic reserve, and apart from the ruined city walls there's a museum on the site as well. ( updated Apr 2023 )

title: 45.77721 126.60545 8 Riverbank Park ( 江畔公园 Jiāngpàngōngyuán )
content: 45.77721 126.60545 8 Riverbank Park ( 江畔公园 Jiāngpàngōngyuán ), Along the Jiangpan Road in Daowai District ( Runs parallel to the Songhua River ). 00：00-24：00 . Long tree covered walkway that stretches the city-side banks of the Songhua river, a really nice and pleasant walk. ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: Ice Festival
content: Ice Festival, Zhaolin Park ( 冰雪游园会, 兆麟公园 Bīngxuě yóuyuánhuì, Zhàolíngōngyuán ), in the city center at Zhaolin Park, south side of the river . 13:30-21:30 . Rather small exhibits compared to the other two main festivals. Best viewed after dusk. ¥200 (Students: ¥80, admission is cheaper before 13:30) . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 45.7886 126.5907 2 Sun Island International Snow Sculpture Art Fair ( 太阳岛国际雪雕艺术博览会; Tàiyán
content: 45.7886 126.5907 2 Sun Island International Snow Sculpture Art Fair ( 太阳岛国际雪雕艺术博览会; Tàiyángdǎo guójì xuědiāoyìshù bólǎnhuì ), on Sun Island, north side of the river ( Just a few steps from the Sun Island gondola station or just cross the frozen river by feet ). 08:00-17:00 . Beautifully carved snow sculptures, massive dimensions. However, if you plan to visit the Ice and Snow World then this is not a must see. Pretty expensive for what you get to see and all other activities in the park are extra. ¥240 (students ¥120) . ( updated Feb 2019 )

title: Harbin Summer Music Festival ( 哈尔滨之夏音乐节 Hāěrbīn Zhīxià Yīnyuèjié )
content: Harbin Summer Music Festival ( 哈尔滨之夏音乐节 Hāěrbīn Zhīxià Yīnyuèjié ). Held every two years in July (next will be in 2018), this festival is organized by the city and brings in famous Chinese bands for free concerts held in the city square. ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 45.77988 126.61707 3 WB International Movie Theatre ( 万达国际电影城 Wàndá Guójì Diànyǐng Chéng )
content: 45.77988 126.61707 3 WB International Movie Theatre ( 万达国际电影城 Wàndá Guójì Diànyǐng Chéng ), Zhongyang Dajie Wal-mart . ¥50 plus for tickets . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: Yangge Traditional Chinese Dance
content: Yangge Traditional Chinese Dance . You will notice that during the warmer months (and even sometimes in the winter) there will be legions of senior citizens out on the street doing a group dance complete with drumming and costumes. This is called niu yang ge and if you are adventurous just jump in and dance along!

title: Bowling
content: Bowling . Very popular among the Chinese in Harbin. Most of the larger hotels have a bowling alley. There is also a bowling club behind the Sino Way hotel with 2 floors and pool tables.

title: Hotpot and Harbin beer ( 火锅和哈尔滨啤酒 Huǒguō hé Hā'ěrbīnpíjiǔ )
content: Hotpot and Harbin beer ( 火锅和哈尔滨啤酒 Huǒguō hé Hā'ěrbīnpíjiǔ ). Can be found anywhere in Harbin. ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: Assorted Meats on a Stick ( 串儿; Chuàn'ér )
content: Assorted Meats on a Stick ( 串儿; Chuàn'ér ). Sold on every street, try asking for grilled bread buns (考馒头; Kǎomántou), its really good. Finish everything off with an egg and tomato Gada Tang (soup). No more than ¥10 for 6-7 kabobs and soup .

title: Harbin Smoked Sausage ( 哈尔滨红肠 Hā'ěrbīn Hóngcháng )
content: Harbin Smoked Sausage ( 哈尔滨红肠 Hā'ěrbīn Hóngcháng ). A treat only known to Harbin, you see stores selling it everywhere, it is REALLY good. ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: Russian Breads
content: Russian Breads . Lots of Bread and pastry stores around the city, including Zhongyang Dajie.

title: Haws
content: Haws . Hawthorn fruit stacked on sticks and served covered with a sweet sauce. You tend to find other fruits available also.

title: Lamb
content: Lamb . Lamb with spices grilled over coals served with sesame flat bread from the nice Uighur guys (from Xinjiang province) on a street between Hong Bo Shopping Center and Guogeli Dajie. ¥5 will buy you a good meal .

title: 45.87468 126.52571 2 Rumi Cafe ( 入迷咖啡 )
content: 45.87468 126.52571 2 Rumi Cafe ( 入迷咖啡 ), A7#13 Seasons of Berlin, Academy St., University Area, Harbin (哈尔滨学院路柏林四季A7#13) , ☏ +86 451-88122316 , fax +86 451-88122316 , rumicoffee@gmail.com . Open 10:00-22:00 .

title: 45.74286 126.62254 3 Be For Time ( 避风塘茶楼 )
content: 45.74286 126.62254 3 Be For Time ( 避风塘茶楼 ), 102 Xidazhi Jie (南岗区西大直街102号) ( Under Pacers near HIT ). Open 24 hours . ¥18 all you can eat/drink . ( updated May 2022 )

title: 45.76448 126.62079 4 UBC Coffee ( 上岛咖啡西餐厅 )
content: 45.76448 126.62079 4 UBC Coffee ( 上岛咖啡西餐厅 ), 186 Gongchang Jie (道里区工厂街186号) .

title: Starbucks
content: Starbucks , Zhonyang Dajie ( one in Europlaza and one in the corner in a bigger shopping-mall, quite at the beginning of Center Street. ). Coffee house, here you can meet a lot of foreigners a bit more expensive than usual in China, price range is converted about the same as in Europe, and not necessarily good, especially the snacks there are targeted at Chinese who want to feel a bit the European flair . ( updated Mar 2015 )

title: 45.77134 126.61978 5 Costa Coffee
content: 45.77134 126.61978 5 Costa Coffee , Zhonyang Dajie, quite close to the Flood Monument, next to a Russian Shop and Babelas Kitchen . Coffee House, unlike Starbucks it's not quite as packed with people and you can still meet a lot of foreigners here a bit cheaper than Starbucks in some things, but mainly the same applies here too, Chinese western snacks and no real coffee .

title: 45.7712 126.6109 6 Luyu Cafe ( 鹿鱼咖啡 )
content: 45.7712 126.6109 6 Luyu Cafe ( 鹿鱼咖啡 ), 43 Hongzhuan Jie 红专街43号(靠近中央大街) ( Just a few meters left from Zhongyang St. ), ☏ +86 136-13644362 . This is a good place to relax and escape the crowds or to warm up on a cold winter day. Situated in a historic Russian building right next to Zhongyang street, the warm atmosphere and nicely decorated surroundings, combined with a creative coffee blend from the friendly owner, will let you forget that you're in a city with a population of 10 million. ¥30 . ( updated Feb 2019 )

title: 45.73196 126.66529 3 Bremen Hotel ( 勃莱梅大酒店 ), No.146 Zhongshan Road
content: 45.73196 126.66529 3 Bremen Hotel ( 勃莱梅大酒店 ), No.146 Zhongshan Road . Western style hotel that must have been great when it was new.

title: a translating software and the official site
content: Using a translating software and the official site . However the website requires you to know the Chinese name of your destination stop instead of your destination.

title: a translating software and Chinese map software
content: Using a translating software and Chinese map software (Baidu, Tencent, etc.). Due to the policy of Baidu, none of the map services are offering English services since they have cores provided by Baidu.

title: unofficial local English services
content: Using unofficial local English services . A variety local platforms with single bus route search are set up by bus fans. However they do not feature route planning. This is usually useful when you are travelling to other districts where bus stands do not feature English, or when you are planning to ride a bus whose route has a very complicated fare policy i.e. bus 2003 to Lushun. The local services update quite frequently (sometimes more frequently than the official website). You may also send a message to the account, and hope that an account operator is online.

title: Ask someone
content: Ask someone . This can be your best choice when you know your destination well or you are checking whether you are on the right bus, but asking long and complicated questions can be considered slightly rude and bothering by locals.

title: Do not consider riding a bike a good way to discover the city unless you have a great stre
content: Do not consider riding a bike a good way to discover the city unless you have a great strength. The city is located in a hilly area with a great amount of slopes, which may ruin a nice and relaxing trip inside the city.

title: Squares
content: Squares Within China, Dalian is renowned for its squares and green places, with a large number scattered throughout the city, each with its own distinct character Zhongshan Square hosts the city's financial center and some fine old Japanese buildings; People's Square is the seat of the city government and boasts an impressive fountain; and Xinghai Square is the largest square in Asia and home to a wide range of tourist attractions.

title: Lüshun
content: Lüshun Formerly known as Port Arthur, is a historically significant city on the southern tip of the Liaodong Peninsula, about 40 km (25 mi) south west of the city centre.

title: Xinghai Park
content: Xinghai Park consists of a 150,000-m² land garden and an 800-m-long arch-shaped beach, has high-quality greenery and presents the atmosphere and artistic conception of the Vienna Royal Garden. A large swimming pool has been built in the west of the park, making it the largest summer paradise in Dalian.

title: Zhongshan Park
content: Zhongshan Park . In 2003, the "Yixian Square" was built in the park, and a full-length bronze statue of Mr. Sun Yat-sen was built in the center of the square.

title: Discoveryland
content: Discoveryland in is a popular theme park with the fastest catapult roller coaster in Asia and the third fastest in the world.

title: Cherry picking
content: Cherry picking. For families or middle-aged and elderly tourists, when cherries are ripe in summer, they can go to the major picking gardens in the suburbs to experience the fun. Most picking gardens allow tourists to taste them in the garden, or take them away at a price slightly higher than the market price.

title: Cool off at the seaside
content: Cool off at the seaside. Summer and autumn are the best times to visit Dalian (May to October, especially in May when the weather is warm but not too hot). There are always many tourists cooling off on the beach. As the romantic city of Dalian, Jinshitan has the 10-mile Golden Coast (a very long natural beach) that often appears on tourist postcards. Fujiazhuang (also known as "Fujiazhuang"), Bangchuidao and Daheishi are also very popular beach resorts among Dalian locals.

title: The Grand Canal is 1800 km long and travels from Beijing to Hangzhou
content: The Grand Canal is 1800 km long and travels from Beijing to Hangzhou. It is not really for sightseeing but it is there.

title: 31.55164 120.301378 2 Wuxi Museum ( 无锡博物院 )
content: 31.55164 120.301378 2 Wuxi Museum ( 无锡博物院 ), 100 Zhongshu Road, Liangxi District (梁溪区钟书路100号) ( take a metro train to Qingmingqiao Station on Line 1 or take bus no. 67 ), ☏ +86 510 85727500 , +86 510 85727600 , wxbwy506@163.com . Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: 31.52748 120.28319 3 Nianhua Bay ( 拈花湾 )
content: 31.52748 120.28319 3 Nianhua Bay ( 拈花湾 ), 68 Huan Shan Xi Road, Binhu District ( take the Le You Line 2 for five stops to reach Nianhua Bay Station ), ☏ +86 4001287777 . Daily 09:00-22:00 . Nianhua Bay is a themed town scenic area with Zen as its main theme, located to the west of the Ling Shan Scenic Area. 140 . ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 31.58075 120.27097 2 Huishan Ancient Town
content: 31.58075 120.27097 2 Huishan Ancient Town - Yuchangyuan ( 惠山古镇·寄畅园 ), No. 18, Baoshan Street, Liangxi District ( self-drive or taxi ), ☏ +86 510 83333833 . Daily 08:00-16:30 . It's great for going out in all seasons. There's a paid parking lot inside, which is about ¥10 to 15 each time, and you can enjoy the flowers inside: there are azaleas, begonias, and green cherry blossoms. ¥65 . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.58056 120.23369 3 Wuxi Zoo ( 无锡动物园 )
content: 31.58056 120.23369 3 Wuxi Zoo ( 无锡动物园 ), No.99 Qianrong Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi ), ☏ +86 510 85528128 . 08:30-16:30 . It is a landmark zoo, suitable for playing with small children, with internal sightseeing buses and full facilities. There are animal zoning guides inside, so you don't have to worry about getting lost. ¥100 . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.44945 120.26556 4 Wuxi Sunac Land ( 无锡融创乐园 )
content: 31.44945 120.26556 4 Wuxi Sunac Land ( 无锡融创乐园 ), 150 meters south of the intersection of Yuanxi Road and Wuzhu Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi ), ☏ +86 4008959888 . 10:00～21:00 . There is a parking lot in the scenic area. The internal roller coaster is 1,278 meters long, with the fastest speed of 118 km/h. In addition to taking a taxi you can also arrive by subway, the subway is line 1. ¥200 . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.44775 120.27081 5 Wuxi Sunac Sea World ( 无锡融创海世界 )
content: 31.44775 120.27081 5 Wuxi Sunac Sea World ( 无锡融创海世界 ), Ground Floor, Rongchuangmao, 150 meters south of the intersection of Yuanxi Road and Wuzhu Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi ), ☏ +86 408959888 . 10:00-18:00 . There are a lot of marine life inside Wuxi Rongchuang Sea World. The second phase of the project will add more than 60 species, involving more than 39 subjects such as conical tooth sharks, bearded sharks, squids, stone crabs, bullnose rays, conger eels, etc., and the overall introduction of 1,500 marine species. The interior is spectacular. ¥150 . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.44687 120.26929 6 Wuxi Hot Snow Miracle ( 无锡热雪奇迹 ), 2/F, Rongchuangmao, No
content: 31.44687 120.26929 6 Wuxi Hot Snow Miracle ( 无锡热雪奇迹 ), 2/F, Rongchuangmao, No. 66, Rongchuang Culture & Tourism City, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi ). 10:00-21:00 . The snow facility consists of one beginner's trail, two intermediate trails, and five magic carpets. There are coaching services, snow gear rental, etc. In addition to taking a taxi, you can also choose bus 8 to arrive, and then walk 616 meters. All the snow inside is artificial snow. ¥300 . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.55457 120.28548 7 Canal Bund Art Museum ( 运河外滩美术馆 )
content: 31.55457 120.28548 7 Canal Bund Art Museum ( 运河外滩美术馆 ), No.11, Hubin Road, Binhu District ( self-drive or taxi ), ☏ +86 510 850520002 . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: Saizeriya
content: Saizeriya , a Japanese chain of Italian restaurants where a decently-sized plate of pasta can be had for less than ¥20 and all-you-can-drink soft drinks available for an additional ¥7. Many kinds of pizza, pasta, soups, roasted chicken, lamb, fish, salads, seafood, seaweed, etc. Menus are available in English. Find it in two locations: Zhongshan Road No.328 in T12 Shopping Center and Guangrui Road No.399 in Lifespace.

title: 31.4642 120.26591 2 Camphor Bistro ( 香樟餐酒馆 )
content: 31.4642 120.26591 2 Camphor Bistro ( 香樟餐酒馆 ), 88 Jingshi Road, Binhu District, 1st Floor ( Starting from Wuxi Railway Station, take Metro Line 3 towards Sumiao. After riding for three stops, you will arrive at Shengan Station. Next, transfer to Metro Line 4 and ride for eight stops until you reach Dajuyuan Station. Finally, it's a 448-meter walk to your destination. ), ☏ +86 185819970221 . 11:00-14:00, 17:00-21:30 . A French restaurant that offers free WiFi and serves French cuisine and seafood. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 31.59943 120.32487 3 Wagyu Steak House ( 和牛屋 )
content: 31.59943 120.32487 3 Wagyu Steak House ( 和牛屋 ), 7 Houyang Lane, Liangxi District ( Starting from Wuxi Railway Station, take bus number 712 towards Ganlu Parking Lot. After riding for five stops, you will reach Fengguangli Station. Then, it's a 309-meter walk. ), ☏ +86 15961708861 . 09:00-21:00 . A Western restaurant primarily focused on steaks. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 31.5761 120.29604 4 Sanfengqiao ( 三凤桥肉庄 sānfèngqiáo ròuzhuāng )
content: 31.5761 120.29604 4 Sanfengqiao ( 三凤桥肉庄 sānfèngqiáo ròuzhuāng ), 240 Zhongshan Rd, Chong'an District . One of the most famous purveyors of Wuxi-style braised spare ribs. Takeaways only.

title: 31.57597 120.2842 5 Lao Niu Wo Li ( 老牛窝里 ), No
content: 31.57597 120.2842 5 Lao Niu Wo Li ( 老牛窝里 ), No. 8, Nanxia Tang Cultural and Creative Park, 213 Nanxia Tang ( r taking Metro Line 1 towards Nanchan Temple Station, it's a 1.7-kilometer walk to reach destination ), ☏ +86 510 89057777 . M-F 10:30-13:00, 16:30-20:00; Sa Su 10:30-13:00, 17:00-20:30 . A long-established restaurant specializing in Wuxi cuisine, known for its sweet flavors. The beef stir-fried with rice cakes is the most popular dish on the menu. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 31.6011 120.31946 6 Xiuyuan Su-style Hotpot (Wuxi First Branch) ( 绣园苏式火锅(无锡首店) )
content: 31.6011 120.31946 6 Xiuyuan Su-style Hotpot (Wuxi First Branch) ( 绣园苏式火锅(无锡首店) ), 3 Hua Yuan Lane, Nanxia Tang, Qingming Bridge Subdistrict, Liangxi District ( by taking Metro Line 1 in the direction of Nanfang Quan for 6 stops, arrive at Qingming Bridge. Afterward, there is a 2.2-kilometer walk to reach the destination ), ☏ +86 15852727318 . M-Th 11:00-14:00, 17:00-22:00; F 11:00-14:00, 17:00-23:00; Sa Su 10:30-15:00, 16:30-23:00 . A popular hotpot restaurant among young people in Wuxi, known for its signature handcrafted tomato broth. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: Blue Bar Cafe , 53
content: Blue Bar Cafe , 53 - 1 Chongning lu , ☏ +86 82759866 . 17:00-02:00 . Western-owned and -managed bar/restaurant in the center of town.

title: The Imperial family no.1 ( 蝗家一号 )
content: The Imperial family no.1 ( 蝗家一号 ), 无锡市东梁溪路9号一楼 ( on bar street with lot of other bars ), ☏ +86 510-81889898 . This is a big noisy club.

title: 31.56226 120.311897 1 Now Og One Club , No
content: 31.56226 120.311897 1 Now Og One Club , No. 12-3, Yongle East Road, Nanxia Tang ( accessible by walking from Nan Chan Si Station on Metro Line 1 ), ☏ +86 18626365663 . 14:00-05:00 . A club-style bar and drinks available in the evening with live entertainment. ¥250 . ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 31.55912 120.31501 2 Ducal Coffee & Food
content: 31.55912 120.31501 2 Ducal Coffee & Food , 135 Nanxia Tang Street, Liangxi District , ☏ +86 13506193668 . 08:00-22:00 . A small pub serving cocktails and light meals. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: Wuxi Jin Jiang Grand Hotel , 218 Zhongshan Road, Chong'an District , ☏ +86 21 61226688
content: Wuxi Jin Jiang Grand Hotel , 218 Zhongshan Road, Chong'an District , ☏ +86 21 61226688 . A 4-star hotel that features a revolving restaurant located on the 28th floor which affords guests a stunning panoramic view of the city. Various amenities plus excellent service.

title: 26.0506 119.3083 3 Yantai Mountain ( 烟台山 )
content: 26.0506 119.3083 3 Yantai Mountain ( 烟台山 ), 福建省福州市仓山区仓前路35号 ( between Dadao and Shangteng metro stations, on Line 1, on the east bank of the river ). The former Western nations trading area of fuzhou. Several buildings and the general layout remain. The lower part is now shops, cafes and restaurants. Free . ( updated Aug 2023 )

title: 26.081 119.2972 5 Fuzhou Confucius Temple ( 福州文庙 )
content: 26.081 119.2972 5 Fuzhou Confucius Temple ( 福州文庙 ), 10 Shengmiao Road, Gulou District (鼓楼区圣庙路10号) ( just outside Namendou Metro Station ), ☏ +86 591 83378436 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays . This is the oldest Confucius Temple in Fujian Province. It was first built during the Tang Dynasty but destroyed three times due to fires. The current structures date from the Qing Dynasty. In the side buildings, there are exhibitions about China’s imperial examination system. Free . ( updated Mar 2026 )

title: Baiyun Mountain ( Near Gu Mountain )
content: Baiyun Mountain ( Near Gu Mountain ). Less heavily trafficked than Gu Mountain. After the grueling top section, you will be rewarded by some genuinely beautiful hospitality and refreshing tea in a cave! Magic. Plus some great views over the city.

title: 26.0918 119.2647 7 Fu Forest Trail ( 福道 (Fudao) )
content: 26.0918 119.2647 7 Fu Forest Trail ( 福道 (Fudao) ). 07:30-17:30 . Fudao is an elevated urban forest trail on metal bridges within Fuzhou city. With a total length of 19 km and an east-west extension of 6km, it crosses Jinniu Mountain. There are several entrances to the trail: No. 1 entrance (福道-1号入口) is the eastern end near West Lake, go to Shanhaiguan (山海观) bus stop. No. 3 entrance (福道-3号入口) is in the north, get off at Meifenglu bus stop (梅峰路站). No. 10 entrance (福道-10号入口) in the west near Min river and Hongshanqiaoxiaoqu (洪山桥小区) bus stop. Free . ( updated Jan 2019 )

title: 26.0564 119.3722 8 Gu Mountain ( 鼓山, Gu Shan; lit.
content: 26.0564 119.3722 8 Gu Mountain ( 鼓山, Gu Shan; lit.: Drum Mountain ) ( 20 minutes bus ride from town ), ☏ +86 591 83921184 . A Taoist temple houses nationally important archives written in monks' blood as well as superb veggie restaurant. It is a 1,900-meter climb, or a 20-minute cable car journey to the top. Take bus 303 from the city to the start of the tourist cable car (鼓山旅游索道).

title: 25.974801 119.152968 9 Qi Mountain ( 旗山
content: 25.974801 119.152968 9 Qi Mountain ( 旗山, Qi Shan, 旗山国家森林公园 Qi Shan National Forest Park ), Nanyu Town, Minhou County (闽侯县南屿镇) ( take bus no. 82, 141, 901, 902, or Zhang (樟) 13 to the Qi Shan Intersection (旗山路口), then use the park bus to travel up the winding 17-km road to the site ), ☏ +86 591 24580388 . 07:30-16:30 . A forest park with big, waterfalls and stunning views over receding mountain ranges from a vertigo-inducing suspension bridge. All this and monkeys to feed. ¥20 .

title: Fuzhou Fighting Ferrets Football Club
content: Fuzhou Fighting Ferrets Football Club . A motley assortment of nationalities who play at Jinshan Wentizhongxin every Sunday at 09:15. Like football, only funnier!

title: Paintball ( In Jinjishan Gongyuan, right on top of the hill )
content: Paintball ( In Jinjishan Gongyuan, right on top of the hill ). Great fun for those masochists among us who enjoy being hit by high velocity projectiles in delicate parts of the body. Not to be attempted in summertime!

title: Walk in traditional architecture street , Nan Hou Jie ( South of Xi Hu )
content: Walk in traditional architecture street , Nan Hou Jie ( South of Xi Hu ). Freshly renovated pedestrian street, back into time atmosphere, lots of small alleys to stroll by, great for shopping but avoid overpriced restaurants and bars.

title: Sauna/spa
content: Sauna/spa . Fuzhou is famous for its hotsprings; many hotels have a sauna and spa. They often have three different pools, one hot, one boiling (by western standards), and a normal one. Sauna and Turkish bath used to be available, staff gives you all you need. Most of the saunas have massage center with different services.

title: Boiled shark ( 鯊魚滑 )
content: Boiled shark ( 鯊魚滑 ). A Geng (thick soup) using shark's meat, it won't have a strong smell

title: 26.09012 119.29112 1 Daming Food Street ( 达明美食街 )
content: 26.09012 119.29112 1 Daming Food Street ( 达明美食街 ), 鼓楼区达明路美食街 ( At the north exit of Three Lanes and Seven Alleys ). A typical Chinese streetfood street with all kind of 小吃 (xiaochi, snacks) such as BBQ skewers, desserts, etc. A popular place for young locals and couples to hang out at night. ( updated Jan 2019 )

title: Moby Pizza ( On the second floor
content: Moby Pizza ( On the second floor, northeast corner of Jintai Road and Bayiqi Road opposite McDonalds ).

title: Cafe Forum ( on the corner of Ring Road Two and Wushi Road )
content: Cafe Forum ( on the corner of Ring Road Two and Wushi Road ). Good quality meals in a box and reasonably priced coffee, but the service can sometimes be atrocious. Hit it on a good day, it is great. On a bad day, it is dire.

title: Lemon leaf , 5F, 66 Hubin Road ( opposite the front door of West Lake )
content: Lemon leaf , 5F, 66 Hubin Road ( opposite the front door of West Lake ). Very good Thai food. Featured dish: lemon fish and curry crab. Not cheap, ¥50 per person on average .

title: Roman Holiday
content: Roman Holiday , Jiao Tong Road, by the Hong Yun Xing Cheng Apartments ( when you arrive near the apartments, there will be an alley on the right side of the street with advertisements of Italian food, follow them down the alley until you see Roman Holiday on the left ), ☏ +86 591 88902217 . 11:00-22:30 . Likely the best Italian food in Fuzhou. Excellent pizza and pasta. Also, some good fusion Japanese/Italian/Chinese dishes. Not cheap, ¥50 per person or more if you get drinks .

title: 1-2-3 Bar , Baima Road ( Almost opposite Shao Yuan Yi Hao )
content: 1-2-3 Bar , Baima Road ( Almost opposite Shao Yuan Yi Hao ). Cheap beer, convivial atmosphere, sometimes live music, stays open as long as you are drinking/semi-conscious. The sign says 1-2-3, but Chinese pronounce it "do-re-mi" for reasons that are not at all clear.

title: Club Blog Club , 136 Hubin Road
content: Club Blog Club , 136 Hubin Road . A coffee shop managed by a Western resident that overlooks West Lake.

title: The Pure Drop , Hubin Road ( Near West Lake )
content: The Pure Drop , Hubin Road ( Near West Lake ). A lively and convivial atmosphere, cheap, cold beer, live music every night.

title: The Bamboo Bar ( about 200 m from Shao Yuan Yi Hao nearer to Yangqiao Road )
content: The Bamboo Bar ( about 200 m from Shao Yuan Yi Hao nearer to Yangqiao Road ). Cheap beer, waterside tables, live football games on TV. Pushy owner, but easily ignored after a couple of beers!

title: Saint Nobody , Beida Road ( Near Guxi Church )
content: Saint Nobody , Beida Road ( Near Guxi Church ). The most mysterious club in fuzhou with cheap beer and good indie music. An anti-fuzhou look which makes you feel like a traveler lost in an unknown city.

title: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:now
content: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Prada , 中国福建省福州市鼓楼区余府巷 中福西湖花园北福楼C区1层 ( Near Lakeside hotel ), ☏ +86 591-87110888 . 03:00 . The preferred bar for expats in Fuzhou. Local style, people playing dice and live singers. Few staff speak English, try to get a VIP card from the manager. Main drink is beer but you can order some cocktails. ( updated Jan 2018 )

title: 26.0893 119.2948 2 Ju Chun Yuan Hotel ( 聚春园大酒店 ), Dong Jie Kou ( A central intersection )
content: 26.0893 119.2948 2 Ju Chun Yuan Hotel ( 聚春园大酒店 ), Dong Jie Kou ( A central intersection ). Very central for shopping and such. Has a well-reputed Chinese buffet, a KFC and a UBC coffee shop. ¥200-odd a night .

title: Wyndham Pingtan Hotel ( 平潭温德姆酒店 ), No.8, Middle Qilin Ave , ☏ +86 591 62888888
content: Wyndham Pingtan Hotel ( 平潭温德姆酒店 ), No.8, Middle Qilin Ave , ☏ +86 591 62888888 . CNY600 . ( updated Sep 2024 )

title: Empark Grand Hotel ( 世纪金源大饭店, lit.
content: Empark Grand Hotel ( 世纪金源大饭店, lit.: Golden Resources Hotel ) ( Off Wushi Road, to the east ). Good Macau restaurant on ground floor.

title: 26.0773 119.3015 4 Shangri-La Hotel ( 香格里拉大酒店 ) ( corner of Wuiyi Square )
content: 26.0773 119.3015 4 Shangri-La Hotel ( 香格里拉大酒店 ) ( corner of Wuiyi Square ). 5-star luxury. Try the burger in the lobby if you are tired of Chinese food. Also has a great and (by five-star standards) inexpensive coffee bar with free internet access.

title: Howard Johnsons , Mawei District . Don't be fooled by the name
content: Howard Johnsons , Mawei District . Don't be fooled by the name - this is not the HoJos you are accustomed to in the US. Very classy hotel with a good western restaurant on the ground floor and an excellent Japanese restaurant on the second floor.

title: Best Western , Downtown ( Near Hot Springs Park )
content: Best Western , Downtown ( Near Hot Springs Park ). Nice western hotel with soft beds in a good location. Half block to Panevino's (Italian restaurant) and Hot Springs Park.

title: 36.67 117.01842 3 Jinan Old Town , Qushuiting Street, Lixia District
content: 36.67 117.01842 3 Jinan Old Town , Qushuiting Street, Lixia District . A neighbourhood of alleys and traditional Chinese buildings immediately east of the Jinan Confucius Temple, an expansion with new faux-traditional Chinese architecture was completed in 2016. There are numerous springs, tea houses, the Hundred Flower Pond, and the former residence of 20th century Chinese scholar Lu Dahuang. Free .

title: 36.67297 117.01451 4 Memorial Temple of Xin Qiji
content: 36.67297 117.01451 4 Memorial Temple of Xin Qiji , Daming Hu Road, Lixia District ( West side of Xia Garden, south bank of the lake ). Rebuilt from the original Li Hongzhang Temple, this is a memorial to Xin Qiji, a famous poet and warrior from the Song dynasty. ( updated Jul 2017 )

title: 36.6753 117.0262 5 Minghu Art Gallery ( 明湖美术馆 ), Quehua Rd, Lixia District
content: 36.6753 117.0262 5 Minghu Art Gallery ( 明湖美术馆 ), Quehua Rd, Lixia District . An impressive modern pagoda standing on an island near the center of the lake containing examples of traditional Chinese arts. ( updated Jul 2017 )

title: 36.6608 117.01 6 Baotu Spring Park ( 趵突泉公园 )
content: 36.6608 117.01 6 Baotu Spring Park ( 趵突泉公园 ), 1 Baotuquan South Rd, Lixia District , ☏ +86 531 86920439 . Must-see park immediately to the west of Quancheng Square surrounds the 'number 1 spring under heaven', Baotu Spring. Includes gardens, pavilions and a number of small museums and memorial halls dedicated to famous locals. AAAAA attraction. ¥40/20 for regular/student ticket .

title: 36.6661 117.0088 8 Five Dragon Pool Park ( 五龙潭公园 ), ☏ +86 531 8692 1741
content: 36.6661 117.0088 8 Five Dragon Pool Park ( 五龙潭公园 ), ☏ +86 531 8692 1741 . A small park within which is a very deep pool of spring water, a few natural springs, pavilions and a temple for the Tang Dynasty army general Qin Qiong who lived in Jinan. ¥5/2.5 for regular/student ticket .

title: 36.6563 117.0097 9 Laoshe Memorial Hall
content: 36.6563 117.0097 9 Laoshe Memorial Hall , 58 Nanxin St, Lixia District ( A short walk south from Baotu Spring ). A small museum dedicated to early 20th century Chinese author Laoshe based in his former residence while living in Jinan. Free . ( updated Jul 2017 )

title: 36.67238 117.02204 2 Minghu Ju ( 明湖居 )
content: 36.67238 117.02204 2 Minghu Ju ( 明湖居 ), 29 Daminghu Rd, Lixia District , ☏ +86 531 8277 3666 . Qing Dynasty theater showing traditional operas with a restaurant and tea house. ( updated Aug 2017 )

title: 36.6548 117.0444 3 Shandong Acrobatics Troupe Theatre ( 山东省杂技团金奖演艺厅 )
content: 36.6548 117.0444 3 Shandong Acrobatics Troupe Theatre ( 山东省杂技团金奖演艺厅 ), 71 Wenhua Road, Lixia District . Home theatre of world class Chinese acrobatic troupe. ( updated Aug 2017 )

title: 36.6691 116.9023 4 Shandong Grand Theatre Opera Hall ( 山东省会大剧院歌剧厅 )
content: 36.6691 116.9023 4 Shandong Grand Theatre Opera Hall ( 山东省会大剧院歌剧厅 ), Weihai Road, Huaiyin Qu, 250000 . Modern theatre in the new western area of the city near the western railway station. ( updated Mar 2018 )

title: Lydia restaurant
content: Lydia restaurant , 38 Shanda Road (山大路38号 Shandalu) ( Not far from the technology market ), ☏ +86 531 88918866 . An Italian restaurant. Favorite place of foreign students and young Chinese. The food is not as good and tasty as in Jenny's, but cheaper. About ¥40 for a lunch with drinks .

title: Quanjude ( Down Heping Lu near Shan Da Lu )
content: Quanjude ( Down Heping Lu near Shan Da Lu ). A good roast duck restaurant

title: 36.6609 116.9906 3 Daguanyuan ( 大观园 ), 34 Xiaowei Er Rd, Shizhong District
content: 36.6609 116.9906 3 Daguanyuan ( 大观园 ), 34 Xiaowei Er Rd, Shizhong District . A shopping mall with fast food chains on the street, restaurants serving regional Chinese cuisines within an inner courtyard, and alleys of simple food stalls. ( updated Aug 2017 )

title: 36.6489 116.9751 4 Liancheng International Shopping Centre , Jingshi Rd, Shizhong District
content: 36.6489 116.9751 4 Liancheng International Shopping Centre , Jingshi Rd, Shizhong District . Multi-storey shopping centre with a range of restaurants including a second branch of Tales of a Small Town, plus a food hall in the basement. ( updated Aug 2017 )

title: 36.6454 116.9981 5 Meishi Street ( 美食街 ), 34 Jinshiyi Rd, Shizhong District
content: 36.6454 116.9981 5 Meishi Street ( 美食街 ), 34 Jinshiyi Rd, Shizhong District . Food street with restaurants and a snack center. ( updated Aug 2017 )

title: 36.6502 117.025 6 Qianfoshan Rd Branch
content: 36.6502 117.025 6 Qianfoshan Rd Branch , 7 Qianfoshan Rd, Lixia District , ☏ +86 531 6789 5678 .

title: 36.65921 117.02297 4 English Corner ( 街角酒店 )
content: 36.65921 117.02297 4 English Corner ( 街角酒店 ), 3 Foshan Street, Lixia District , ☏ +86 186 6014 8519 . Bar serving cold bottle beer near the Sofitel.

title: Jenny's Cafe ( Right across the street from the Bank of China on LiShan Lu )
content: Jenny's Cafe ( Right across the street from the Bank of China on LiShan Lu ). Offers a wide range of cuisines including Italian and Mexican. This place used to be a foreigner hangout until management changed and the staff became unfriendly, the dishes halved in size and the prices doubled. Expensive western food in addition to many expensive drinks. Prices are like European prices, but at least you can eat something else than garlic beans and tofu. They also serve imported beer (Paulaner, Erdinger, Guinness, etc.) if you want a quality beer for a change. There's a small store next door that sells imported products like cheese.

title: Banjo bar ( Further up the street from English Corner )
content: Banjo bar ( Further up the street from English Corner ). This place has bands playing on most evenings.

title: Soho Disco
content: Soho Disco . Western-oriented disco. Populair with foreign students. Different kinds of beer are available. Beers around ¥20 .

title: Cinderella , Jingshi Lu, underneath the big sports stadium
content: Cinderella , Jingshi Lu, underneath the big sports stadium . A big club, mostly locals visiting. The main alternative to 1+1.

title: Jinan Tianjia Business Affairs Hotel , 2 Fukang Street , ☏ +86 531-81772177
content: Jinan Tianjia Business Affairs Hotel , 2 Fukang Street , ☏ +86 531-81772177 . Free internet. Meeting facilities, ticket office and laundry service available. Chinese restaurant and room service. Disounted rates for doubles of ¥128; breakfast ¥8 .

title: Joyinn & Suites-Shanda
content: Joyinn & Suites-Shanda , 77 Shanda North Road ( Next to Shandong University ), ☏ +86 531-88028588 . Free internet. Meeting facilities, ticket office, laundry service and chess/poker room available. Chinese restaurant and room service. Discounted rates for double rooms from ¥130 including breakfast .

title: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:now
content: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Zhong Hao Grand Hotel ( In Lixia District ). Quite affordable. It particularly boasts beautiful business suites as well as conference facilities. Online booking available on the website.

title: Line 1 Line 2 Line 3
content: Metro: Like many Chinese cities, Ningbo is rapidly expanding its Metro system. Line 1 with 29 stations opened in early 2014. Line 2 with 27 stations opened in 2015. Line 3 with 15 stations opened in mid 2019. Lines 4 with 25 stations opened in 2020, and 5 with 22 stations opened in 2021.

title: Rental cars
content: Rental cars: Are available at Ningbo Lishe International Airport.

title: Motor bikes
content: Motor bikes: Although Downtown Ningbo does not permit motorbikes a bike can be rented outside of downtown and can make an enjoyable way of reaching the outer districts.

title: 29.87623 121.54239 2 Drum Tower ( 鼓楼 ) ( Metro
content: 29.87623 121.54239 2 Drum Tower ( 鼓楼 ) ( Metro: lines 1 and 2 Gulou ). A symbol of Ningbo and an entrance to a pedestrian shopping district, this tower is a mix of architectural styles.

title: 29.8801 121.5399 3 Fufu Shi ( 伏跗室 ), 鼓楼街道孝闻街91号 ( Near metro line 1 Ximenkou station )
content: 29.8801 121.5399 3 Fufu Shi ( 伏跗室 ), 鼓楼街道孝闻街91号 ( Near metro line 1 Ximenkou station ). Tu-Su 08:30-11:30, 13:30-16:30 . Another old house that gets 5-10 visitors per day, this one displays a literature collection. Free with sign-in . ( updated Aug 2018 )

title: 29.8748 121.5526 5 Ningbo Banking Guild Hall ( 钱业会馆 ) ( Metro line 1 Dongmenkou )
content: 29.8748 121.5526 5 Ningbo Banking Guild Hall ( 钱业会馆 ) ( Metro line 1 Dongmenkou ), ☏ +86 574 62331147 . 08:30-11:30, 13:30-16:30 . Former guild hall for banking and foreign exchange, which was important in Ningbo due to significant foreign trade. Closed down when the banks were closed in 1949, it now houses an impressive coin museum ¥10 . ( updated Oct 2019 )

title: 29.8749 121.5583 6 Qing'an Guild Hall and Anlan Guild Hall ( 庆安会馆
content: 29.8749 121.5583 6 Qing'an Guild Hall and Anlan Guild Hall ( 庆安会馆, 安澜会馆 ) ( near metro line 1 Jiangxiaqiao East ), ☏ +86-0574-8733-0030 . 08:30-16:30 . Guild halls for the formerly-adjacent shipyard, including a temple for Matu, the goddess who protects sailors. Dating to 1191, demolished several times including in 1949 and the 1960s, and rebuilt 1997-2001, they now also serve as a museum covering shipbuilding in Ningbo dating back to the Neolithic period, and have been listed as part of the Grand Canal UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site. ¥10 . ( updated Aug 2018 )

title: 29.9826 121.51605 10 Baoguo Temple ( 保国寺 ) ( Bus Route
content: 29.9826 121.51605 10 Baoguo Temple ( 保国寺 ) ( Bus Route: 332 from metro line 2 Nijiayuan Station (30-40 minutes, every 10-40 minutes 06:20-19:00) ). 08:30-16:30 . Baoguo Temple is seated on the mountainside of Lingshan Mountain, about 15 km (9 mi) away from downtown. As a cultural relic spot under state-level protection, it was established in the Eastern Han Dynasty (25-220) and rebuilt and expanded in later dynasties. Now a museum, the present Baoguo Temple is a mixture of constructions made by various dynasties. It's wooden main hall is over 1000 years old, and is one of the oldest wooden buildings in China south of the Yangtze River. ¥20 .

title: 29.87715 121.55609 11 Cathedral of Our Lady of the Seven Sorrows ( 江北岸圣母七苦主教座堂 ).
content: 29.87715 121.55609 11 Cathedral of Our Lady of the Seven Sorrows ( 江北岸圣母七苦主教座堂 ).

title: 29.869444 121.539444 3 Moon Lake ( 月湖, Yuèhú )
content: 29.869444 121.539444 3 Moon Lake ( 月湖, Yuèhú ). A crescent-shaped lake surrounded by a park with traditional plazas and pagodas. It's a lively area – at some times of day the park is full of residents dancing or doing tai chi. Boat rides in the lake are possible, or just take a stroll around it. Free . ( updated Jul 2018 )

title: 29.7968 121.2576 5 Ningbo Five Dragon Pool ( 五龙潭 )
content: 29.7968 121.2576 5 Ningbo Five Dragon Pool ( 五龙潭 ), Wulongtan Scenic & Historic Site , ☏ +86 88049777 . 07:30-16:00 . This park has a small waterfall, several hundred year old temple, and scenic hiking trails alongside the mountains. A taxi service is available for those that are not interested in hiking to the top, but want to see the mountain ranges in a convenient setting. ¥40 .

title: 29.8982 121.5595 7 Sun Lake ( 日湖公园 ) ( Nijiayan station, metro line 2 )
content: 29.8982 121.5595 7 Sun Lake ( 日湖公园 ) ( Nijiayan station, metro line 2 ). The yang to Moon Lake's yin, this newer park has a large lake, ponds, fountains, forest, playgrounds, and plazas. Free . ( updated Nov 2018 )

title: 29.9601 121.7186 9 Zhaobaoshan ( 招宝山 )
content: 29.9601 121.7186 9 Zhaobaoshan ( 招宝山 ), 10 Zhaobaoshan Road, Zhenhai District (镇海区招宝山路10号) ( About 1.2 km away from Zhaobaoshan station, metro line 2 ; take Bus 27 or 396 from the metro station ), ☏ +86 574 86256931 . May–September: 05:00-16:30, October–April: 05:30-16:00 . A large forested hill where the Yong River empties into the ocean, it has several rebuilt temples, a 57.6m-tall pagoda you can climb since the elevator seems to be broken, Sanskrit inscriptions on exposed rock, a grotto, and remnants of multiple small defensive walls. Adjacent museums cover local naval history and military hardware. Don't expect tranquillity - a freeway tunnels through the centre of the hill. ¥60, or ¥30 for Ningbo residents, children, seniors 60-69, and students. Three nights a year it is open 18:00-06:00 for ¥20 . ( updated Feb 2023 )

title: 29.2266 121.2291 10 ZheDong Grand Canyon ( 浙东大峡谷 )
content: 29.2266 121.2291 10 ZheDong Grand Canyon ( 浙东大峡谷 ), 315-606 China Ninghai County Baixi Village, Chakou Town , ☏ +86 574 65386235 . Huge sweeping views of lush green countryside, water runs through the canyon as you follow a rough and ready trail.

title: Ningbo Delson Green World Golf Club , ☏ +86 574 8840 1166
content: Ningbo Delson Green World Golf Club , ☏ +86 574 8840 1166 . 18-hole golf course with 6 artificial lakes, par 72, 7200 yards. Visitors welcome.

title: O'Reilly's
content: O'Reilly's (爱尔兰酒吧). 46-9 North Caihong Rd near the Portman Plaza (市江东区彩虹北路46-9号, 波特曼大街上). Steaks, burgers, appetizers, all day breakfast, and low priced sub sandwiches (¥25/6 inch; yen;35/12 inch). Beer selection is good, and although the imported beers are a bit pricey, before 20:00 most draft beers are buy one get one free, and after 20:00 buy two get one free. Waitresses speak excellent English and Chinese.

title: Picanha Brazilian BBQ ( 比卡亚巴西烧烤 )
content: Picanha Brazilian BBQ ( 比卡亚巴西烧烤 ), No.1-4 Lane 230 Jiefang South Road, 2nd Floor of Century Plaza (宁波市解放南路230弄1-4号大梁街口世纪广场二楼) , ☏ +86 574 87360077 . Pretty good Brazilian BBQ, buffet style. Can be pricey depending on the option, the food is good and chefs are actual Brazilians. If meat is what you desire, then this is the place. ¥228 for meat/buffet/unlimited beer or ¥128 for meat/buffet . ( updated Apr 2018 )

title: Banana Leaf Curry House ( 老外滩中马路69号 ), Zhongma Lu 69 Hao, Lao Waitan , ☏ +86 574-87352600
content: Banana Leaf Curry House ( 老外滩中马路69号 ), Zhongma Lu 69 Hao, Lao Waitan , ☏ +86 574-87352600 . Opposite the Shamrock Irish Pub. The English-speaking staff gladly advises on their offerings and are more than happy tosurprise you with a selection of their meals.

title: Pizza Pino
content: Pizza Pino , 1041B, Zone C, Heyi Avenue Shopping Center, 66 Heyi Lu 和义路66号和义大道购物中心C区1041B , ☏ +86 574-8389-9535 . The only place in Ningbo with a wood-fired oven but ruins the pizza by not using buffalo mozzarella.

title: Da Bossi Ristorante , 139 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路139号 , ☏ +86 574-8657-8777
content: Da Bossi Ristorante , 139 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路139号 , ☏ +86 574-8657-8777 . A very fine and fancy Italian. Get a group together and enjoy an open fire in a private dining rooms on the 3rd floor. Book ahead as it gets busy.

title: n Ganesha Indian Restaurant ( 葛尼沙印度餐厅 )
content: n Ganesha Indian Restaurant ( 葛尼沙印度餐厅 ), 336 Zhenming Road, Haishu District ( 海曙区镇明路336号镇明小区 ), ☏ +86 574-87624696 . 11:00-23:00 . Delicious, authentic Indian cuisine. ¥80 .

title: The Office
content: " The Office ", in Lao Waitan. Where all the foreigners go nowadays. Taco Tuesdays ¥100 for all you can eat tacos. Tons of other specials, good food. Always someone to talk to.

title: Z Rocks , 43-47 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路43-47号 , ☏ +86 574 8735-9063
content: Z Rocks , 43-47 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路43-47号 , ☏ +86 574 8735-9063 . Getting a drink is not easy as the bar staff do not speak one word of English, terrible Chinese band tries their best, often empty. Very Expensive .

title: The Garden , Lao Waitan ( just next to the river ), ☏ +86 15957425880
content: The Garden , Lao Waitan ( just next to the river ), ☏ +86 15957425880 . A great place when the weather is not too hot and not too cold, outdoor seating next to the river with super cheap drinks and student music makes this the choice place for students and those on an extreme budget. Budget .

title: Harley Bar
content: Harley Bar , 18 Ma Yuan Rd ( just a bit further out of the center of town ), ☏ +86 13003728695 . Has a great feeling about the place, pool table, decent food, live music, clean American style bar. Nice, but always empty.

title: Barfly , Tian Yi Sq, No
content: Barfly , Tian Yi Sq, No. 7 gate, 11C area, 3F 宁 波天一广场7号 门11C区3楼 , ☏ +86 574 8727-7979 . The young and beautiful with stacks of cash flock to this bar. Great shows here. But expensive.

title: Bass Clef Bar , 168 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路168号 , ☏ +86 13958274535
content: Bass Clef Bar , 168 Zhongma Lu, Lao Waitan 老外滩中马路168号 , ☏ +86 13958274535 . One of the better bars in Lao Waitan, a small intimate bar that is well lit with a mini stage for live music.

title: Ningbo Lizhai International Youth Hotel , 77 Gongqing Rd ( near Moon Lake )
content: Ningbo Lizhai International Youth Hotel , 77 Gongqing Rd ( near Moon Lake ). 4 bed dorms ¥45, singles ¥80-120 .

title: Crowne Plaza City Center , 129 Yaohang St , ☏ +86 574 5619-9999
content: Crowne Plaza City Center , 129 Yaohang St , ☏ +86 574 5619-9999 . ¥500 .

title: Nanyuan Hotel , 2 Lingqiao Rd, Haishu District , ☏ +86 574 8709-5678
content: Nanyuan Hotel , 2 Lingqiao Rd, Haishu District , ☏ +86 574 8709-5678 . Offers 429 guestrooms, all of which are fully-air conditioned, and have a virtual telecommuting system and free high-speed Internet. Some of its amenities include Health Club (spa, sauna, steam bath, heated pool, and exercise gym), outdoor tennis court, and barber shop and beauty salon.

title: Ningbo Hotel , Ma Yuan Rd 251
content: Ningbo Hotel , Ma Yuan Rd 251 . Though it is a rather old hotel, it was renovated in 2005. It is not far away from the city center. ¥240 .

title: Ningbo Kylie Hotel
content: Ningbo Kylie Hotel , Jicao Jie 76 Hao ( downtown Jiangdong District near Sheraton ).

title: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:now
content: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Ningbo Sunny Hotel , 158 Xihe Rd, Haishu District . A 3-star business hotel with 105 tastefully appointed rooms. Impressive facilities include a well-equipped business center, conference rooms, and recreational facilities such as a spa and sauna. The hotel also serves sumptuous seafood fares in its Chinese restaurant.

title: Line 1 runs east-west that connects Zhengzhou Station
content: Line 1 runs east-west that connects Zhengzhou Station, Zhengzhou East Station and a few other points of interest.

title: Line 3 is an L-shaped line connecting the northwest with the southeast
content: Line 3 is an L-shaped line connecting the northwest with the southeast. It runs south from the Henan Sports Center in the southern part of Huiji District and then turns east after reaching Erqi Square before eventually reaching Henan Orthopaedics Hospital in Guancheng District.

title: Line 4 is another L-shaped line running from northwest to southeast
content: Line 4 is another L-shaped line running from northwest to southeast. It begins at Laoyachen in Huiji District, intersects with Line 3 at the Henan Sports Center, then continues east until it reaches Dragon Lake, whereupon it turns south and heads toward Langzhuang in central Guancheng.

title: Line 14 serves the CBD area to the west of the city
content: Line 14 serves the CBD area to the west of the city, though as of January 2021, only 3 stations have opened.

title: Chengjiao line is a suburban metro line
content: Chengjiao line is a suburban metro line, starting from Nansihuan in Guancheng and ending in Zhengzhou Xinzheng International Airport. There are through services through Line 2. The southern extension of Chengjiao line to Zhengzhou South Railway Station is expected to open in 2023.

title: 34.749161 113.682317 2 Zhengzhou Confucius Temple ( 郑州文庙 )
content: 34.749161 113.682317 2 Zhengzhou Confucius Temple ( 郑州文庙 ), 301 Dongda Street, Guancheng Hui District (管城回族区东大街301号) ( near the metro station of the same name on Line 3 ), ☏ +86 371 66322939 . 08:00-17:30 . The Zhengzhou Confucius Temple is one of the largest historical building complexes in Zhengzhou. he first temple was built here in the first century AD, but it has been rebuilt several times due to being repeatedly destroyed by wars and fires. The Dacheng Hall, which dates from the Qing Dynasty, is the main building of historical value. The other buildings that make up the complex are largely modern reconstructions. Free . ( updated Jan 2021 )

title: 34.752 113.666 3 Er Qi (February 7) Memorial Tower ( 二七纪念塔 )
content: 34.752 113.666 3 Er Qi (February 7) Memorial Tower ( 二七纪念塔 ), Er Qi Square, 230 Er Qi Road, Er Qi District (二七区二七路230号二七广场) ( just outside Er Qi Square Station on Metro Line 1 ), ☏ +86 371 66966798 , zzcceqg@163.com . 09:00-17:00, closed on Mondays . Museum inside a rather garish double pagoda that looms over February 7 Square. Inside there are exhibits explaining the city's development. Free .

title: 34.72389 113.722913 5 Zhongyuan Tower ( Fu Tower
content: 34.72389 113.722913 5 Zhongyuan Tower ( Fu Tower, 中原福塔 ), 1206 Hanghai East Road, Guancheng Hui District (管城回族区航海东路1206号) ( Zhongyuan Tower Station, Metro Line 5 ), ☏ +86 371 60609199 . 09:30-19:00 . This 388-metre high tower is the 10th tallest tower in the world and has great views of the city. On the third and fourth floors of the observation deck, you can see the largest panoramic painting in the world. Standard ticket price is ¥98. Children under 1.2 metres in height and adults over 70 may enter for free . ( updated Dec 2019 ) Henan · Drama Fantasy City

title: 34.799468 114.002787 6 Henan · Drama Fantasy City ( 只有河南·戏剧幻城 )
content: 34.799468 114.002787 6 Henan · Drama Fantasy City ( 只有河南·戏剧幻城 ), Northwest corner of Ping’an Avenue and Guangxin Street intersection, Dameng Subdistrict , ☏ +86 4000001992 . daily 10:00–20:00 . The park is built with 56 blocks, featuring yellow earthen walls as the main architectural style. It includes three large theaters and 18 small theaters. Through immersive theater, it tells stories about land, grain, and cultural heritage, while the three main theaters showcase Henan’s history and local culture, offering visitors an engaging, first-hand experience. ¥285 per person . ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 34.766796 113.745304 7 Henan Geological Museum ( 河南省地质博物馆 )
content: 34.766796 113.745304 7 Henan Geological Museum ( 河南省地质博物馆 ), 18 Jinshui East Road, Zhengdong New District (郑东新区金水东路18) ( just outside the western exits of Nongye South Road on Metro Line 1; bus routes 43, 47, 115, 186, b38, k901, k902, s131 and y13 ), ☏ +86 371 68108999 , zhanlanbu8359@163.com . 09:00-16:30, no tickets issued after 16:00, closed on Mondays (except public holiday Mondays) . Contains rock specimens, and many fossils, including dinosaur fossils. Visitors are required to show their ID. Tickets are free . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: 34.777528 113.861286 9 Henan Museum of Science and Technology ( 河南省科学技术馆 )
content: 34.777528 113.861286 9 Henan Museum of Science and Technology ( 河南省科学技术馆 ), Northeast side of intersection of Zhengkai Avenue and Yangqiao Avenue, Zhongmu County (中牟县郑开大道与杨桥大道交叉口东北侧) ( the easiest way to get here is probably to get bus no. 312 from outside Exit B of the Zhengzhou Sports Center station on Metro Line 1 ), ☏ +86 371 65700365 . Th-Su 09:30-17:00 . One of the largest science and technology museums in China. Before visiting the museum, visitors are expected to make a booking on the museum's WeChat account, which can be found by searching '河南省科技馆' on WeChat. The booking must be done at least two days before the day you intend to visit. General entry is free, movie tickets cost ¥30, entry tickets to the children's amusement park are also ¥30 .

title: 34.7318 113.7131 1 Century Fun Park ( 郑州世纪欢乐园 )
content: 34.7318 113.7131 1 Century Fun Park ( 郑州世纪欢乐园 ), 1 Shihua Road, Guancheng Hui District (管城回族区石化路1号) ( 20-30 minutes away from Er Qi Square; about 1.4 km north of Qili River Station on Metro Line 5; bus routes 321, b15, s126, and s163 ), ☏ +86 371 63282288 . 09:00-17:30 (March 15th-October 14th), 09:30-17:30 (October 15th-March 14th), 17:00-22:00 (extended opening hours on select days) . It is quite a huge amusement park. Be aware most rides have a 90-kg limit for anyone using them, sometimes staff can be strict and refuse to let you ride even after you have paid to get in. ¥160 (adults), ¥80 (children between 1.2 and 1.5 metres in height), ¥50 (special price for entry after 17:00). Free entry is granted to children under 1.2 m in height and adults over 70 .

title: Zhengzhou Fonte Happy World
content: Zhengzhou Fonte Happy World , People's humanities road ( intersection of Zhengkai Avenue and Humanities Road ). This is a cultural and technological theme park featuring science fiction and interactive experience. $39 .

title: Night market in Erqi (February 7) Square
content: Night market in Erqi (February 7) Square . A good place for a snack and scenery.

title: Tudali ( near the corner of Wenhua Road and Huanghe Road )
content: Tudali ( near the corner of Wenhua Road and Huanghe Road ). Korean-style restaurant and bar. If you have an affinity for soju, this is the place for you.

title: Muslim Restaurant
content: Muslim Restaurant , Erqi Square ( Near the mosque and Beijing Hualian Mall ).

title: Crowne Plaza
content: Crowne Plaza . A good place for Western cuisine with an Italian restaurant and a Western-style pub. It offers a buffet during dinner including Brazilian Rodizio and a dessert bar. There is also a smattering of pizza and pasta joints called Cappuccino around the city.

title: New Island Coffee
content: New Island Coffee . Serves a plethora of dishes including waffles and fajita-style meat plate alongside a smattering of coffee and desserts and has several locations throughout Zhengzhou.

title: Cibo Coffee , Jinsan Road
content: Cibo Coffee , Jinsan Road . Among the best Western restaurants in the city. You can order Chinese food by the plate or Western food like steak in set meals with many courses. Each plate is a small portion but overall the set meals are a great deal, for ¥75-200 you get many plates of very good food. Make sure to ask for the dishes to come one at a time for the best dining experience.

title: Helen's , Just north of Target across the street
content: Helen's , Just north of Target across the street . ¥6 Tsingtao for foreigners, popular

title: Tao Bar , Near the corner of Jinshui Lu and Jingqi Lu
content: Tao Bar , Near the corner of Jinshui Lu and Jingqi Lu . A lively new bar opened near the corner Jinshui Lu and Jing Qi Lu.

title: Bird Bar , On Jing Qi Lu, a ways off Jinshui Lu, the main road
content: Bird Bar , On Jing Qi Lu, a ways off Jinshui Lu, the main road . A small bar on Jing qi Lu. Laid-back mood, fooseball, etc.

title: Western Pub , Nongye Road ( to the right of the Henan Provincial Museum )
content: Western Pub , Nongye Road ( to the right of the Henan Provincial Museum ). For an unusual drinking experience, consider this pub, located in a bunker-like concrete building. This place features a cabaret-style show with a mix of song, dance, and jokes. Unless you understand Chinese, it will be mostly incomprehensible, yet the experience will give you insight into Chinese drinking culture. The place is noisy, smoky, crowded, and occasionally bizarre. You can order half-a-dozen or so bottles of beer by the bucket. Try to get there early, around 19:00, as the show ends around 22:00 or 23:00. This building also houses one of Zhengzhou's movie theaters.

title: Home Hotel
content: Home Hotel . Chain of business hotels scattered about the city. Their rooms are clean and have a style that invokes a SoHo loft more than a Chinese hotel.

title: Jinjiang Inn , 92 Hongqilu
content: Jinjiang Inn , 92 Hongqilu . Double rooms have one large and one standard bed. There is another branch on 46 Zhonghanghailu. ¥138-159 .

title: Guangzhou Hotel , Erqi Road ( Near the corner of Jinshui Road )
content: Guangzhou Hotel , Erqi Road ( Near the corner of Jinshui Road ). Caters to business travelers. Doubles start at around ¥240 with a discount .

title: Erqi Hotel ( in the main square )
content: Erqi Hotel ( in the main square ). This hotel might be a little loud at night. Full service rooms are about ¥250, budget rooms with shared bathroom for ¥150 (can be hard to get) .

title: Londoo Hotel , Erqi Street ( close to Erqi Square )
content: Londoo Hotel , Erqi Street ( close to Erqi Square ). Massive Chinese-style business hotel with well-worn carpets and paper-thin walls, but otherwise functional. A discounted standard room goes for ¥190 .

title: Sheraton Grand Zhengzhou Hotel
content: Sheraton Grand Zhengzhou Hotel , No.33 Jinshui East Road, Zhengdong New District ( Nongye South Road (Zhengzhou Metro Line 1), Exit 3 ), ☏ +86 371 6063 6666 , Sheraton.Zhengzhou@sheraton.com . New hotel. The rooms are well appointed, and the buffet breakfast spread has good reports. ( updated Sep 2017 )

title: 34.608611 112.477222 2 Guanlin Temple ( 关林庙 )
content: 34.608611 112.477222 2 Guanlin Temple ( 关林庙 ), 2 Guanlin South Road, Luolong District (洛龙区关林南路2号) ( bus 81 from the train station stops near here (at the intersection of Longmen Ave and Guanlin Rd) and then continues on to the Longmen Grottoes; there is also a bus stop just outside the temple, which is served by bus nos. 15, 39, 55, 58, 69, 71, 167 and 603 ), ☏ +86 379 65951746 , +86 379 65962018 . 08:00-18:30 . Commemorates Guan Yu, great warrior of the Kingdom of Shu and main character from, "The Romance of the Three Kingdoms". The temple is built over the mausoleum which houses the general god's head, and contains several halls dedicated to the deified man. The side halls are all under construction. ¥40 . ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 34.5632 112.4711 3 Longmen Grottoes ( 龙门石窟 Lóngmén Shíkū )
content: 34.5632 112.4711 3 Longmen Grottoes ( 龙门石窟 Lóngmén Shíkū ), 12 kilometers south of Luoyang ( on the banks of Yi River ), ☏ +86 379 6598 0972 . 0800–21:00 . One of the finest Buddhist rock sculptural sites in China and a UNESCO World Heritage Site . ¥120 . ( updated Sep 2025 )

title: 34.677458 112.456131 6 Duke of Zhou Temple Museum ( 洛阳周公庙博物馆 )
content: 34.677458 112.456131 6 Duke of Zhou Temple Museum ( 洛阳周公庙博物馆 ), 21 Dingding South Road, Laocheng District (老城区定鼎南路21号) ( about 100 meters north of the intersection of Dingding South Road and Kaixuan Road; take bus no. 33, 52, 53, 55, 61, 65, 76, 81, 93, 206, 501, 505 North, 888, 889 or 909 ), ☏ +86 379 65277005 , lyzgmbwg@126.com . Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, closed on Mondays . A memorial temple dedicated to the Duke of Zhou, a famous statesmen and aristocrat who acted as the regent of the Zhou Dynasty from 1042 BC to 1035 BC. The temple was commissioned in 618 AD by the Sui Dynasty general Wang Shichong and rebuilt during the Ming Dynasty. Free . ( updated Jan 2021 )

title: 34.677881 112.475122 7 Eighth Route Army Luoyang Office Museum ( 八路军驻洛办事处纪念馆 )
content: 34.677881 112.475122 7 Eighth Route Army Luoyang Office Museum ( 八路军驻洛办事处纪念馆 ), 222 Jiudu East Road, Laocheng District (老城区九都东路222号) ( bus nos. 7, 16, 17, 23, 57, 74, 206, and 980 ), ☏ +86 379 63973726 . Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, closed on Mondays . The museum is inside a traditional Chinese mansion built in 1831 that was originally the home of a wealthy merchant.
