Free . ( updated Jan 2023 )

title: 40.835226 111.737094 6 Inner Mongolia Art Museum ( 内蒙古美术馆 )
content: 40.835226 111.737094 6 Inner Mongolia Art Museum ( 内蒙古美术馆 ), 20 Xinhua Street East, Saihan District (赛罕区新华东街20号) ( diagonally opposite the Inner Mongolia Museum; take a metro train to the Shizhengfu Station on Line 1; alternatively take bus no. 2, 3, 5, 12, 16, 27, 53, 59, 66, 80, 83, 92, 98, 113, K1 or S25 ), ☏ +86 471 3823102 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Jan 2023 )

title: 40.797009 111.708585 7 Inner Mongolia Museum of Natural History ( 内蒙古自然博物馆 )
content: 40.797009 111.708585 7 Inner Mongolia Museum of Natural History ( 内蒙古自然博物馆 ), 13 South 2nd Ring Road, Saihan District (赛罕区南二环路13号) ( take bus no. 34, 37 or 78 ), ☏ +86 471 6381863 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Jan 2023 )

title: 40.841325 111.730944 8 Inner Mongolia Science and Technology Museum ( 内蒙古科技馆 )
content: 40.841325 111.730944 8 Inner Mongolia Science and Technology Museum ( 内蒙古科技馆 ), A18 Beiyuan Street East, Xincheng District (新城区北垣东街甲18号) ( behind the Inner Mongolia Museum; take a metro train to either the Bowuguan station or the Shizhengfu Station (both on Line 1); alternatively take bus no. 12, 27, 59, 80, 113 K! or S25 ), ☏ +86 471 3941128 , toll-free +86 400 6261128 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Jan 2023 )

title: Get to the mountains ( take bus 54 north until it ends at the edge of town; this bus can b
content: Get to the mountains ( take bus 54 north until it ends at the edge of town; this bus can be easily caught along the north side of Xinhua Square heading west ).

title: People's Park , Zhongshan west road
content: People's Park , Zhongshan west road . You can drive a pedal boat (¥50/¥60 for 2/4 people) on one of the lakes, ride a giant wheel or just walk around in this very nice park. Parts are like an amusement park, other parts just like a normal park. No entrance fee for the park.

title: Go Dojo , Zhongxing International Mansion, No.118, Ulanqab East Road, Saihan District
content: Go Dojo , Zhongxing International Mansion, No.118, Ulanqab East Road, Saihan District . Training in the game of Go , run by professional player Zhang Jiayao. Instruction is done in Chinese.

title: Zang Can Bar (Tibet Food Bar) ( in the heart of the city
content: Zang Can Bar (Tibet Food Bar) ( in the heart of the city, east side of Xinhua Square, look down the alley way south of the hotel, it is on the north side ). A small Tibetan restaurant. Great food, atmosphere & jewelry. Private room can sit a dozen people. High .

title: Xi Bei
content: Xi Bei , Chengjisihan Dajie, Xincheng District ( at the new stadium to the northwest of the city ). A northwestern Chinese cuisine chain, which started in Inner Mongolia; one of the four stores in Hohhot. The menu is very comprehensive. Tea is not free. The menu is in Chinese and English and meals are delivered via roller skate. Maybe someday they'll re-label the noodle appetizer called "Panda-crusted noodles." Plenty of private rooms available. Wait staff is friendly and places orders via wireless PDAs so it may seem they are pushy. High .

title: Mongolian Food @ the Race Track
content: Mongolian Food @ the Race Track . Meals served in traditional Mongolian style in your own private yurt. High .

title: Fengwei Huoguo ( just southwest of Xinhua Square, facing north with a large green sign )
content: Fengwei Huoguo ( just southwest of Xinhua Square, facing north with a large green sign ). Seafood hotpot. Busy every night, for good reason. Medium .

title: Shiao Hotel ( a large hotel along Zhongshan road
content: Shiao Hotel ( a large hotel along Zhongshan road, west of Victory shopping plaza, with a multi-colored deck at 22 stories with a large Eiffel Tower-like radio tower atop it -- hard to miss ). Buffet closes at 21:00 doors close at 21:30 . Buffet overlooking all of Hohhot that rotates so you get the whole 360. Come early. The buffet is ¥50/person .

title: Zecheng Ice Boiled Mutton
content: Zecheng Ice Boiled Mutton . One of the most famous ice-boiled mutton restaurants in Inner Mongolia. Unlike traditional mutton hot pot, which is cooked with water, they heat it with ice cubes mixed with mutton. This makes the meat firm and tasty. The store's secret condiments are also part of the reason for its booming business. ( updated Jan 2025 )

title: Milk Tea Inner Mongolian milk tea is one of the most iconic beverages of Hohhot and the en
content: Milk Tea Inner Mongolian milk tea is one of the most iconic beverages of Hohhot and the entire region. Unlike regular sweet milk tea, this tea is usually salty. It is made by boiling brick tea (usually black tea) with milk and salt, and in some areas, ingredients like fried rice or butter are added. Milk tea is not only a daily drink but also a common offering when hosting guests, symbolizing the warm hospitality of the nomadic people.

title: Kumis (Fermented Mare's Milk) Kumis is a low-alcohol beverage made from fermented mare’s m
content: Kumis (Fermented Mare's Milk) Kumis is a low-alcohol beverage made from fermented mare’s milk. It has a slightly sour and sweet taste with a hint of alcohol. This traditional Mongolian drink is often seen at feasts and is believed to have digestive and health benefits.

title: Yogurt Inner Mongolian yogurt is well-known for its rich and creamy texture
content: Yogurt Inner Mongolian yogurt is well-known for its rich and creamy texture, with a natural milky flavor. Unlike most industrially produced yogurts available on the market, Hohhot's yogurt tends to be thicker, and it’s often served with honey, sugar, or fruit jam for added flavor.

title: Milk Skin Tea Milk skin is made from boiled cow or sheep's milk
content: Milk Skin Tea Milk skin is made from boiled cow or sheep's milk, and it is often consumed with tea. This tea has a rich, milky taste and is a distinctive beverage in the Inner Mongolia region.

title: Mongolian Butter Tea Similar to milk tea
content: Mongolian Butter Tea Similar to milk tea, this drink includes butter and salt, resulting in a richer, more nutritious flavor. Butter tea is commonly enjoyed during the colder months, as it warms the body and provides energy.

title: 40.83588 111.66301 1 Lemongo Youth Hostel
content: 40.83588 111.66301 1 Lemongo Youth Hostel , 228 Hailar Rd, Xincheng District ( Near Inner Mongolia University of Technology ). The best youth hostel in town. The hostel would be an outstanding backpackers anywhere in the world. The dorm rooms are very clean, lots of space between beds, and spacious, well furnished common areas. Dorms ¥50 . ( updated Oct 2020 )

title: Inner Mongolia Jin Jiang International Hotel
content: Inner Mongolia Jin Jiang International Hotel , 119 Hulun South Road, Saihan District , ☏ +86 21 61226688 ext 7800 . This five-star hotel in Hohhot brings guests to a new level of luxury, offering almost 1000 rooms with relaxing amenities, event venues and catering services, and recreational facilities. Its website accepts online reservations.

title: 36.036296 103.824887 2 Five-Spring Mountain ( Wuquanshan Gongyuan )
content: 36.036296 103.824887 2 Five-Spring Mountain ( Wuquanshan Gongyuan ). (五泉山) A jumble of a poor amusement park and some renovated temples.

title: 36.066596 103.798953 4 Sculptures of the Mother River ( 黄河母亲像 )
content: 36.066596 103.798953 4 Sculptures of the Mother River ( 黄河母亲像 ), Lanzhou City Qilihe District South Binhe middle Road(兰州市七里河区南滨河中路) . Gansu sculpture by the famous sculptor He E creation, 6 meters long, 2.2 meters wide, 2.6 meters tall, weighing 40 tons, from "mother" and a "baby" of composition.

title: 36.079095 103.86745 6 Gansu Sanmu Bicycle Museum ( 甘肃三木自行车博物馆 )
content: 36.079095 103.86745 6 Gansu Sanmu Bicycle Museum ( 甘肃三木自行车博物馆 ), 1 Nanbinhe East Road, Chengguan District (城关区南滨河东路1号) ( take bus no. 36 ), ☏ +86 931 8260085 , 3840575998@qq.com . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays . A privately owned museum with a large collection of old bicycles from all over the world. Free . ( updated Sep 2024 )

title: 36.06315 103.845795 8 Waterwheel Garden , Nanbinhe Dong Lu
content: 36.06315 103.845795 8 Waterwheel Garden , Nanbinhe Dong Lu . (水车博览园) Small park along the Yellow River housing impressive traditional waterwheels, originally used to irrigate farmland around Lanzhou. Free . ( updated May 2018 )

title: 36.025425 103.839113 9 Gaolan Mountain ( 皋兰山 )
content: 36.025425 103.839113 9 Gaolan Mountain ( 皋兰山 ). Cool place to be when the summer heat kicks in.

title: 36.063484 103.801498 11 Xiaoxihu Park ( 小西湖公园 )
content: 36.063484 103.801498 11 Xiaoxihu Park ( 小西湖公园 ). Metro Line 1 Xiaoxihu Stn. A small park, supposedly to be a (poor) replica of the Xihu (West Lake) in Hangzhou. Free .

title: Walk across the Zhongshan Bridge for the night lights
content: Walk across the Zhongshan Bridge for the night lights, people and the immense Yellow river.

title: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafei Ting ), Zhongshan Road ( Opposite Shengli Binguan )
content: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafei Ting ), Zhongshan Road ( Opposite Shengli Binguan ). For when you need a Western food break that's consistent wherever you are.

title: Lanshan Hotel ( Lanshan Binguan ) ( Opposite the train station )
content: Lanshan Hotel ( Lanshan Binguan ) ( Opposite the train station ). Pleasant enough rooms at decent prices. The fire escapes are locked. There is a public internet cafe in an adjoining building (ask at reception). Listed rates for doubles with en-suite ¥138 (can be bargained), double without bathroom ¥56 (summer 2006) .

title: 36.051148 103.854202 7 Jinjiang Sun Hotel ( 锦江阳光酒店 )
content: 36.051148 103.854202 7 Jinjiang Sun Hotel ( 锦江阳光酒店 ), 589 Donggang West Road, Chengguan District . A 4-star hotel business hotel. It has 236 guestrooms, meeting venues, business centre, restaurants, sauna and health club. Online reservation is accepted.

title: 36.630306 101.754153 2 Qinghai Provincial Museum ( 青海省博物馆 )
content: 36.630306 101.754153 2 Qinghai Provincial Museum ( 青海省博物馆 ), 58 Xiguan Street, Chengxi District (城西区西关大街58号) ( the nearest bus stop is Xining Square South (新宁广场南), which is served by bus routes 12, 18, 22, 29, 35, 38, 41, 102 and 506. The museum entrance is on the West side of the building. ), ☏ +86 971 6118691 . Summer: 09:00-17:00, Winter: 09:30-16:30, no tickets issued in last 30 minutes of operation, closed on Mondays . Nice place to learn about Qinghai's history and ethnic relationships. Covers the history of Silk Road on the Qinghai region. Some English text available. Exhibition nicely arranged from Room 1 to 5, although you need to pay a bit of attention of the flow inside the Hall. Audio guide available for ¥20. Free . ( updated Aug 2024 )

title: 36.646904 101.71173 3 Qinghai Science and Technology Museum ( 青海省科学技术馆 )
content: 36.646904 101.71173 3 Qinghai Science and Technology Museum ( 青海省科学技术馆 ), 74 Wu Si West Road, Chengxi District (城西区五四西路74号) ( bus routes 51, 59 and 63 ), ☏ +86 971 8083724 . 09:30-16:30, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: 36.687506 101.748365 5 Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Natural History Museum ( 青藏高原自然博物馆 )
content: 36.687506 101.748365 5 Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Natural History Museum ( 青藏高原自然博物馆 ), 21 JIng'er Road, Biological Science & Technology Park, Chengbei District (城北区生物科技产业园区经二路21号) ( across the road from the Qinghai Tibetan Culture Museum; bus routes 46, 65, 72, and 504 ), ☏ +86 971 5226789 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30 . As the name implies, this museum focuses on the natural history of the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau. It is said to be one of the largest natural history museums in China. You can learn about the origin of 3 big rivers from this region, as well as flora and fauna. Exhibition halls on two floors. Can be explored in 2h. ¥60 . ( updated Aug 2024 )

title: 36.650949 101.753843 6 Xining Museum ( 西宁市博物馆 )
content: 36.650949 101.753843 6 Xining Museum ( 西宁市博物馆 ), 7-111 Xiaoqiao Street, Menyuan Road, Chengbei District (城北区门源路小桥大街111-7号) ( bus no. 65, 651 (urban tourist route 2), and Chengbei Tourist Bus 2 ), ☏ +86 971 6361550 . 09:00-21:00, no entry after 20:30, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Jul 2024 )

title: 36.932358 101.699725 7 Laoye Mountain ( 老爷山 )
content: 36.932358 101.699725 7 Laoye Mountain ( 老爷山 ), Xiangyang Road South, Qiaotou Town, Datong County (大通县桥头镇向阳路南) ( Buses to Datong County depart from the Xinning Road Bus Station. The park entrance is less than a kilometre from the Datong County Bus Station ), ☏ +86 971 2722131 , +86 971 2720166 . April 16th to October 15th: 08:00-17:30. October 16th to April 15th: 08:00-17:00 . ¥20 .

title: 36.627229 101.730924 8 Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Wildlife Park ( 青藏高原野生动物园 )
content: 36.627229 101.730924 8 Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Wildlife Park ( 青藏高原野生动物园 ), 9 Xingzhi Road, Chengxi District (城西区行知路9号) ( Bus routes 14, k2 and Tourist Bus 1 ), ☏ +86 971 6307290 , +86 971 6146648 , +86 971 4313100 . 08:30-18:00 . General entry is ¥30. Children between 1.2 and 1.4 metres in height pay ¥15. Children under 1.2 metres in height and persons over 65 can get in free. There is an extra charge of ¥50 to visit the aquarium. The panda house charges ¥23 . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: XiNanGuanJie Market , XinNanGuanJie ( Just outside Dongguan Mosque )
content: XiNanGuanJie Market , XinNanGuanJie ( Just outside Dongguan Mosque ). 6am to whenever . lively street market outside Dongguan Mosque. You can get tea, street food, fruits, bread, and other Muslim (Hui) delicacies here. ( updated Aug 2024 )

title: KFC ( 肯德基 ), Near the Wangfujing Shopping Mall, Xi Dajie , ☏ +86 971-8227987
content: KFC ( 肯德基 ), Near the Wangfujing Shopping Mall, Xi Dajie , ☏ +86 971-8227987 . 6AM-10PM . There are a few KFCs in the city, but this is by far the most centrally located. ( updated Aug 2024 )

title: Green House Cafe , Xiadu Avenue, Near Yangshan Villas , ☏ +86 971-8202710
content: Green House Cafe , Xiadu Avenue, Near Yangshan Villas , ☏ +86 971-8202710 . Great little cafe opened up by an American expat in Xining. Relaxed atmosphere, good Wi-Fi, and, some say, the best coffee in the city. They have desserts and sandwiches as well.

title: Qilin Bay Bar Strip ( Qilin Wan ), Intersection of Kunlun West and Huanghe Road
content: Qilin Bay Bar Strip ( Qilin Wan ), Intersection of Kunlun West and Huanghe Road . A complex of bars by the riverside, built around an atrium. They cannot be seen from down the road, but just below the bridge you should see a number of cars parked, with steps down into the park. You will see several small bars.

title: Soho ( 苏荷酒吧 ), 116 Nanguan Street ( West Side of Xining Stadium ), ☏ +86 971-8252991
content: Soho ( 苏荷酒吧 ), 116 Nanguan Street ( West Side of Xining Stadium ), ☏ +86 971-8252991 . 9PM-late . Soho is Xining's most popular nightclub, usually busy past 2AM most nights. Lots of tables and a bar, but there is no dancing. Music is mostly live. Soho is a nightclub franchise in China, but this one apparently is an "unofficial club."

title: No. 88 Bar ( 88号酒吧 )
content: No. 88 Bar ( 88号酒吧 ), 7-1 Road, Across from the TCM Hospital ( 七一路中医院斜对面 ). Similar to Soho bar, but a larger dance floor. Crowded on the weekends, but a bigger crowd at Soho.

title: Qinghai Shuili Hotel ( 青海省水利宾馆; Qīnghǎishěng Shuǐlì Bīnguǎn )
content: Qinghai Shuili Hotel ( 青海省水利宾馆; Qīnghǎishěng Shuǐlì Bīnguǎn ), 18-8 Kunlun Road, Chengxi District (城西区昆仑路18-8号; Chéngxīqū Kūnlúnlù . Listed rates for doubles from ¥168, discounted from ¥128, no breakfast .

title: Home Inn (Xining Central Square) ( 如家快捷酒店 (西宁中心广场店); Rújiākuàijiéjiǔdiàn (Xīníngzhōngxīngu
content: Home Inn (Xining Central Square) ( 如家快捷酒店 (西宁中心广场店); Rújiākuàijiéjiǔdiàn (Xīníngzhōngxīnguǎngchǎngdiàn) ), Near west building of Ximen Gym, Chengzhong District (城中区西门体育馆西附楼; Chéngzhōngqū Xīméntǐyùguǎnxīfùlóu) . Doubles from ¥199 .

title: Mercure Hotel ( 以勒美居酒店 ), 354 7-1 Road
content: Mercure Hotel ( 以勒美居酒店 ), 354 7-1 Road . Comfortable rooms, centrally located. From ¥300 for twin room . ( updated Oct 2020 )

title: Qinghai Hotel ( 青海宾馆 ), No.158 Huanghe Road , ☏ +86 971-6148999
content: Qinghai Hotel ( 青海宾馆 ), No.158 Huanghe Road , ☏ +86 971-6148999 . Rooms are spacious and clean. Good facilities and restaurants. A cheaper alternative to the Yinlong Hotel. ¥500-2,000 .

title: 38.49098 106.27719 2 Haibao Pagoda ( 海宝塔
content: 38.49098 106.27719 2 Haibao Pagoda ( 海宝塔, 北塔, North Pagoda ), Minzu Street North, Xingqing District (兴庆区民族北街路) ( in the north of the Old Town; bus routes 4, 30, 58 and 311 ), ☏ +86 951-5038042 . 09:00-17:00, from 07:30 on the 1st and 15th of the month . Part of the Haibao Pagoda Temple (海宝塔寺). The pagoda has a murky history but is believed to have been built in the 5th century during the reign of Emperor Wulie of Xia. It was rebuilt twice during the 18th century due to damage caused by earthquakes. ¥10 .

title: 38.435035 105.987167 3 Xixia Wangling National Park ( 西夏王陵国家公园
content: 38.435035 105.987167 3 Xixia Wangling National Park ( 西夏王陵国家公园, Xīxià Wánglíng Guójiā Gōngyuán ) ( buses leave Xinyue tourist bus terminal around 08:00-09:00, pass near Yinchuan Station about 30-40 minutes later (on Beijing Road), and arrive about half an hour after that; tThey return around 13:00-14:00; ¥8 each way ). Western Xia Tombs. There are 193 tombs of high officials of the Xia Kingdom, with the three largest (5 km apart) highlighted. ¥75, plus ¥20 for the park shuttle bus. The tourist bus conductor can sell you tickets for ¥85. .

title: 38.485166 106.235146 7 Ningxia Museum ( 宁夏博物馆 )
content: 38.485166 106.235146 7 Ningxia Museum ( 宁夏博物馆 ), 6 People's Square Street East, Jinfeng District (金凤区人民广场东街6号) ( Bus routes 1, 2, 33, 38, 301 and 509 ), ☏ +86 951 5085093 , nxbwg@163.com . Tu-Su 09:00-16:50, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Jul 2017 )

title: 38.487472 106.222041 8 Ningxia Museum of Science and Technology ( 宁夏科技馆 )
content: 38.487472 106.222041 8 Ningxia Museum of Science and Technology ( 宁夏科技馆 ), Intersection of Renmin Square Street West and Shanghai Street West, Jinfeng District (金凤区人民广场西街与上海西路交叉口) ( Bus routes 1, 2, 13, 33, 38, 301 and 509 ), ☏ +86 951 5085123 , ningxiakjguan@163.com . W-Su 09ː00-17ː00, no tickets sold after 16ː00, closed on Mondays and Tuesdays . ¥25 . ( updated Dec 2018 )

title: 38.388973 106.371593 9 Mingcui Lake National Wetland Park ( 鸣翠湖国家湿地公园 )
content: 38.388973 106.371593 9 Mingcui Lake National Wetland Park ( 鸣翠湖国家湿地公园 ), Zhangzheng Town, Xingqing District (兴庆区掌政镇) ( take bus no. 601 (branch route) from outside the Yinchuan Bus Station ), ☏ +86 951 6121966 (enquiries), +86 951 6121959 (ticket sales) , mingcuihu966@163.com . 08:00-18:00 (April to October), 09:00-17:00 (November to March) . ¥40 (entry ticket only), ¥68 (entry ticket plus ticket for sightseeing cart) . ( updated Jan 2021 ) The 108 stupas at Qingtongxia

title: 38.02094 106.06909 10 108 Dagobas (stupas)
content: 38.02094 106.06909 10 108 Dagobas (stupas) , Qingtongxia (青铜峡; Qīngtóngxiá ) ( 80 km south of Yinchuan, it can be reached by bus ). Ranging in height from 2.5 to 3.5 meters, fashioned in three shapes (pyramid, gourd and vase), and arranged on a rising mountain slope in rows of increasing odd numbers to for a colossal triangle. Overlooks the Yellow River.

title: The city
content: The city . The best thing in Yinchuan is the people and the Hui neighbourhoods, so the best option is just to take a bus in any direction and getting down in a street market or in a park. It is also recommended to go to the main square in the night where there are dances and games.

title: Hiking
content: Hiking . Aside from the trails mentioned above under Helanshan Suyukou, other parts of the mountain offer hiking. In principle, there is a trail from Suyukou to the rock art area, although it is still closed due to flood damage as of fall 2018. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: Napoli Italian Cuisine
content: Napoli Italian Cuisine . A curious blend of western dishes and Chinese ingredients. Though it is well marketed the food in Napoli generally does not appeal to foreigners. If you are looking for something to remind you of home, you are better off finding an alternative.

title: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafeiting ), 84 Zhongshan North Street , ☏ +86 13895316985
content: UBC Coffee House ( Shangdao Kafeiting ), 84 Zhongshan North Street , ☏ +86 13895316985 . For when you need a Western food break.

title: Fall in Love Bar & Marry Bar , Hubin East Street ( near all the main hotels )
content: Fall in Love Bar & Marry Bar , Hubin East Street ( near all the main hotels ). Comfortable seating and a younger crowd, you can sit back with any of the local beers and relax.

title: The King Divine Luck Club ( Kadilong )
content: The King Divine Luck Club ( Kadilong ). Popular club featuring dancers and a very impressive layout. Booths and box seats have a higher minimum purchase .

title: Baby Face
content: Baby Face . Popular club featuring dancers and a very impressive layout. Booths and box seats have a higher minimum purchase .

title: Come Back
content: Come Back . Although traditional western coffee is hard to come by, this drink chain (which can be found almost everywhere in Yinchuan) sells their version of a coffee drink that can be served hot or cold. While it is still not western style coffee, it is quite good, somewhat similar to Starbucks' caramel macchiato.

title: Bob and Leo's BBQ , beijing luo ( 新城大众巷10号（新城电影院东侧的巷子向北100米）胖哥俩烤吧 ), ☏ +86 13639519646
content: Bob and Leo's BBQ , beijing luo ( 新城大众巷10号（新城电影院东侧的巷子向北100米）胖哥俩烤吧 ), ☏ +86 13639519646 . 17:00-01:00? . Bob and Leo (chubby and happy twins) have some of the best BBQ chicken in Yinchuan, if not China. They both speak English and are extremely friendly. It is an outdoor grill with great selections of mutton and fish as well as a selection of vegetables. Cheap beers and the occasional expat make it a must-visit. Open late or until you stop buying beers. inexpensive .

title: HelanShan Hotel Yinchuan
content: HelanShan Hotel Yinchuan , 1 Shoufang Road, Xinshi District , ☏ +86 951 2077301 , fax +86 951 2077075 .

title: Ningxia Hotel
content: Ningxia Hotel , 3 Park Street , ☏ +86 951 5045131 , fax +86 951 5044338 .

title: Kempinski Hotel Yinchuan
content: Kempinski Hotel Yinchuan , 160 Beijing Middle Rd, Jinfeng District , ☏ +86 951 516 5888 .

title: 43.808072 87.605837 3 Red Mountain Park ( Hongshan Park
content: 43.808072 87.605837 3 Red Mountain Park ( Hongshan Park, 红山公园 ), 40 Bei Yi Lane, Hongshan Road, Shuimogou District (水磨沟区红山路北一巷40号) ( Bus routes 7, 14, 17, 52, 68, 157, 301, 311, 537, 907, 910, 917, brt1, brt2, brt4, and brt71 ), ☏ +86 991 8855671 . April to October: 07:00-23:00; November to March: 08:30-21:00 . This pleasant park has, among other things, a Ferris wheel, a Buddhist temple and great views over the city. The park has a free entrance but you have to pay for some of the attractions. Free . ( updated Sep 2022 )

title: 43.79343 87.601251 4 People's Park ( 人民公园 )
content: 43.79343 87.601251 4 People's Park ( 人民公园 ), 3 Youhao Road South, Shayibake District (沙依巴克区友好南路3号) ( take bus no. 8, 44, 58, 308, 903 or 912 and get off at the West Park (西公园) bus stop, which is just outside the park's south gate ), ☏ +86 991-5849434 . 08:30-21:30 . A wonderful place for people watching. Busy at all times of day but particularly in the early mornings and evenings, with people making music, singing, dancing, playing games, exercising, doing tai chi, practicing calligraphy, in fact pretty much any recreational activity. Not to be confused with People's Park in Midong District. Free .

title: 43.79393 87.621635 5 People's Square ( 人民广场 )
content: 43.79393 87.621635 5 People's Square ( 人民广场 ), Zhongshan Road, Tianshan District (天山区中山路) ( Bus routes 17 30, 36, 104, 501, 903, 907, 908, 920, 931 brt3, and brt71 ). A big square in the middle of town with an army monument in the middle.

title: 43.819534 87.583969 6 Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region Museum ( 新疆维吾尔自治区博物馆 )
content: 43.819534 87.583969 6 Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region Museum ( 新疆维吾尔自治区博物馆 ), 581 Xibei Road, Shayibake District (沙依巴克区西北路581号) ( Bus routes 7, 51, 68, 303, 305, 311, 518, 532, 906, 910, 912, 5201 and brt4 ), ☏ +86 991 4552826 . April 15th to October 15: 10:00-18:00; October 16th to April 14th: 10:30-18:00; no entry after 16:30; closed on Mondays . Highlights include a few mummies on display and other artifacts. If you start your trip around Xinjiang, the museum gives you a very good introduction about the history and minorities. Free . ( updated May 2018 )

title: Shuimogou Park ( 水磨沟公园 )
content: Shuimogou Park ( 水磨沟公园 ), 472 Shuimogou Road, Shuimogou District (磨沟区水磨沟路472号) ( Bus routes 8 and 801 ), ☏ +86 991 4684055 , shuimogoupark@hotmail.com . 07:30-21:30 . Free . ( updated May 2018 )

title: Confucian Temple , Qianjin Lu
content: Confucian Temple , Qianjin Lu. . A beautiful, quiet and peaceful temple. To find it follow the red wall alongside the Autonomous Regional Party Committee building north from People's Square. Take the first turn to the right and follow the road east to the end where you will find the temple. It closes at 13:00 for lunch.

title: Bodun (博盾) , 42 Heping Rd N ( 5 min S of People's Sq )
content: Bodun (博盾) , 42 Heping Rd N ( 5 min S of People's Sq ). Delicious and cheap Uyghur staples. Good location in the city center.

title: 43.762164 87.62679 1 Dumpling House ( from Rendezvous on 960 Yan'an Rd
content: 43.762164 87.62679 1 Dumpling House ( from Rendezvous on 960 Yan'an Rd, walk back towards the city. Take the first left (a small side street) and walk 250m. You should see the dumplings being prepared ), ☏ +86 13899968044 . For an authentic local experience, just around the corner from the Rendezvous cafe, try here. They serve a form of fried, then steamed dumplings that are very popular with the local crowd, accompanied by a hot bowl of butter milk tea. ¥1-4 .

title: 43.760857 87.629128 2 Rendezvous
content: 43.760857 87.629128 2 Rendezvous , 960 Yan'an Rd ( right by the Silk Road Hotel, on the 16, 63,106 and 912 bus routes ), ☏ +86 991 255-5003 . 11:00-22:00 . American-run. Also offers an excellent breakfast menu on the weekends, and their wraps are quite delicious. Try the Enchilada if you are hungry or the Burgers. They also have a great range of cakes, some say the best chocolate cake in Urumqi. For the money, the best and cheapest Western food in Urumqi. ¥20–50 .

title: 43.788455 87.613107 4 The Texas Cafe ( 德州咖啡屋 )
content: 43.788455 87.613107 4 The Texas Cafe ( 德州咖啡屋 ), Nanmen Mashixiaoqu ( near Nanmen down the grapevine covered alley across from the south entrance to the computer market ), ☏ +86 991 281-0025 , texascafecn@gmail.com . 13:00-23:00 . A Tex-Mex and classic American café. For comfort food try their fajita plates or tacos. They've got refried beans and homemade taco shells. The place is decorated with a lot of Texas memorabilia and it's somewhat of an Tex-Mex oasis there in Xinjiang. Also, they have a good selection of English books. ¥25-55 .

title: Vine Coffeehouse ( 德蔓咖啡屋 )
content: Vine Coffeehouse ( 德蔓咖啡屋 ), 65 Minzhu Rd ( Down a small street near the People's Theater (人民电影院, Rénmín Diànyǐngyuàn) ), ☏ +86 991 230-4831 . Tu-Su . A Caribbean cafe serving a wide array of western and Caribbean specialty dishes. Somewhat overpriced with small portions, but the little steaks are nice.

title: Edo No Sakura , 65 Guangming Rd ( On 1F of brightly colored high rise near Hongshan Park )
content: Edo No Sakura , 65 Guangming Rd ( On 1F of brightly colored high rise near Hongshan Park ). For those intrigued by the prospect of eating sushi in the city furthest from an ocean. It is a bit pricey as can be expected. Next door is also a Brazilian barbecue restaurant, Sabbath.

title: Almaly Club ( 苹果之父 )
content: Almaly Club ( 苹果之父 ), 38 Renmin Rd (F5, Xinhongxin Mansion, 新宏信大厦5楼) ( On Renmin Rd right before the highway overpass ), ☏ +86 991-2334189 . This Kazakh themed restaurant and club serves a wide variety of Kazakh and Russian dishes. After 22:00 Beijing time there is live music and dancing (but also a minimum expense of ¥200 per party).

title: Baolu International Youth Hostel
content: Baolu International Youth Hostel , Kashi West Road 652, crossroad with Shenzhen Street (Complete address in CN: 乌鲁木齐市区新市区喀什西路652号,与深圳街交汇处) , ☏ +86 991 3737367 . Dorms: bed ¥34 Double with private bath ¥98. .

title: Southern Pearl International Hotel ( 南航明珠国际酒店 ), 576 Youhao Rd S
content: Southern Pearl International Hotel ( 南航明珠国际酒店 ), 576 Youhao Rd S . 5-star foreign hotel. Affordable nearby parking & public transport. ( updated Aug 2018 )

title: Hoi Tak Hotel ( 海德宾馆 ), 219 Jiankang Rd ( corner of Dongfeng St ), ☏ +86 991 232 2828
content: Hoi Tak Hotel ( 海德宾馆 ), 219 Jiankang Rd ( corner of Dongfeng St ), ☏ +86 991 232 2828 . Modern 5-star hotel. Broadband internet access, and satellite TV. ( updated Aug 2018 )

title: Sheraton Hotel ( 喜来登酒店 )
content: Sheraton Hotel ( 喜来登酒店 ), 669 Youhao Rd N ( 200 m south of Kelamayi East flyover ), ☏ +86 991 699 9999 . Five star high-rise hotel north of the city center. 2 restaurants & pool. Broadband internet access and satellite tv. Luxurious shopping next door too. ( updated Aug 2018 )

title: Taxis
content: Taxis cost ¥10 for anywhere in Lhasa city. Hail them from the side of the street. Be prepared for taxi-sharing - the driver will often pull over if he suspects he can find other passengers heading in the same direction. Each will pay ¥10 and this is a way for the driver to make a better income despite the standard fare. It is possible to use Didi and other Chinese ridesharing apps.

title: Public buses
content: Public buses are numerous and cost ¥1. Non-Chinese nationals are permitted to travel on the buses within the city, although you make yourself an attraction by doing so, since this rarely occurs. The number of the bus is recognizable but the destination is in Chinese, so you need to know which bus line you need.

title: Minibuses
content: Minibuses operate to areas such as Norbulingka, Sera Monastery, Drepung Monastery, and other nearby sites. Most of these are also on public bus lines.

title: "Pilgrim buses"
content: "Pilgrim buses" are available in front of Jokhang Temple or at the parking lot near the temple, departing at 06:00-07:00 for destinations outside Lhasa, such as Tsurphu Gompa, Ganden Gompa, Nyemo (Dazi), Phenpo Lhundrub (Linzhou), Meldro Gungkar (Mozhugongka), Chushul (Qushui), Taktse (Dazi), Gongkar (Gongga), and other nearby areas. Tickets are available at the ticket office at the parking lot or when you board the bus. Whether or not non-Chinese nationals can travel on these is a bit of a grey area. Since you have to have a travel guide with you anyway as a non-Chinese tourist, you can ask them to enquire about this, since it is a more interesting way to travel than always in a private Land Cruiser. However, the rules for organising tourist tours require advance planning, so you probably won't have this chance.

title: Cycle rickshaws
content: Cycle rickshaws are less frequent than before and hard to find.

title: Bicycle
content: Bicycle hire is available from some hotels or cycle shops and it's a good way to explore if you have half a day free on your tour schedule. Pollution is not as bad as in many Chinese cities but driving habits are. The best tactic is to stick close to a local cyclist or cycle rickshaw when negotiating busy junctions.

title: 29.65133 91.09687 2 Tibet Museum ( 西藏博物馆 )
content: 29.65133 91.09687 2 Tibet Museum ( 西藏博物馆 ), 19 Luobu Linka Rd, Chengguan District (城关区罗布林卡路19号) ( bus routes 2, 8, 13 and 24 ), ☏ +86 891 6835244 , +86 891 6812210 . 10:00-17:30, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays . Elaborate museum with artifacts reflecting the entire history of Tibet. Ask for a free audio tour in your language at the entrance. The museum presents a very Chinese view of the "Peaceful Liberation" of Tibet, but the museum is worth a visit. General admission is free. A fee may be charged for special exhibitions .

title: 29.650111 91.180609 3 Tibet Museum of Natural Science ( 西藏自然科学博物馆 )
content: 29.650111 91.180609 3 Tibet Museum of Natural Science ( 西藏自然科学博物馆 ), 9 Zangda East Road, Chengguan District (城关区藏大东路9号) ( opposite Tibet University's Najin Campus; bus routes 8 and 34 ), ☏ +86 891 6839900 . 10:00-17:30 (April 15th to October 31st), 10:30-17:00 (November 1st to April 14th) . Tibet's largest museum. The museum is of course primarily devoted to the natural history of Tibet. It also includes the Memorial to the Liberation of a Million Serfs in Tibet (西藏百万农奴解放纪念馆), which has exhibitions on the Communist Party's policies in Tibet since the 1950s. Visitor numbers are capped at 5000 per day. Free . ( updated Jan 2021 )

title: 29.62179 91.08869 4 The Yak Museum of Tibet ( 西藏牦牛博物馆 )
content: 29.62179 91.08869 4 The Yak Museum of Tibet ( 西藏牦牛博物馆 ), 6 Chagu Avenue, Liuwu New Area, Doilungdêqên District 堆龙德庆区柳梧新区察古大道6号 ( take bus no. 6 and get off at the Culture & Sports Centre (文体中心) ), ☏ +86 891 58572263 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays . A museum about yaks and their importance to Tibetan culture. Entry is restricted to 2000 visitors per day. Free . ( updated Sep 2018 )

title: 29.653889 91.091667 6 Norbulingka Summer Palace
content: 29.653889 91.091667 6 Norbulingka Summer Palace . It is about 1 km south of the Potala Palace - the Seventh Dalai Lama constructed the first summer palace in 1755 and each successive ruler added his own buildings. The complex contains a small zoo, botanical gardens, and a mansion from the 14th Dalai Lhama built in 1956~8. This was the place that the 14th Dalai Lama escaped from in 1959, and left for India. There is a sign outside the building that marks the mansion but it is not marked elsewhere in the park. You can only enter it from its east entrance and is the last stop on the recommended route in the park. ¥50 .

title: 29.676389 91.0475 8 Drepung Monastery
content: 29.676389 91.0475 8 Drepung Monastery . Founded in 1416 by a disciple of Tsong Khapa, was the biggest and richest monastery in Tibet and its lamas helped to train each new young Dalai Lama. Drepung was also home to the Nechung, the state oracle. At its height, Drepung had over 10,000 monks, and governed 700 subsidiary monasteries and owned vast estates. Drepung belongs to the Gelupa sect.

title: 29.758 91.475 9 Ganden Monastery
content: 29.758 91.475 9 Ganden Monastery . Located on Wangbur Mountain, 47 km (29 miles) from Lhasa City. It was built in 15th century with over 50 structures. The main halls in the temple are the Main Assembly Hall (or Coqen Hall), Zhacangs, Khangtsens and Myicuns.

title: Langma Opera
content: Langma Opera . literally "royal music", a traditional Tibetan singing and dancing show.

title: Blind Massage
content: Blind Massage , #59 Beijing Middle Road, 3rd floor ( at Medical Massage Clinic Lhasa, directly across from the Kichu Hotel ), ☏ +86 891 6320870 . ¥80/hour . English spoken. A vocational project of Braille Without Borders . Great way to adjust to the altitude or to relax.

title: 29.62482 91.1457 1 Princess Wencheng Live Action Drama ( 《文成公主》实景剧 )
content: 29.62482 91.1457 1 Princess Wencheng Live Action Drama ( 《文成公主》实景剧 ), Princess Wencheng Live Action Drama Theatre, Tibetan Culture & Tourism Creativity Park, Cijuelin Village, Chengguan District (城关区慈觉林村中国西藏文化旅游创意园文成公主实景剧场) ( Bus no. 5 ), ☏ +86 891 6875555 , booking@wcgz.com . 20:30-22:00 . A large-scale musical based on the life of Princess Wencheng. Features almost 1000 performers. Ticket prices range from ¥380 to ¥1280 . ( updated Sep 2018 )

title: Mayke Ame
content: Mayke Ame , (Maji A'mi) on the corner of the Barkhor Street, is a popular enchanting bar/restaurant popular with backpackers. It also features a convenient internet bar. The name means 'beautiful woman'. Sitting at this second-floor restaurant gives you an amazing view, especially at sunset, of the part of the Barkhor Street which is full of pilgrams moving in clockwise direction. The location of Makye Ame is unbeatable, but the food is nothing to write home about.

title: Lhasa Kitchen
content: Lhasa Kitchen is popular among tourists due to its extensive menu and central location

title: Snowland Restaurant
content: Snowland Restaurant Tenjieling Road #4, near Jokhang Square, phone +86 891-6337323 Large menu features a mix of Western, Napali, Indian and Tibetan food. Good service, good food, very popular.

title: New Mandala Restaurant
content: New Mandala Restaurant with roof top Garden, located in front of Jokhang Temple, phone +86 891-6342235. Indian, Nepali, Tibetan and some Western dishes. Roof top has good views of the city. Try the yak sizzler.

title: Tengyelink Cafe
content: Tengyelink Cafe has great yak steak, the best food in Lhasa, and a great atmosphere. Cheap breakfast options are available.

title: Oxygen
content: Oxygen in the Four Points Sheraton on Lin Kuo East is a good choice for those homesick after weeks of Chinese food. Good steak.

title: Travelers Bar , East Beijing Road
content: Travelers Bar , East Beijing Road . A backpackers' favorite.

title: Low House Music Bar
content: Low House Music Bar features music of India, Nepal and Tibetan traditional music. Located in the house of the family of the 11th Dalai Lama

title: Dunya Restaurant, Bar and Balcony
content: Dunya Restaurant, Bar and Balcony owned by 2 foreign women, pleasant atmosphere

title: Gang La Mei Duo
content: Gang La Mei Duo Canvas and watercolor paintings in Tibetan theme hanging all around the wall for sale.

title: Himalaya Hotel
content: Himalaya Hotel , 6 East Linguo Road, Lhasa , ☏ +86 891 6331300 , fax +86 891 6334855 .

title: Shambhala Palace Hotel , ☏ +86 891 630 7779
content: Shambhala Palace Hotel , ☏ +86 891 630 7779 . Wifi and breakfast availability. Very decorated interior with stone and wood and Tibetan curios. Even though it's close to Jokhang Temple, finding the hotel may require contacting the staff since it's not very easy to locate. ( updated Sep 2020 )

title: Tibet International Grand Hotel
content: Tibet International Grand Hotel , 1 National South Road, Lhasa , ☏ +86 891 6832888 , fax +86 891 6820888 .

title: Green, blue or orange taxis
content: Green, blue or orange taxis These taxis are metered and start at ¥8 (November 2015).

title: Black taxis
content: Black taxis Black taxis are also properly signed and metered and are usually a more comfortable and newer car. The fare for these taxis starts at ¥9.

title: Unmarked taxis
content: Unmarked taxis There are other unmarked cars (usually black Santanas) that may offer to give you a ride. You often see these kind of illegal taxis around the railway station, airport, or in the outskirts. These are unmetered and the price is negotiated beforehand. The fare will always be higher than usual. If you don't know Hefei well, the fare will be significantly higher. There is also the risk of taking a car that is not insured to carry you and having an unidentifiable driver. Saying that, there are times when legit taxis are very scarce, and if you really need to be somewhere, it might be an option.

title: 31.8714 117.2895 2 Xiaoyaojin Park ( 逍遥津公园 Xiāoyáo jīn gōngyuán )
content: 31.8714 117.2895 2 Xiaoyaojin Park ( 逍遥津公园 Xiāoyáo jīn gōngyuán ), 寿春路16号 Shòu chūn lù 16 hào . Many amusement rides and duckboats for hire. Gets very crowded on weekends and holidays.

title: 31.8716 117.2682 3 Xinghua Park ( 合肥杏花公园 Xìng huā gōngyuán ), 庐阳区淮河西路482号 Huáihé xī lù
content: 31.8716 117.2682 3 Xinghua Park ( 合肥杏花公园 Xìng huā gōngyuán ), 庐阳区淮河西路482号 Huáihé xī lù . Usually less crowded than Xiaoyaojin park. In spring and summer, people fly kites there and practice tai chi early. Has amusement rides and duckboats for hire.

title: 31.857 117.2808 4 Around the city park ( 环城公园 Huán chéng gōngyuán )
content: 31.857 117.2808 4 Around the city park ( 环城公园 Huán chéng gōngyuán ), 庐阳区环城南路29号 Lúyáng qū huán chéng nánlù 29 hào (South Huancheng Road, Luyang District) .

title: 31.89403 117.3101 5 Yaohai Park ( 瑶海公园合肥 Yáohǎi gōngyuán )
content: 31.89403 117.3101 5 Yaohai Park ( 瑶海公园合肥 Yáohǎi gōngyuán ), 瑶海区 Yáohǎi qū (Yaohai district) .

title: 31.9128 117.125 6 .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:no
content: 31.9128 117.125 6 .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Three Kingdoms Ruins Park ( 三国新城遗址公园 Héféi sānguó xīnchéng yízhǐ gōngyuán ), 庐阳区 Luyang district ( Nnrth of the Botanical Gardens and a fair way out; take bus 114 to Botanic Gardens then change to bus 300 ). There are some minor pavilions etc. there, and the trees are very picturesque in Spring. 25 kuai entry .

title: 31.840674 117.170715 7 Dashu mountain ( 大蜀山 Dàshǔ shān ) ( 20 min by taxi or catch any bus
content: 31.840674 117.170715 7 Dashu mountain ( 大蜀山 Dàshǔ shān ) ( 20 min by taxi or catch any bus that goes to the end of Changjiang Road (长江路) or Huangshan Road (黄山路) ). The view across Hefei is great on a clear day and there is a TV tower at the top. It can get crowded on days when the weather is nice. The walk up to the top of the mountain takes about 30 minutes. The Hefei Zoo is near but not much; it's a long walking distance along Wangjiang road.

title: KTV
content: KTV (Karaoke TV) Going to KTV at least once is an essential part of experiencing China. Many of the bigger, flashier places have a larger selection of English songs. Best to go with some Chinese friends/colleagues so you can see how it's done.

title: Ferris wheel at Xinghua park
content: Ferris wheel at Xinghua park Costs ¥10/person and you can get a good birds-eye view. Early in the morning you can also see observe people practising Tai Chi in groups. At other times of the day you might see older people singing traditional songs or playing er'hu or flute in pavilions. In summer, the park is filled with people flying kites.

title: Have a massage
content: Have a massage There are a few well-known places (incl. Laohu massage) along Hupo Ave. in Hǔpò shānzhuāng (琥珀山庄) area. ¥40/hour.

title: Go-Karting
content: Go-Karting at Anhui Fu Bang Racing Club D1 Indoor Go-Karting (安徽馥邦赛车俱乐部D1卡丁车馆 Ānhuī fù bāng sàichē jùlèbù D1 kǎ dīng chē guǎn)新站区铜陵北路与物流大道交叉口馥邦汽车城3栋 New Station area, intersection of Tongling North Rd and Wuliu Ave., Fu Bang Motor City 3.

title: Tian an Bowling Alley
content: Tian an Bowling Alley (合肥天安保龄球馆 Héféi Tiān'ān bǎolíngqiú guǎn) 马鞍山路68号 68 Ma'anshan Rd

title: Drive duck boats
content: Drive duck boats around the lake at Bao Gong park or Xinghua park. Costs about ¥30/half an hour.

title: Li Hongzhang's Combination
content: Li Hongzhang's Combination prepared with fresh water prawn, snails, chicken, sea cucumber, abalone and shark's fin.

title: Clay Pot Fish
content: Clay Pot Fish fresh fish from Changjiang River cooked with ham

title: Pigeon and Mushroom soup
content: Pigeon and Mushroom soup Yellow Mountain fungus, baby pigeon slowly cooked in a clay pot

title: Hupo street food ( 琥珀山庄美食街 Hǔpò shānzhuāng měishí jiē )
content: Hupo street food ( 琥珀山庄美食街 Hǔpò shānzhuāng měishí jiē ). Street is lined with restaurants and vendors selling bbq. Pedestrian street filled with tables. Very cheap. ( updated Aug 2019 )

title: 31.87632 117.27945 1 Li Hongzhang Hotchpotch ( 李鸿章杂烩 ), No
content: 31.87632 117.27945 1 Li Hongzhang Hotchpotch ( 李鸿章杂烩 ), No. 138 Bowang Road, Luyang District, Hefei (合肥市庐阳区博望路138号) ( Located near the intersection of Bowang Road and Wuli Road. ). A local restaurant known for serving a version of Li Hongzhang hotchpotch, a mixed stew with meat and vegetables. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 31.8732 117.26718 2 Qinhuai Restaurant ( 秦淮饭店 ), No
content: 31.8732 117.26718 2 Qinhuai Restaurant ( 秦淮饭店 ), No. 88 Huaihe Road, Luyang District, Hefei (合肥市庐阳区淮河路88号) ( Located on Huaihe Road pedestrian street. ). A restaurant offering Anhui and Chinese regional dishes. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: Soho Bar , 198 Shengli Road
content: Soho Bar , 198 Shengli Road . Top range sports bar located in The Hilton Hotel. Showing live sports on a multitude of widescreen TVs and with its athletic-themed staff, Soho Bar is the best place in town to watch Premier League football, rugby and whichever international sports events you care to imagine. Due to the plethora of TVs available, staff are quite happy to let you take over the remote control to find the game or event of your choice. Draught Tiger beer is chugged out for about ¥45.

title: 31.8731 117.2672 1 CoCo Fresh Tea & Juice (Huaihe Road) ( CoCo都可（淮河路店） )
content: 31.8731 117.2672 1 CoCo Fresh Tea & Juice (Huaihe Road) ( CoCo都可（淮河路店） ), Walking Street, 77 Huaihe Road, Luyang District, Hefei (合肥市庐阳区淮河路77号) ( Located on Huaihe Road Pedestrian Street. ). Chain tea and beverage shop offering milk tea and fruit tea drinks. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 31.85744 117.2719 2 Heytea (Sanxiaokou) ( 喜茶（三孝口店） ), No
content: 31.85744 117.2719 2 Heytea (Sanxiaokou) ( 喜茶（三孝口店） ), No. 28 Sanxiaokou Pedestrian Street, Luyang District, Hefei (合肥市庐阳区三孝口步行街28号) ( Located on Sanxiaokou Pedestrian Street. ). Tea beverage shop offering a variety of tea-based drinks. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 31.8743 117.2804 3 Mixue Ice Cream & Tea (Yuxin & Bayi) ( 蜜雪冰城（育新街八一大道店） )
content: 31.8743 117.2804 3 Mixue Ice Cream & Tea (Yuxin & Bayi) ( 蜜雪冰城（育新街八一大道店） ), Intersection of Yuxin Street and Bayi Avenue, Luyang District, Hefei (合肥市庐阳区育新街与八一大道交叉口) ( Located near the junction of Yuxin Street and Bayi Avenue. ). Chain beverage shop known for tea drinks and soft ice cream. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 31.85788 117.2697 4 Luckin Coffee (Sanxiaokou) ( 瑞幸咖啡（三孝口店） ), No
content: 31.85788 117.2697 4 Luckin Coffee (Sanxiaokou) ( 瑞幸咖啡（三孝口店） ), No. 68 Changjiang Road, Luyang District, Hefei (合肥市庐阳区长江路68号) ( Located near the Sanxiaokou commercial area. ). Coffee chain shop offering brewed coffee and other beverages. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 31.85751 117.3478 5 Tims Coffee (Hefei Binhu) ( Tims咖啡（合肥滨湖店） )
content: 31.85751 117.3478 5 Tims Coffee (Hefei Binhu) ( Tims咖啡（合肥滨湖店） ), Huizhou Avenue, Binhu New District, Hefei (合肥市包河区徽州大道) ( Located along Huizhou Avenue in the Binhu New District area. ). Coffee and beverage shop serving espresso, tea, and related drinks. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: Holiday Inn Hefei
content: Holiday Inn Hefei , 1104 Changjian East Rd , hihfe@mail.hf.ah.cn .

title: River Edge Light Show ( along the Gan River )
content: River Edge Light Show ( along the Gan River ). Daily from about 21:00 to 23:00 . Watch the buildings along the Gan at night for a spectacular light show that runs multiple times every night. Only possible by fiat authority in a place like China, the light-show is created by every sky-scraper along the Gan river being outfitted with LEDs, and they are all centrally synchronized. Go check out the show from Honggutan Side at the Fountain (walk along the water south from BaYi bridge).

title: 28.659167 115.845833 2 The Star of Nanchang ( 南昌之星 )
content: 28.659167 115.845833 2 The Star of Nanchang ( 南昌之星 ). Formerly the world's tallest Ferris wheel (they still say it is), with a height of 160 m.

title: 28.680215 115.874421 3 Jiangxi Provincial Museum ( 江西省博物馆 )
content: 28.680215 115.874421 3 Jiangxi Provincial Museum ( 江西省博物馆 ), 2 Xinzhou Road, Donghu District (东湖区新洲路2号) ( Metro Line 1, Tengwang Pavilion Station, Exit 2 ), ☏ +86 791 86525780 . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . Jiangxi's main museum. A new home for the museum is being constructed on Ganjiang Avenue North (赣江北大道). When the new museum is completed, the old museum site will become the Nanchang City Museum. Free . ( updated May 2018 )

title: 28.1 116.3 4 Nanchang Sunac Park ( 南昌融创乐园 ), No
content: 28.1 116.3 4 Nanchang Sunac Park ( 南昌融创乐园 ), No. 888, Nanlongpan Street, Jiulonghu New District . January 1-September 28: Monday to Friday 10:00-18:00; 29 September-31 December: Monday to Sunday 09:30-21:30. . ( updated Sep 2023 ) .mw-parser-output .pp_infobox{color:#333;background-color:#effafa;font-size:90%;border:1px solid #ccc;padding-left:1em;padding-right:1em;text-align:left;width:100%}@media screen{html.skin-theme-clientpref-night .mw-parser-output .pp_infobox td{color:inherit;background-color:inherit}}@media screen and (prefers-color-scheme:dark){html.skin-theme-clientpref-os .mw-parser-output .pp_infobox td{color:inherit;background-color:inherit}}

title: Crock soup
content: Crock soup . Crock pot soup, also known as folk crock pot soup, is a traditional method of simmering soup and a representative of Jiangxi cuisine. "Lu's Spring and Autumn · Benwei" recorded the true meaning of simmering soup: "Where the essence of taste, water is the most beginning, five flavors and three materials, nine boiling nine changes, then become to taste", thousands of years of historical records and precipitation, make it unique. Today's pot soup is famous in Nanchang area of Jiangxi Province.Edible effect: supplement nutrition, strengthen the body tonifying deficiency, puzzle refreshing. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: Century egg wonton
content: Century egg wonton . Century egg wonton is made of century egg and fresh pork, and then mixed with spices to make wonton stuffing. The skin of century egg wontons is thinner than that of ordinary wontons. Wonton soup includes dried shrimps and laver, so that the soup bottom and century egg wonton can be better integrated.

title: Nanchang poaching
content: Nanchang poaching . Poaching is a common cooking method, but in Nanchang, unique seasonings from Jiangxi are used, resulting in a spicy taste. The most unique among them is the ingredient called footboard (jiao'ban). This is unique to Nanchang. It is a soy product, with two intact tofu skins wrapped in crushed tofu skins. The crushed tofu skins are very absorbent and swell and bulge when cooked.

title: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:now
content: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Vortex , Building 14, Jin Yu Ming Du Apartments, Hong Du Rd North ( it's hidden on the side of the building ), ☏ +86 15879197340 . One of the most popular expat bars in Nanchang. Very small and crappy, though: literally just a galley bar with a few old booths and a pool table in the back.

title: Bossa Nova Garden
content: Bossa Nova Garden , 69 Feihong Lu, Honggutan (west of river) 南昌市红谷滩新区飞虹路69号（博泰江滨1号楼 ( in Honggutan (west of Gan river), a few streets south of Bayi Bridge ), ☏ +86 13576147334 . Expat bar west of the river. Popular bar on Fridays and Saturdays, often with live music. As the name suggests, there is a drinking garden out front. Just watch out for the "falling" glass bottles from the apartment building above.

title: Robot Head ( near Bayi Lake )
content: Robot Head ( near Bayi Lake ). Interesting bar/club with several floors and clubbing rooms.

title: CD 1925 , Fuzhou Road
content: CD 1925 , Fuzhou Road . Interesting bar that has four different rooms laid out like a labyrinth. If you are drunk it makes for a terribly confusing night.

title: Bar Newz , 112-113 Heng Mao, Star-walk, DingGong Rd
content: Bar Newz , 112-113 Heng Mao, Star-walk, DingGong Rd . A friendly western style bar serving all the usual beers and some imported beers and larger, cocktails by the dozen and real western bar snacks, the ones you are missing while your here in China. Open lunch time to late.

title: JD´s Bar ( JD´s Nanchang ), Nan Hu Lu no.28 ( Minde Lu ), ☏ +86 7916760173
content: JD´s Bar ( JD´s Nanchang ), Nan Hu Lu no.28 ( Minde Lu ), ☏ +86 7916760173 . A German-owned bar.

title: B11
content: B11 Runs down Heping Lu and past the main shopping district.
2 Starts at bus terminus attached to the new northern train and long distance bus station and rattles down almost the entire length of Heping Lu and around the university town in the south.

title: 31.81085 119.966911 2 Changzhou Museum ( 常州博物馆 )
content: 31.81085 119.966911 2 Changzhou Museum ( 常州博物馆 ), 1288 Longcheng Avenue, Xinbei District (新北区龙城大道1288号) ( on the west side of Changzhou Civic Square 760 m from the Civic Square metro station on Line 1; bus routes 24, 213 and b12 stop just outside the museum ), ☏ +86 519 85165089 . Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . Entry is free. English tour guides are available for ¥100 . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: Song Dynasty pillars , YanLing Middle Rd ( 100 m south of Dong Po Park )
content: Song Dynasty pillars , YanLing Middle Rd ( 100 m south of Dong Po Park ). Fragments of a pair of pillars from a long ago destroyed temple sit next to a minor canal parallel to the YanLing Rd. Dating from 979, they are estimated to have once been 5m tall but the ravages of time have reduced the tallest to about 2m and the other only a base. Somewhat weathered carvings depict layers of clouds, the ocean, mountains, rivers, protective deities and Buddhas.

title: 31.69798 119.947499 6 The Lotus Building ( 江苏常州武进莲花馆 ) ( in the suburbs of Wujin )
content: 31.69798 119.947499 6 The Lotus Building ( 江苏常州武进莲花馆 ) ( in the suburbs of Wujin ). Closed on Monday . Built on an artificial lake, this building is in the shape of a lotus flower. The building consists of three lotus flowers in different shapes while the main body and the petals are made of steel. In the evening, the building's lights change colors every minute. ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: SUPcz ( Art Districts in Changzhou
content: SUPcz ( Art Districts in Changzhou, China ) ( various locations around CZ ), coachjohn10@yahoo.com . Various . "Artists Co-op" in Changzhou. ¥0-100 . ( updated May 2018 )

title: 31.776183 119.964713 7 Tianning Temple ( 天宁寺 Tianning Si )
content: 31.776183 119.964713 7 Tianning Temple ( 天宁寺 Tianning Si ), 636 Yanling Middle Road, Tianning District (天宁区延陵中路636号) ( a few hundred meters east of the Culture Palace metro station; bus routes 220 and 903 ), ☏ +86 519 88178011 , tianningbaota@qq.com . 08:30-16:30, no entry after 16:00 . A Buddhist temple with a 13 story wooden Pagoda said to be the tallest in the world. Claims aside, has an impressive presence nonetheless. The temple is fairly new but the grounds religious providence goes back to the Tang dynasty. ¥80 .

title: 31.70089 119.919597 8 Yancheng Safari Park ( 淹城野生动物世界 )
content: 31.70089 119.919597 8 Yancheng Safari Park ( 淹城野生动物世界 ), 199 Wuyi Middle Road, Wujin District (武进区武宜中路199号) ( take bus B1 to Yancheng Central Public Bus Terminal (淹城公交中心站); alternatively take a metro train to Yanzheng Avenue metro station and head west to Wujin Civic Square to catch the Jinhu bus line (金湖线), which stops just outside the park ), ☏ +86 519 68881111 , yczoo@yczoo.com . 09:00-17:00 . ¥180 (standard fee), ¥90 (persons over 60 and children between 1.2 and 1.5 metres in height), Free entry is granted to children under 1.2 metres in height. Visitors who wish to drive their own vehicle through the park are charged an extra ¥200 if they have between 1 and 9 passengers or ¥400 if they have more than 10 passengers . ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: Grandma's Nook
content: Grandma's Nook , Xin Cheng Shang Jie A-183, 60 Hua Yuan Jie, Hutang , ☏ +86 152 9508 2029 , satinaa9@gmail.com . M-Th 12:00 - 20:00, F-Su 10:00 - 21:00 . A bakery with a small seating area.

content: Wu Yi Nong ( 吾意浓 ), 1-32 Drawbridge Road , ☏ +86 051986587888 . ( updated Jun 2024 )

content: Queen Pub , Heping North Rd . One of the smaller pubs in town. The barman speaks good English and stocks quite a few imported beer and spirits. Pool table.

content: The Old Pal , No. 5 Lufong Road , ☏ +86 131-5129-1950 . ( updated Jun 2024 )

content: Shi Li Yang Chang ( 十里洋场 ), Shop No. 1-6, Qingguo Lane Historical and Cultural Block , ☏ +86 15606124005 . ( updated Jun 2024 )

content: San Fen Zui ( 叁分醉(青果巷店) ), No. 3-1 Furukura , ☏ +86 134-0139-4695 . ( updated Jun 2024 )

title: 37.542485 121.401351 2 Polaris Museum of Watch Culture ( 北极星钟表文化博物馆 )
content: 37.542485 121.401351 2 Polaris Museum of Watch Culture ( 北极星钟表文化博物馆 ), 21 Guangren Road, Binhai Scenic Area, Zhifu District (芝罘区滨海景区广仁路21号) ( take bus no. 32, 43 or 46 and get off at either Yantai Hill (烟台山) or Yantai Hill Hospital (烟台山医院). The museum is a couple of hundred meters east of the bus stop ), ☏ +86 535 6611259 . 08:30-17:30 . Polaris Watch is a Chinese watch brand, affiliated with Yantai Polaris Watch (Group) Co., Ltd. Its predecessor, Yantai Baoshi Clock Factory, was founded by Li Dongshan in 1915, marking the beginning of China's modern mechanical clock manufacturing industry. The company primarily produces mechanical clocks, quartz clocks, time synchronization systems, and other products, covering both civilian and precision timing fields ¥30 . ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 37.541643 121.402412 3 Yantai Art Museum ( 烟台美术博物馆 )
content: 37.541643 121.402412 3 Yantai Art Museum ( 烟台美术博物馆 ), 20 Hai'an Road, Zhifu District (芝罘区海岸路20号) ( less than 100 m southeast of the Polaris Museum of Watch Culture ), ☏ +86 535 6224281 . 09:00-16:30, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 37.5383 121.397368 4 Yantai Museum ( 烟台市博物馆 )
content: 37.5383 121.397368 4 Yantai Museum ( 烟台市博物馆 ), 61 Nanda St, Zhifu District (芝罘区南大街61号) ( take bus no. 1, 2, 5, 10, 45, 51, 52, 62, 81, High-Speed Rail Bus 2 (高铁巴士2号线) or the Yantai Sightseeing Bus (烟台旅游观光巴士). Get off at the Culture Center (文化中心) bus stop ), ☏ +86 535 6232976 , ytsbwg@163.com . May-Oct: 09:00-17:00, Nov-Apr: 09:00-16:30, no entry in last 30 minutes, closed on Mondays . The city's main museum. Free . ( updated Jul 2020 )

content: 37.451547 121.510904 5 Yantai Natural History Museum ( 烟台自然博物馆 ), 2001 Binhai Middle Road, Laishan District (莱山区滨海中路2001号) ( Take bus no. 17, 61, the Red Memories Bus (红色记忆专线) or the Yantai Sightseeing Bus (烟台旅游观光巴士). Get off at the Geological Museum (地质博物馆) bus stop ), ☏ +86 535 6762520 . 09:00-16:30, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . ¥40 . ( updated Aug 2020 )

title: 37.5333 121.3866 6 Nanshan Park ( 南山公园 ), No
content: 37.5333 121.3866 6 Nanshan Park ( 南山公园 ), No. 1, Nanshangou, Zhifu District , ☏ +86 535 625 3687 . Daily 09:00-17:00 . Covering an area of over 2,000 acres, it features a temperate monsoon climate and consists of five major sections: the park area, the flower area, the zoo, the forest area, and the children's playground ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 37.547409 121.397082 8 Yantai Hill Park ( 烟台山公园 )
content: 37.547409 121.397082 8 Yantai Hill Park ( 烟台山公园 ), 7 Lixin Road, Zhifu District (芝罘区历新路7号) ( take bus no. 32, 43, 46 or the Red Memories Bus Line (红色记忆专线); get off at the Yantai Hill bus stop ), ☏ +86 535 6632846 . 08:00-17:00, no entry after 16:40 . Yantai Hill is one of the highest hills in the city. The lighthouse on the hill is open to visitors and you can climb up to the 11th floor to get a view of the city. Surrounding the hill are several historical buildings including the former consulates of the UK, the US, Japan and Denmark, which date from the 19th century. Free (except for the lighthouse, which charges ¥10) . ( updated Feb 2019 )

title: 37.5356 121.3717 2 Penglaichun Restaurant , No.13 Dingxi Rd
content: 37.5356 121.3717 2 Penglaichun Restaurant , No.13 Dingxi Rd . It is a time-honored restaurant and specializes in cooking seafood. It's said that the dishes are tasty but not too expensive. The Quanjiafu (Hotchpotch), soft-fried oyster and scrambled eggs with agarics are particularly good.

title: 37.5406 121.3958 3 Xile Restaurant , No.52 Huanshan Rd
content: 37.5406 121.3958 3 Xile Restaurant , No.52 Huanshan Rd . Recommended for its food but its service and environment are not so good. Menu items that are particularly good include the fish dumplings, garlic-style scallop, and fried leek dumplings.

title: 37.5271 121.4034 4 Shunshui-renqing , No.34 Haibin Rd
content: 37.5271 121.4034 4 Shunshui-renqing , No.34 Haibin Rd . Quite good environment as it is near the Golden Beach. Recommended food: dove soup and pumpkin pie.

title: 37.4636 121.4482 5 Yantai Impression , Near No
content: 37.4636 121.4482 5 Yantai Impression , Near No. 2-125, Lifeng Street, Zhifu District . Daily 11:00-21:00 . Yantai Impressions is a renowned restaurant specializing in authentic Shandong cuisine. It captures the essence of coastal culinary traditions, offering classics like Braised Sea Cucumber with Scallions, Oil-Stewed Prawns, Sweet and Sour Carp, and the local favorite Yantai Fried Starch Jelly. Each dish showcases exquisite technique and the rich, fresh flavors of Shandong. ¥150 .

title: 37.4623 121.4455 6 Juxiangyuan Casserole , No.7 Huamao Street
content: 37.4623 121.4455 6 Juxiangyuan Casserole , No.7 Huamao Street . It specializes in casserole, a dish with soup cooked in the clay pot. It comes in many flavors, such as beef, chicken with mushrooms, and vegetable.

title: 37.46 121.44 7 Chinese Drunken Chicken
content: 37.46 121.44 7 Chinese Drunken Chicken , 200 meters east of Suning Appliance, Mixc Mall, Laishan District, on the south side of the road , ☏ +86 177 6082 7638 . 11:00-23:00 . Yantai Huadiao Drunken Chicken is a signature dish from Shandong. Tender chicken is marinated in aromatic Huadiao rice wine, resulting in a unique flavor that is both savory and subtly sweet. A must-try local delicacy. ¥70 .

title: 37.545 121.4 2 Havana bar
content: 37.545 121.4 2 Havana bar . It's midway down Chaoyang street, plays good western music and has a fantastic atmosphere after midnight if you want to dance (again, western staff).

title: 37.5435 121.402 3 Druid's Irish Pub & Restaurant
content: 37.5435 121.402 3 Druid's Irish Pub & Restaurant . An Irish pub with typical Irish decor. With Guinness, Kilkenny, Magners Irish Cider, Strongbow, Stella Artois and Heineken on tap, good Irish music and soft rock, genuine wood interior, satellite tv, pool room, library with wireless internet, it is the place to go. Located midway down Chao Yang Jie, number 56. Has a great Western Restaurant downstairs as well.

title: 37.535 121.385 4 Baby Face Club
content: 37.535 121.385 4 Baby Face Club . It's downtown, and the only real clubbing experience Yantai offers. Baby Face Club has loud house music, laser lights galore, poor bar service, cover charge and cross dressing bartenders.

title: 37.47 122.14 4 Weihai Museum ( 威海市博物馆 )
content: 37.47 122.14 4 Weihai Museum ( 威海市博物馆 ), Level 3 Weihai Arts & Culture Center, 2A Jimo Road, Huancui District (环翠区即墨路2A威海文化艺术中心3层) ( There is a bus stop just outside the Weihai Arts and Culture Center, which is served by multiple public bus routes, including routes 1, 11, 12, 23, 24, 26, 33, 36, 37, 41, 43, 49, 50, 52, 53, 101, 107, 109, 110, 112, 115, 117, 118, k2, k3 and k6 ), ☏ +86 631 5893012 (office), +86 631 5310118 (service desk) . 09:00-16:30, closed on Mondays . Weihai's main museum. Free . ( updated Jul 2020 )

title: 37.52 122.16 5 First World War Chinese Laborers Memorial ( 一战华工纪念馆 )
content: 37.52 122.16 5 First World War Chinese Laborers Memorial ( 一战华工纪念馆 ), 9 Lianlindao Road, Huancui District (环翠区连林岛路9号) ( Take bus no. 4 and get off at either the Weihai Hotel (威海宾馆). The memorial is about 440 meters from there ), ☏ +86 631 5893012 , +86 631 5310118 . 08:30-20:00, closed on Mondays . Opened in July 2020, this new memorial is dedicated to the tens of thousands of Chinese workers who were employed as labourers by French and British forces in Europe during the First World War. The memorial is administered by the Weihai Museum. Free . ( updated Aug 2020 ) Xixiakou Zoo

title: 37.42 122.63 6 Xixiakou zoo ( 西霞口动物园 )
content: 37.42 122.63 6 Xixiakou zoo ( 西霞口动物园 ), Xixiakou Village, Chengshan Town, Yuxia Road, Rongcheng ( 裕霞路成山镇西霞口村 ), ☏ +86 0631-7834888 . 7:30-17:30 . 1.From Rongcheng or Weihai by car along the road to the east, you can reach the top of the mountain. Another free bus to the zoo runs half an hour apart. 2.Xixiakou village every half hour there will be a bus to Weihai City and Chengshantou. Adult ticket ¥160 1.2m-1.4m children and 60-70 years old elderly ¥80 1.2m children and above 70 years old elderly and disabled revolutionary soldiers free . ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: Weihai Huaxia City scenic spot 37.42 122.12 7 Weihai Huaxia City scenic spot ( 威海华夏城景区 )
content: Weihai Huaxia City scenic spot 37.42 122.12 7 Weihai Huaxia City scenic spot ( 威海华夏城景区 ), No. 1 Huaxia Road, Huancui District ( 环翠区华夏路1号 ), ☏ +86 0631-5999150 . 08:00-17:10 . No. 58 train from the sea Park, through the railway station, to the Huaxia City scenic area. Adult tickets are ¥88 for senior citizens and ¥49 for children . ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: 37.4 122.42 8 The Dream Sea ( 那香海 )
content: 37.4 122.42 8 The Dream Sea ( 那香海 ), 6699 Huanhai Road, Rongcheng City, ( 山东省威海市荣成市环海大道6699号 ), ☏ +86 631-7861666 . ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: 37.56 122.15 9 Cat Head Mountain ( 猫山头 )
content: 37.56 122.15 9 Cat Head Mountain ( 猫山头 ). Cat Head Mountain, about 0.2 kilometers long, an area of about 0.02 square kilometers, the highest point of 45.7 meters above sea level.It is named after a cat shaped like a cat. ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 37.4 121.93 2 Weihai Hengshan skiing meadow ( 恒山滑雪滑草场 )
content: 37.4 121.93 2 Weihai Hengshan skiing meadow ( 恒山滑雪滑草场 ), South Hongshan Road, Chucun Town, Huancui District (Hengshan Eco-Tourism Zone) ( 恒山生态旅游区内 ), ☏ +86 0631-5709333 . 8:00-17:00 Open in winter only . Admission includes ski shoes, skis, poles, storage locker and ski clothing. 3 hours skiing ¥240 holiday 3 hours ¥320 holiday all day ¥500 . ( updated Oct 2022 ) Weihai International Bathing Beach

title: 37.53 122.04 3 Weihai International Bathing Beach ( 国际海水浴场 )
content: 37.53 122.04 3 Weihai International Bathing Beach ( 国际海水浴场 ), 178 North Huanhai Road, Huancui District ( 环翠区北环海路178号 ), ☏ +82 0631-5623885 . 09:00-18:00 . Train station, bus station take 12 bus to Weihai TV station, get off the bus 7 to the international beach Huiyuan apartment station, get off immediately. Free attractions . ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: 37.54 122.11 4 Grape Beach ( 葡萄滩海水浴场 )
content: 37.54 122.11 4 Grape Beach ( 葡萄滩海水浴场 ). Grape Beach is a beach without any artificial carving. Take bus No. 3 and No. 14 to the east of the grape Bath to get here. The beach here is very large, and because of the villages around it, few people come to play. ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: Xi Xia Kou
content: Xi Xia Kou, approx 40 km east of Weihai, a beautiful Zoo and lands end "Chengshantou"

title: Wendeng
content: Wendeng, approx 30 km South, Holy Water Temple and natural hot springs

title: There is a Western/Chinese breakfast buffet at the Golden Bay Hotel on the NE end of the I
content: There is a Western/Chinese breakfast buffet at the Golden Bay Hotel on the NE end of the International beach for about USD10. They'll expect a room number, but will seat visitors.

title: the local major grocers usually have a small international selection where one may find Do
content: the local major grocers usually have a small international selection where one may find Dove chocolates, pasta and sauces, and pantry staples that have a long shelf life. If you look hard, some stores even carry New Zealand butter or French Brie and aged English cheddar cheese and a decent selection of biscuits/crackers. An occasional parcel of familiar can be intensely appreciated by an unadjusted western palate.

title: The Walnut Alley Music Tavern.
content: The Walnut Alley Music Tavern. The Xiaozi mood music bar around Han Le Fang has food, such as roast chicken, mapo tofu and so on. There was music and a great atmosphere.

title: Moon Coffee Bar.
content: Moon Coffee Bar. It is a coffee bar on the beach with a view of the sea and sunset. It is a good choice when the weather is nice.

title: 37.43 122.15 2 Weihai Fruit Sweets ( 威海花果小甜 ), Lotte Century City 2-16 , ☏ +86 15662376868
content: 37.43 122.15 2 Weihai Fruit Sweets ( 威海花果小甜 ), Lotte Century City 2-16 , ☏ +86 15662376868 . Located in the Hanlefang business district of Weihai, it focuses on fig-themed drinks and products, and is well-liked by local residents and tourists. Many customers praise the fig drink for its natural freshness and moderate sweetness, especially in summer, making it a great product for cooling off. 9.9 . ( updated Dec 2024 )

title: 37.42 122.17 5 Burris International Hotel ( 铂丽斯国际大酒店 )
content: 37.42 122.17 5 Burris International Hotel ( 铂丽斯国际大酒店 ). The hotel offers free toiletries, 24-hour room service, a free gym as well as laundry services and parking. ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: Cao Gong Zhu Memorial Temple
content: The Cao Gong Zhu Memorial Temple commemorates a local hero who defended the city against Japanese pirates in 1557.

title: 32.010514 120.876254 2 Nantong Textile Museum ( 南通纺织博物馆 )
content: 32.010514 120.876254 2 Nantong Textile Museum ( 南通纺织博物馆 ). Opened in 1985 as a tribute to the city's long association with the weaving industries, the museum was the first of its kind in China and boast six exhibition halls as well as courtyards and gardens. ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: 32.031615 120.860166 4 China Audit Museum ( 中国审计博物馆 )
content: 32.031615 120.860166 4 China Audit Museum ( 中国审计博物馆 ). A museum that looks at accounting and auditing. It has displays of many different abacuses, including one that can calculate with 40 digits. ( updated Oct 2022 )

title: Nantong Medical College
content: Nantong Medical College was founded in the first decade of 20th century. Visit the college at evening; you may see hustle and bustle.

title: 32.013741 120.866418 5 Nantong Overseas Chinese Museum ( 南通华侨博物馆 )
content: 32.013741 120.866418 5 Nantong Overseas Chinese Museum ( 南通华侨博物馆 ), 19 Haonan Road, Chongchuan District (崇川区濠南路19号) ( part of the Nantong Museum complex ), ☏ +86 513 85527578 , +86 513 851015782 , ntql1981@163.com , nthqbwg@163.com MULTIPLE EMAIL . 09:30-17:00, closed on Mondays . The only Overseas Chinese museum in the Yangtze River Delta region. Free . ( updated May 2023 )

title: 32.10272 120.82193 6 Nantong Forest Safari Park ( 南通森林野生动物园 )
content: 32.10272 120.82193 6 Nantong Forest Safari Park ( 南通森林野生动物园 ), No.299, Tong Liu Road, Chongchuan District ( Bus 108, 605 direct to Nantong Forest Safari Park ), ☏ +86 0513 69883333 . Open 09:00-21:00 (admission closed at 19:00) . Adult ticket: RMB 180; Concessionary ticket: RMB 90; Children under 1.2m and senior citizens over 70 years old are free . ( updated Jun 2024 )

title: Boat Trip
content: Boat Trip Along the Hao He river is a treat in the evening. You can hire an e-boat for a few hundred yuan and it is worthwhile doing it in the evening when the lights come on and the fountains go splashing around 19:00.

title: Angels Bar
content: Angels Bar , on the corner of Nanda Jie and Haonan Lu, a few doors east from the Youfei Hotel located inside the MingDu Plaza. Behind the bar stocks a full assortment of whiskey, vodka, gin, tequila, and rum. Angels also has draft and bottled beer not to mention all your popular cocktails and shooters. Bring your laptop and a friend cause Angels also offers free WiFi internet connection, pool table, beer pong, foosball, and satellite tv.

title: Captains Bar and Grill
content: Captains Bar and Grill , QingNian Lu, near the SanTeh Hotel. Captains bar serves Wstern food, with a slant on Mexican and German. It has great lunch specials, happy hour every night, and free WiFi internet access.

title: Camino
content: Camino , south of the Victoria Hotel on Chengshan Lu. Clean and cheap bar with friendly staff and wide collection of music, most of which has been donated by visiting expats.

title: Chef Richard Bar and Grill Café
content: Chef Richard Bar and Grill Café , Haonan Lu, a few doors west from the Youfei Hotel. Serves Western food, and offers free WiFi network connection.

title: Nantong Shipyard has a row of about twenty bars! Most are aimed at seamen stopping in the
content: Nantong Shipyard has a row of about twenty bars! Most are aimed at seamen stopping in the port, which makes them a little sleazy, though they have character and can be good fun.

title: Scotland Bar
content: Scotland Bar just a few doors down from Camino this place has a warm and friendly atmosphere and fantastic staff and regulars.

title: Nantong International Hotel
content: Nantong International Hotel , 102 Renmin West Road , ☏ +86 513 8351-9898 .

title: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:now
content: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Youfei Hotel , 18 Haonan Road , ☏ +86 513 8505-0888 . ¥630 & up with breakfast .

title: 34.2347 117.19316 2 Huaihai Campaign Memorial Museum ( 淮海战役纪念馆 )
content: 34.2347 117.19316 2 Huaihai Campaign Memorial Museum ( 淮海战役纪念馆 ), 2 Jiefang Road South, Quanshan District (泉山区解放南路2号) ( take bus nos. 11, 11w, 19, 20, 35, 35w, 51w, 61, 61w, 64, 64w, 65, 65w, 83, 83w, 118, 199, 601, 601w, 603, 603w, 604, 701, 838, 夜14, 游1 or 游2路外环 and get off at the Memorial Tower 纪念塔 ), ☏ +86 516 8384-3254 . Tu-Su 09:00-17:00 . A museum about the Huaihai Campaign, a major military campaign during the Chinese Civil War. The museum is in a large park. Free . ( updated Dec 2017 )

title: 34.30867 117.13255 3 Guishan Han Dynasty Tombs ( 龟山汉墓 ), No
content: 34.30867 117.13255 3 Guishan Han Dynasty Tombs ( 龟山汉墓 ), No. 3 Xiangwang Road North, Gulou District (鼓楼区襄王北路3号) ( take bus no. 37 and get off at the bus stop of the same name ), ☏ +86 516 8577-0107 . 08:30-17:30 . These tombs contain the remains of Liu Zhu, the sixth ruler of the ancient principality of Chu, and his wife. ¥80 (Covers all attractions within the Guishan Scenic Area) . ( updated Jan 2018 )

title: 34.24607 117.21947 4 Mausoleum of the Chu Prince ( 楚王陵 )
content: 34.24607 117.21947 4 Mausoleum of the Chu Prince ( 楚王陵 ), 1 Bingmayong Road, Yunlong District (云龙区兵马俑路1号) ( take bus nos. 49, 65, 65w, 71, 71w, 97, 97w, 605, 608 or 608w to the bus stop of the same name ), ☏ +86 516 83566263 , +86 516 83167053 , JQKFB08@126.com . Believed to be the final resting place of Liu Wu, the third prince of the ancient principality of Chu. This is Xuzhou's own miniature version of Xi'an 's Terracotta Warriors . The site features three pavilions featuring the warriors (three foot tall statues) in various states of excavation. Replicas are also sold. (Most people in the city have never seen the site and are only vaguely familiar with it). ¥90 (Covers all attractions within the Han Culture Scenic Area) . ( updated Feb 2018 )

title: 34.23854 117.14798 5 Yunlong Lake ( 云龙湖 )
content: 34.23854 117.14798 5 Yunlong Lake ( 云龙湖 ), Quanshan District (徐州市泉山区) ( Bus routes 11, 34, 35, 38, 47, 48, 49, 51, 55, 59, 68, 69, 82, 601, 游2, and 游3 ), ☏ +86 516 8396 0925 , ylhzzk@163.com . Large scenic lake in the city's southwest. Free . ( updated Feb 2018 )

title: 34.24023 117.14956 6 Xuzhou Aquarium ( 徐州水族展览馆 )
content: 34.24023 117.14956 6 Xuzhou Aquarium ( 徐州水族展览馆 ), Huxin Island, Yunlong Lake, Quanshan District (徐州市泉山区云龙湖湖心岛) ( on an island in the middle of Yunlong Lake; the nearest bus stops are on the north side of the lake and include Jinfu Jiayuan 金府家园, Sports Centre 体育中心, and Fangnan Xiaoqu West Gate 纺南小区西门 ), ☏ +86 516 85715614 , +86 516 85720520 . 09:00-17:00 on normal days, 08:30-17:30 on public holidays . This is one of the largest aquariums in Asia. It contains hundreds of different aquatic species from all around the world. ¥60 . ( updated Feb 2018 )

title: 34.28443 117.15302 7 Xuzhou Botanical Gardens ( 徐州植物园 )
content: 34.28443 117.15302 7 Xuzhou Botanical Gardens ( 徐州植物园 ), 3 Pingshan Road, Gulou District (鼓楼区平山路3号) ( catch bus nos. 6 or 6w to the Botanical Gardens bus stop ), ☏ +86 516 82166116 , xzsmp@163.com . 09:00-16:30 . The Xuzhou Botanical Gardens were established in 2012 on the grounds of what used to be the Xuzhou Nursery. It covers an area of around 400,000 square metres and includes hundreds of different species of plants and trees, as well as some manmade streams and waterfalls. ¥20 . ( updated Feb 2018 )

title: 34.26913 117.18765 2 Britain Bar
content: 34.26913 117.18765 2 Britain Bar . A British-themed bar, one of several Western-styled venues in central Xuzhou.

title: 29.125 119.67 2 East Bus Station ( Buses depart for Yiwu and other eastern regions
content: 29.125 119.67 2 East Bus Station ( Buses depart for Yiwu and other eastern regions. ). A key station for buses traveling to Yiwu and other destinations in the east. ( updated Dec 2024 )

title: 29.064 119.654 3 South Bus Station ( Bus No. 19 (Railway Station
content: 29.064 119.654 3 South Bus Station ( Bus No. 19 (Railway Station - South Bus Station) ). Buses depart for Wuyi, Yongkang, Lanxi, Pan'an, Hengdian, Nanma, Tangxian, Xinwo, Songyang, Xiaoshan Airport, Ningbo Airport, Shishi, and Anqing. Local buses head to Tangxi, Langya, Changshan, Shiqiao, Yangbu, and Jiangdong. ( updated Dec 2024 )

title: Salt production sites
content: Salt production sites Learn about the city’s history of salt production by visiting local museums and historical sites. You can also observe traditional salt-making techniques that have been passed down through generations.

title: Birdwatching
content: Birdwatching Yancheng is renowned for its birdwatching opportunities, especially at the Yancheng National Rare Birds Nature Reserve. The winter season is the best time to see the red-crowned cranes, along with other migratory birds. The coast of Yancheng Prefecture has been listed as a natural world heritage site under the name "Migratory Bird Sanctuaries along the Coast of Yellow Sea-Bohai Gulf of China".

title: Coastal wetlands
content: Coastal wetlands The coastal wetlands of Yancheng are some of the most ecologically diverse areas in China. Guided eco-tours are available, offering a chance to explore these unique environments and learn about local conservation efforts.

title: Cycling and hiking
content: Cycling and hiking Yancheng’s coastal parks and reserves offer excellent opportunities for cycling and hiking. Dongtai Huanghai Forest Park and the nature reserves provide scenic trails for nature lovers.

title: Saltwater Duck
content: Saltwater Duck: A local specialty, this dish is prepared by marinating duck in a saltwater brine before roasting, resulting in tender, flavorful meat. It is a must-try for visitors to Yancheng.

title: Dafeng Crab
content: Dafeng Crab: Yancheng’s coastal location makes it a great place for seafood. The crabs from the Dafeng area are particularly prized for their sweet, delicate flavor.

title: Seafood Hotpot
content: Seafood Hotpot: A popular dish in Yancheng, seafood hotpot features a rich broth filled with local seafood, vegetables, and spices. It’s perfect for a hearty meal, especially during the cooler months.

title: Steamed Fish
content: Steamed Fish: Freshwater and saltwater fish are commonly served in Yancheng. One popular preparation is steaming the fish with ginger and scallions, allowing the natural flavors of the fish to shine.

title: Yellow Sea Salt Beer
content: Yellow Sea Salt Beer: Some local breweries have started producing craft beers that incorporate sea salt from the nearby Yellow Sea, offering a unique twist on traditional brews.

title: Herbal Teas
content: Herbal Teas: Yancheng locals enjoy a variety of herbal teas, often made with local ingredients like chrysanthemum and goji berries. These teas are refreshing and are believed to have health benefits.

title: Rice Wine
content: Rice Wine: Try locally made rice wine, a traditional Chinese alcoholic beverage that is slightly sweet and often served warm. It is especially popular during festive occasions.

title: Luxury hotels
