content: Luxury hotels: Yancheng has several high-end hotels, such as the Yancheng Marriott Hotel and DoubleTree by Hilton, which offer modern amenities and comfortable accommodations in central locations.

title: Mid-range hotels
content: Mid-range hotels: Options like the Holiday Inn Yancheng and Jinling Hotel provide affordable yet comfortable stays, with easy access to local attractions and dining options.

title: Budget hotels
content: Budget hotels: For budget-conscious travelers, there are numerous affordable options, such as 7 Days Inn and Hanting Hotel, offering clean and convenient rooms.

title: Eco-lodges
content: Eco-lodges: Some eco-lodges near Yancheng’s nature reserves offer a more immersive experience, allowing visitors to stay close to the natural landscapes and wildlife they’ve come to explore.

title: Puppet Emperor's Palace
content: Puppet Emperor's Palace is the former residence of Puyi, the last emperor of China and the Puppet Emperor of Manchukuo on behalf of the Japanese. In the north east of Changchun .

title: Wen Miao Confucian Temple
content: Wen Miao Confucian Temple in Jilin City. one of the "Four Confucius Temples of China". The size of the building group and high level are unique in the feudal society.

title: Longtou Mountain
content: Longtou Mountain , northwest of Changchun These hills contain ancient tombs including the Mausoleum of Princess Zhenxiao and royal tombs of the Balhae kingdom.

title: Rimmed Trees
content: The Rimmed Trees of Jilin city are extolled as one of the four major natural wonders of China along with the Three Gorges of the Yangtze River, the landscape of Jilin and the Stone Forest of Yunnan.

title: Jilin City Museum
content: Jilin City Museum In 1976, Jilin was hit by a heavy meteorite storm. Many of the stones were collected and placed into this museum. The largest stone weighs 1.775 kg and is thought to be the largest meteorite in existence.

title: Jingyuetan National Scenic Area
content: Jingyuetan National Scenic Area is one of the AAAAA class scenic spots of the first group in China. Jingyuetan national forest park in Changchun of Jilin Province is located in the eastern mountains to the western steppe transition zone, Changbai Mountain is a hilly are with peaks 119-406 m above sea level. The park is 9 km to the south-east of Changchun .

title: Jilin Ice Lantern Festival
content: Jilin Ice Lantern Festival not as famous as the festivals in Harbin but still worth a visit (during mid-January)

title: 35.206 113.091 2 Qingtian River Scenic Area ( Qingtian River Scenic Area )
content: 35.206 113.091 2 Qingtian River Scenic Area ( Qingtian River Scenic Area ), 博爱县青天河镇 ( You can take a tourist bus from Jiaozuo Passenger Station, which takes about 1 hour. ). 08:00–17:30 . A national 5A-level tourist attraction, it is known as the "Three Gorges of the North" because of its alternating canyons, mountains and waters, and boat tours are available. 80¥ . ( updated Oct 2025 )

title: 35.028 113.204 3 Shennong Mountain ( 神农山 )
content: 35.028 113.204 3 Shennong Mountain ( 神农山 ), Northwest of Qinyang City ( You can take a tourist bus directly from Jiaozuo or Qinyang city. ). 07:00–18:00 . The mountain is majestic and famous for its original secondary forests and ancient road landscapes. It is an important scenic spot at the southern end of Taihang Mountain. 100¥ . ( updated Oct 2025 )

title: 35.23 113.22 2 Wang's Noodle Soup ( 王氏浆面条 )
content: 35.23 113.22 2 Wang's Noodle Soup ( 王氏浆面条 ). A noodle shop specializing in fermented noodle soup, which has been operating in the liberated area for many years, focuses on this local specialty snack. ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 35.2 113.225 2 Keyou Hotel ( 客佑酒店 ), No
content: 35.2 113.225 2 Keyou Hotel ( 客佑酒店 ), No. 19-6, Yingbin Road, Jiefang District . The design incorporates Henan Opera and Tai Chi culture, and provides zero-pressure mattresses, mini-fridges, and some room types include kitchens. ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 22.524826 113.370376 3 Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall ( 孙中山纪念堂 )
content: 22.524826 113.370376 3 Sun Yat-sen Memorial Hall ( 孙中山纪念堂 ), 188-192 Sun Wen Middle Road (孙文中路188-192号) ( bus routes 001, 002, 005, 009, 021, 050 and 209 ), ☏ +86 760 88822037 . 08ː30-17ː00 . Not to be confused with the Sun Yat-sen Memorial Museum (listed below). Contains a photographic exhibition of Sun Yat-sen's life and legacy. Captions are in Chinese only. Free . ( updated Dec 2018 )

title: 22.53203 113.36735 5 Zhongshan Cartoon Museum ( 中山漫画馆 )
content: 22.53203 113.36735 5 Zhongshan Cartoon Museum ( 中山漫画馆 ), Inside Yixian Lake Park, Hubin Road, Shiqi District (中山市石岐区湖滨路 逸仙湖公园内) ( bus routes 005, 018, 021, 032, 035 and 209.; the museum is on the northern side of the lake ), ☏ +86 760 88829276 , zsmhg2013@163.com . 09:00-17:00, no entry after 16:30, closed on Mondays . Zhongshan is the hometown of several of China's most prominent cartoonists. This museum displays some of their works, as well as works by cartoonists from other parts of China. Free . ( updated Dec 2017 )

title: 22.52304 113.36953 6 Zhongshan Museum ( 中山市博物馆 )
content: 22.52304 113.36953 6 Zhongshan Museum ( 中山市博物馆 ), 197 Sunwen Middle Road, Shiqi District, Zhongshan (中山市石岐区孙文中路197号) ( nearby bus stops include Fengyuan Road (逢源路), Gongchen Road (拱辰路) and Sun-Yat-sen Memorial Hall (中山纪念堂); take bus no. 001, 002, 005, 009, 021, 032, 050 or 209 ), ☏ +86 760 88840408 , zsbwg@163.com . 09ː00-17ː00, no entry after 16ː30, closed on Mondays . This museum, which is housed in a 1930s hospital building, is mainly used for hosting temporary exhibitions. Information and captions are usually in Chinese only. Free . ( updated Dec 2017 )

title: 22.51915 113.35823 7 Zhongshan Museum of Art ( 中山美术馆 )
content: 22.51915 113.35823 7 Zhongshan Museum of Art ( 中山美术馆 ), Qi River Park, West District, Zhongshan (中山市西区岐江公园内) ( the museumis in the middle of the park; bus routes 12, 024, 047, 211, 216, and b10 ), ☏ +86 760 88625363 , 3600971576@qq.com . 09ː00-17ː00, no entry after 16ː30, closed on Mondays . A small art museum focused on displaying works by local artists. Free . ( updated Dec 2017 )

title: 22.519737 113.358071 8 Qi River Park ( 岐江公园
content: 22.519737 113.358071 8 Qi River Park ( 岐江公园, Qijiang Park ), Intersection of Zhongshan Yi Road and Xidi Road, West District (西区中山一路与西堤路交叉口) ( on the west bank of the Qi River, a short distance south of the Qi River Bridge; bus routes 12, 024, 047, 211, 216, and b10 ). This was once the site of the Central Guangdong Shipyard (粤中造船厂). At the end of the 20th century, the shipyard was converted into a park. While most of the old industrial structures were removed, some have been retained or reconstructed for artistic effect. The Zhongshan Museum of Art (listed above) can be found in the middle of the park. Free . ( updated Dec 2018 )

title: 22.531977 113.367545 9 Yixian Lake Park ( 逸仙湖公园 ), Hubin Road (湖滨路)
content: 22.531977 113.367545 9 Yixian Lake Park ( 逸仙湖公园 ), Hubin Road (湖滨路) . ( updated Dec 2018 )

title: 22.37592 113.45085 2 Chung Shan Hot Spring Golf Club ( 中山温泉高尔夫球会 )
content: 22.37592 113.45085 2 Chung Shan Hot Spring Golf Club ( 中山温泉高尔夫球会 ), Sanxiang Town (三乡镇) ( most visitors would probably come here by taxi; if you prefer to take a bus, take bus nos 211 or 213 and get off at the Yongmo (雍陌) bus stop ), ☏ +86 760 86690055 , golf@gccs.com.hk . About 25 km from downtown Zhongshan. Features two 18-hole golf courses designed by American golf champions Arnold Palmer and Jack Nicklaus. Claims to be the first modern golf club to be established in the PRC. Fees for non-members vary between ¥400 and ¥1600. Discounts are available if accompanied by a club member . ( updated Apr 2018 )

title: 22.52067 113.35974 3 Qi River Cruises ( 岐江游船 )
content: 22.52067 113.35974 3 Qi River Cruises ( 岐江游船 ), Qi River Cruise Boat Pier, Qi River Park, West District (中山市西区岐江公园内岐江游码头) ( catch a bus to Fuhua Hotel (富华酒店), Zhongshan No. 1 Bridge (中山一桥) or Zhongken Department Store (中恳百货) ), ☏ +86 760 88662333 , zsqijiangyou@126.com . Boats depart every half an hour from 18:30 to 22:00 . A short cruise down the Qi River and back. The journey time is about 30-40 minutes. You may either sit in the cabin or stand on the rear deck. Standing on the front deck is not permitted. ¥60 . ( updated Jun 2018 )

title: 22.50396 113.38669 4 Zhongshan Culture & Art Center ( 中山市文化艺术中心 )
content: 22.50396 113.38669 4 Zhongshan Culture & Art Center ( 中山市文化艺术中心 ), 73 Xingzhong Avenue, East District (中山市东区兴中道73号) ( take bus no. 030, 035 or 036 and alight at the Culture & Art Center bus stop; or catch bus no. 031, 042, 213 or 216 and get off at the Sun Yat-Sen Memorial Park bus stop ), ☏ +86 760 88223666 , +86 760 88883351 , whyszx@zcac.org . Zhongshan's premier performing arts venue. International artists sometimes perform here. ( updated Jun 2018 )

title: 22.37386 113.4554 5 Zhongshan Hot Spring Resort ( 中山温泉宾馆 )
content: 22.37386 113.4554 5 Zhongshan Hot Spring Resort ( 中山温泉宾馆 ), Sanxiang Town (三乡镇) ( take bus nos 211 or 213 and get off at the Yongmo (雍陌) bus stop ), ☏ +86 760 86683888 . ¥198 .

title: 22.52861 113.36119 6 Zhongshan Sky Wheel ( 幻彩摩天轮 )
content: 22.52861 113.36119 6 Zhongshan Sky Wheel ( 幻彩摩天轮 ), Level 5, Block C, Central Power Plaza, 9 Fengming Road, Shiqi District (石歧区凤鸣路9号兴中广场C座5楼) ( the closest bus stop is the Central Power Plaza (兴中广场) bus stop, which is served by bus nos. 001, 010, 077, 209, and k13 ), ☏ +86 760 8998-2999 , zsskywheel@126.com . 10:00-22:30 . The Zhongshan Sky Wheel is a 108-m-high Ferris wheel on the roof of a shopping centre in Zhongshan's downtown area. Perhaps due to its central location, the Zhongshan Sky Wheel is often considered to be one of the city's most important landmarks. A souvenir shop near the ticket gate sells various kinds of minature Ferris wheels and other Zhongshan-related gifts. Adults ¥68, children ¥35 . ( updated Apr 2018 )

title: Bellavista Restaurant
content: Bellavista Restaurant , Unit 3, Borough 1, 39 Qiguan West Road (岐关西路39号，一区，3卡) , ☏ +86 760 88812988 , fax +86 760 88804588 , info@bellavista.cn . 3 Chefs Restaurant. German and Italian (Peter), Thai (Toffee), and Indian (Johnny). Prices medium .

title: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:now
content: .mw-parser-output .error-deadlink{color:red;background:yellow;display:none;white-space:nowrap} Italy Square , Zhongshan Dongqu Qiguan Xilu, Renren Zhuru Pangbian, Hengxing Jie 12 (中山市东区岐关西路人人足浴旁恒信街12号) . 11:00 to late . 3 Chefs Restaurant. Italian (Gigi) Prices medium .

title: 22.52754 113.38687 1 Hefeng Japanese Restaurant ( 和风日本料理 )
content: 22.52754 113.38687 1 Hefeng Japanese Restaurant ( 和风日本料理 ), 2 Fukang Road, Shiqi District 富康路2号 ( take bus no. 015, 038 or 042 and get off at the Zhongshan People's Congress (市人大); the restaurant is easily recognizable by its distinctly Japanese features ), ☏ +86 760 88239366 . Established in 1996, this is one of Zhongshan's oldest-established Japanese restaurants. It offers a variety of different dishes in a traditional Japanese setting. The restaurant has another branch at No. 6 Changjiang Road South (长江南路6号). ( updated Sep 2018 )

title: New Bar Street , Qiguan West Road ( near Peter's Place )
content: New Bar Street , Qiguan West Road ( near Peter's Place ). A whole complex of clubs and bars, including iClub and Fashion Club.

title: Peter's Place , Qiquan West Road ( next to Wei Jing Wan )
content: Peter's Place , Qiquan West Road ( next to Wei Jing Wan ). Really good German-style bar with German beer. Live music every day. The food is great, and they have nice pool tables! If you go Fridays or Saturdays, it is advisable to reserve a table. On Fridays you can eat pizza for ¥39, all you can eat. On Saturdays they do a buffet for ¥88, of which the best offerings are the Indian and Thai curries and the BBQ.

title: See Club ( next to Zhongshan International Hotel )
content: See Club ( next to Zhongshan International Hotel ). Biggest and most vibrant night club in Zhongshan.

title: Yihe Grand Hotel
content: Yihe Grand Hotel , Zhongshan No.5, Xingzhong Avenue, Shiqi District (中山市石岐区兴中道5号) , ☏ +86-755-88850655 .

title: 31.465234 104.753055 2 Tie Niu Square ( Iron Ox Square，铁牛广场 ), Tie Niu Road
content: 31.465234 104.753055 2 Tie Niu Square ( Iron Ox Square，铁牛广场 ), Tie Niu Road . Locals come here to drink tea and play mahjong. Edges onto the river where many locals come to picnic. There are locals selling antiques and small household goods around the back of the square. ( updated Sep 2023 )

title: 31.461658 104.748046 5 People's Park , Fucheng District
content: 31.461658 104.748046 5 People's Park , Fucheng District . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.464881 104.752989 6 Tieniu Plaza , FQ73+W7 Fucheng District
content: 31.464881 104.752989 6 Tieniu Plaza , FQ73+W7 Fucheng District . ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: 31.919707 104.679571 7 Jiuhuang Mountain Scenic Area ( 九皇山景区 )
content: 31.919707 104.679571 7 Jiuhuang Mountain Scenic Area ( 九皇山景区 ), Beichuan Qiang Autonomous County ( Yongcheng Village ), ☏ +86 816 4732666 . 08:00-18:00 . Jiuhuang Mountain Scenic Area is a national 4A-level tourist attraction. It features Qiang ethnic culture, preserving some cultural relics and folk customs. Covering about 25 square kilometers, the area includes hunting grounds, caves, cableways, hot springs, resorts, and folk culture parks, combining natural landscapes with cultural elements. ¥180(Front Mountain) ¥280(Back Mountain) . ( updated Sep 2025 )

title: 31.4725 104.7328 8 绵阳跃进路工业历史街区 ( Yuejin Road Industrial History Block )
content: 31.4725 104.7328 8 绵阳跃进路工业历史街区 ( Yuejin Road Industrial History Block ), Yuejin Road, Fucheng District . 24/7 . A well-preserved street that tells the story of Mianyang's development as a "Science and Technology City." The architecture from the 1950s-1980s, old factories turned into cafes, and informative plaques offer a nostalgic glimpse into China's industrial past. Free to walk . ( updated Oct 2025 )
tags: 绵阳跃进路工业历史街区

title: RiverWalk ( between #2 and #3 bridges )
content: RiverWalk ( between #2 and #3 bridges ). The wide Riverwalk is a fascinating pedestrian boulevard featuring numerous fountains, statues, and a view of FuLe Mountain across the river. Early in the morning you will see groups of Tai Chi followers rhythmically going through their paces and exercises, or perhaps catch a band or flag corps practicing in adjacent Iron Ox Square. During the summer there are numerous beer gardens and outdoor teahouses, and year-round there are permanent tea and coffee houses bordering the walk on the first floor of apartment and condo skyscrapers. Children's play areas, a river bank beach, and colorful flowerbeds can be found intermittently. The walk extends the length of the city's border with the river, but the most active area can be found between the #2 and #3 (Rainbow) Bridges.

title: Grandma's Kitchen
content: Grandma's Kitchen , 8 Tie Niu Road ( near the fountain in Tie Nui square ), ☏ +86 816 2221288 , +86 13668325888 . A chain restaurant that serves mainly Western dishes and also some Asian dishes. A range of different cuts of steaks available (priced under ¥100) and a variety of pastas (less than ¥50). Burgers, pizzas, onion rings, chips, etc. ( updated Sep 2023 )

title: Old House (Liao Fangzi) ( across the river in the shadow of Fule Mtn
content: Old House (Liao Fangzi) ( across the river in the shadow of Fule Mtn. ). Excellent traditional Sichuan dishes prepared and served in a comfortable, clean setting. Favorites include the beef & bamboo and the beef with fruit, in addition to more traditional local dishes. A little more pricey than some Mom & Pop joints, but also much cleaner and with modern amenities. Not much English spoken here, so bring a local friend along to help out. ( updated Sep 2023 )

title: Guokui ( Chinese-style fried dumpling )
content: Guokui ( Chinese-style fried dumpling ), In any street you can see a shop selling pots and pans . In the middle of the pot Guokui there is a "dragon's eye" like pot Guokui head, the dragon's eye out, out, the whole pot Guokui layer by layer spinning without breaking, the pot Guokui layer by layer are crispy; Mixed pot Guokui: its speciality is bubbling, the pot Guokui bubbles up to the old high; Crispy pot Guokui: famous for its fragrance, with a variety of fillings, pot Guokui with a red mark on the pot Guokui, oily; and there is also sesame pot Guokui, Glutinous Rice Pot Kui, Cured Meat or Marinated Meat Sandwich Pot Kui, and Pot Kui with various flavours and meat fillings, up to more than 20 varieties. Its unique flavour and regional characteristics will attract many local and foreign diners. ¥6 or ¥7 each . ( updated Sep 2023 )

title: SPR Coffee , On Iron Ox Square (Tien Niu Guangchang) ( near Yong Tuo Yang Luo complex
content: SPR Coffee , On Iron Ox Square (Tien Niu Guangchang) ( near Yong Tuo Yang Luo complex. ). Excellent coffee house with a limited but tasty menu. Great for sitting and watching the action on the square. Friendly service and good coffee and wine list. Clean, locally owned and foreign-friendly. Dishes are good, and the coffees and teas are varied and splendid. ( updated Nov 2019 )

title: RiverWalk Beer Gardens
content: RiverWalk Beer Gardens . Throughout the summer and early fall there are numerous outdoor beer gardens lining the riverwalk adjacent to Iron Ox Square. Cold, inexpensive beer and delicious street food and appetizers are available as both large and small groups of friends gather to enjoy the good life.

title: Wu Ba Ba (588) Dumpling House
content: Wu Ba Ba (588) Dumpling House . A wide variety of the best jiaozi, or dumplings, in Mianyang. Simple setting and no-frills service, but you can't beat the dumplings or the prices. Just ask any cab driver or local for "Wu Ba Ba Jiaozi."

title: Bus 3 12 37
content: Bus 3 , 12 and 37 runs to the Yungang Caves (云冈) (end of the line).

title: Bus 28
content: Bus 28 runs from Qingyuan West Street (清远西街) to the south bus station (新南客运站).

title: Bus 66
content: Bus 66 runs from train station (大同站) to the south train station (大同南站).

title: 40.090829 113.293537 4 Chunyang Taoist Temple ( 纯阳宫 ) ( on bus line 35 or 38 )
content: 40.090829 113.293537 4 Chunyang Taoist Temple ( 纯阳宫 ) ( on bus line 35 or 38 ). A small collection of Daoist temples and a peaceful courtyard. A more human scale than the nearby Huáyán Monastery - half an hour at most - unless you are intercepted by a Daoist monk and have a chat or are given an explanation. Completely rebuilt in 2010. ¥30 full price. ¥15 students, etc. .

title: 40.08715 113.36648 9 Datong Museum ( 大同博物馆 )
content: 40.08715 113.36648 9 Datong Museum ( 大同博物馆 ). The museum covers an area of 5600 m², of which 1,800 m² exhibition area, has now become the second largest museum in Shanxi Province, 1.3 million pieces of cultural relics, a product 132. Most of the local archaeological finds. Meet the public more than pieces of precious relics in 1000, half of the initial display of rare collections.

title: 40.090099 113.301195 17 Lingqiu Courtyard ( 灵丘大院 )
content: 40.090099 113.301195 17 Lingqiu Courtyard ( 灵丘大院 ). ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 40.090087 113.300886 18 Hengshan Ruxing·Hunyuan Guild Hall ( 恒山如行·浑源会馆 )
content: 40.090087 113.300886 18 Hengshan Ruxing·Hunyuan Guild Hall ( 恒山如行·浑源会馆 ). ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 40.098792 113.291335 1 Datong Park ( 大同公园 ), Weidu Avenue, Pingcheng District (大同市平城区魏都大道)
content: 40.098792 113.291335 1 Datong Park ( 大同公园 ), Weidu Avenue, Pingcheng District (大同市平城区魏都大道) . A free park that contains amusement rides. ( updated Apr 2015 )

title: 40.078293 113.278366 2 Children's Park ( 儿童公园 ), Yingbin Street/Yunzhong Street Crossing
content: 40.078293 113.278366 2 Children's Park ( 儿童公园 ), Yingbin Street/Yunzhong Street Crossing . A large park with many family attractions. ( updated Apr 2015 )

title: 40.087713 113.29792 3 Datong Red Memory Museum , No
content: 40.087713 113.29792 3 Datong Red Memory Museum , No. 6-9, Xianlou South Street, Pingcheng District , ☏ +86 352 791-6906 . 09:00-18:00, entry will stop 60 minutes prior to the start of the day. . Part of the "Datong Museum". The permanent exhibition is "Red Memories - Exhibition of Historical Relics of Modern Revolution in Datong", which mainly displays relics from the Chinese Communist Party and the Communist Youth League organizations in the Datong area from 1921 to 1949, as well as their student, worker and mass movements. It is of certain value for understanding the history of the Datong area in the first half of the 20th century, although the perspective of the CCP may not be suitable for all foreign tourists. Free . ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 40.089668 113.298046 5 Memorial Hall of the Former Residence of the County Magistrate of D
content: 40.089668 113.298046 5 Memorial Hall of the Former Residence of the County Magistrate of Datong County ( County Magistrate's Compound ). Tu-Su 09:00-11:30, 14:30-19:00 . This immovable cultural relic in Datong City was first designated as No. 11, Xianlou North Street. It is a three-courtyard siheyuan (traditional courtyard house) in the style of northern Shanxi, built in the late Qing Dynasty or the Republican era, covering an area of approximately 1500 m². It is named after two Datong County magistrates who resided here during the Republic of China period. Free . ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 40.09004 113.300774 6 Southeast County ( Guangfujiao Historical and Cultural District )
content: 40.09004 113.300774 6 Southeast County ( Guangfujiao Historical and Cultural District ). Open 24 hours . The "Shanxi Provincial Historical and Cultural Block" mainly includes streets and alleys such as Damiaojiao, Lihuaijiao, Guangfujiao, Houweijiao, Zhengfuxiang, Caijiaxiang, Dongmen Daxiang, and Shirenjie. This block is the best-preserved area of Datong City in terms of its old appearance and historical sites.It has one Shanxi Provincial Cultural Relics Protection Unit ("Lihuaijiao No. 31 Residence"), more than 30 immovable cultural relics, and more than 20 historical buildings. The core area, "Southeast Three Alleys" (namely Guangfujiao, Zhengfuxiang, Caijiaxiang and the surrounding area), is a high-quality independent commercial block in Shanxi Province. It also has two high-end resort hotels and several courtyard-style guesthouses. Free . ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: 40.091671 113.300034 7 Church of Our Lady of the Sacred Heart ( 圣心圣母教堂 ), No
content: 40.091671 113.300034 7 Church of Our Lady of the Sacred Heart ( 圣心圣母教堂 ), No. 4, Dusi Street, Pingcheng District . An immovable cultural relic of Datong City. It was built in 1891, and was burned down by the Boxers and rebuilt in 1906. The bell tower was destroyed during the Cultural Revolution and renovated in 1982, followed by further restoration in 2006 and 2016. It is one of the landmark buildings of the ancient city of Datong. It now serves as the cathedral of the Catholic Diocese of Datong and the residence of the diocese leaders. Free . ( updated Nov 2025 )

title: DaTong Green Island Youth Hostel Railway Station
content: DaTong Green Island Youth Hostel Railway Station , F5, Block A, Jin Hu International Tower, No.1029 Wei Du Avenue (opposite the train station) ( biggest tower across train station. entrance is from behind. ). A young hostel offering most satisfying help by the staff. ¥160 for double room . ( updated May 2015 )

title: Hongqi Dafandian
content: Hongqi Dafandian , Huochezhan BeiLu , ☏ +86 352 2816813 , fax +86 352 2816671 .

title: Yanbei Binguan
content: Yanbei Binguan , 1 Yuhe Beilu , ☏ +86 352 6024116 , fax +86 352 6027287 .

title: 30.767687 111.261183 2 Three Visitors Cave and Park ( 三游洞风景区 )
content: 30.767687 111.261183 2 Three Visitors Cave and Park ( 三游洞风景区 ), 8 Nanjinguan Road, Xiling District (西陵区南津关路8号) ( On a peninsula outside the city. Bus routes 10-1, b10 and Sightseeing Bus 2 ), ☏ +86 717 8862161 , +86 717 8861722 . Nov-Mar 08:30-17:00, Apr-Oct 07:30-18:00 . The cave contains some poetry engraved in stone, not very big though but has a nice little story to it. The surrounding park has a view of the Yangze River as well as some old military defense walls, Sino-Japanese war memorial stones, a river viewing pavilion and some ancient city remains. The walk around the park has lots of steps and is a pretty decent, good relaxing spot. ¥78 .

title: 30.792924 111.150152 3 Tribe of the Three Gorges ( 三峡人家，三峡村 Three Gorges Village )
content: 30.792924 111.150152 3 Tribe of the Three Gorges ( 三峡人家，三峡村 Three Gorges Village ), Shipai Village, Sandou Town, Yiling District (夷陵区三斗坪镇石牌村) ( On the edge of Xiling Gorge, about 40km west of downtown Yichang. Bus 10-1 will take you there in about an hour and a half ), ☏ +86 717 8850588 , sxrj@sanxiarenjia.com . Mar-Oct 08:00-17:30, Nov-Feb 08:30-17:00. The ticket office closes 2 hours before closing time . Has an amazing view of the river. The theme park style site features ancient relics and a natural karst cave like an underground palace. This site is very popular among Chinese, but very few Western travelers know this place. A day tour will cover all interesting sites in this area. It is suggested that you leave in the morning. General admission ¥120, elevator ¥30, boat ride ¥30 .

title: 30.772713 111.669557 4 Yuquan Temple ( 玉泉寺 )
content: 30.772713 111.669557 4 Yuquan Temple ( 玉泉寺 ), County Highway 230, Yuquan Village, Dangyang (当阳市玉泉村230县道) ( About 80km by road from downtown Yichang and about 15km west of Dangyang. Take a long-distance bus to Dangyang (当阳) and ask the driver to drop you off at the Yuquan Temple Intersection (玉泉寺路口). From there, you will need to catch a motorcycle taxi to take you the rest of the way ), ☏ +86 717 3240301 , +86 717 3240302 , +86 717 3240686 . 07:00-17:30 . The temple was founded in the late Eastern Han Dynasty, about l700 years ago. It is one of the oldest Buddhist monasteries in China. Free .

title: 30.828607 111.781694 5 Changbanpo ( 长坂坡 )
content: 30.828607 111.781694 5 Changbanpo ( 长坂坡 ), 86 Changban Road, Dangyang (当阳市长坂路86号) ( Take a long-distance bus to Dangyang, then walk or catch a taxi. Alternatively take the train to Danyang, then catch bus no. 1 and get off near the intersection of Zilong Road and Changban Road ), ☏ +86 717 3240301 . 08:00-18:00 . Site of the Battle of Changba, a famous battle that took place between the warlords Cao Cao and Liu Bei in 208 A.D. ¥15 .

title: 30.635947 111.374497 6 Yichang Museum ( 宜昌博物馆 )
content: 30.635947 111.374497 6 Yichang Museum ( 宜昌博物馆 ), Bailin River Road, Wujiagang District (伍家岗区柏临河路) ( Bus routes b313 and b343 ), ☏ +86 717 6445679-8008 . 09:00-16:30, no entry after 16:00, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Feb 2020 )

title: Orient Royal Cruise ( 东方皇家旅游船; Dōngfānghuángjiā Lǚyóuchuán )
content: Orient Royal Cruise ( 东方皇家旅游船; Dōngfānghuángjiā Lǚyóuchuán ). Operates East King and Yangzi Explorer. Rates at homepage start at $760 for East King (plus $70 for shore excursions) and $1,400 for Yangzi Explorer .

title: Regal China Cruises ( 中国皇家公主号; Zhōngguó Huángjiāgōngzhǔhào ).
content: Regal China Cruises ( 中国皇家公主号; Zhōngguó Huángjiāgōngzhǔhào ).

title: Bungie Jump , Besides the Three Visitors Cave ( Xialaoxi Bridge )
content: Bungie Jump , Besides the Three Visitors Cave ( Xialaoxi Bridge ). You can bungie jump near the Three Visitors Cave, though not recommended as the construction looks really old and badly maintained.

title: 30.69026 111.2994 2 Fang Weng Restaurant ( 放翁酒家 )
content: 30.69026 111.2994 2 Fang Weng Restaurant ( 放翁酒家 ), Three Gorges Culture World, 169 Xiling District , ☏ +86 13581499643 . 10AM-10PM . Built in the three you cave cliff landscape restaurant, see the opposite bungee entertainment live broadcast, do is Yichang food, the white soup fat fish here is very delicious, but the price is relatively expensive, it is said to be the Yangtze River wild fishing fresh fish, the restaurant is very popular, to dinner time, almost full, pre-booking is more appropriate. ¥100 . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 30.70997 0 3 Fu Chu Restaurant ( 福厨餐厅 ), No
content: 30.70997 0 3 Fu Chu Restaurant ( 福厨餐厅 ), No. 42, Yiling Avenue, Xiling District , ☏ +86 6900877 . 10AM-10PM . Fu Chu restaurant provides local authentic Hubei dishes, spicy taste, chopped chili fish head, sour spicy fern root powder, stew chicken soup, etc., are very good, in the local group can buy vouchers, the price is very cost-effective, is a cheap restaurant, worth recommending. 100¥ . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 30.851507 111.008033 4 Shunda food City ( 顺达美食城 )
content: 30.851507 111.008033 4 Shunda food City ( 顺达美食城 ), Liujiahe Taiping Stream , ☏ +86 7177510288 . This is a food collection shop with a wide variety of food. Visitors who come to visit can go to taste. 50CNY . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 30.846902 111.072582 5 Xiao Dongtian Restaurant ( 小洞天酒楼 )
content: 30.846902 111.072582 5 Xiao Dongtian Restaurant ( 小洞天酒楼 ), Yiling District Jiangxia Avenue Jiangxia Avenue 14 community food city 1 floor , ☏ +86 7176765748 . A nice typical Chinese restaurant with a full range and friendly staff that is clean and well maintained. 100CNY . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 30.691744 111.319702 6 The fish ( 那个鱼 )
content: 30.691744 111.319702 6 The fish ( 那个鱼 ), Xiling District 23, 190 meters northeast , ☏ +86 7176912927 . Classic Chinese restaurant with rich Chinese cuisine. The specialty of this shop is fish. It's a good place to try. 100CNY . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 30.714032 111.29258 7 Fareli steak Yichang flagship store ( 法来利牛排宜昌旗舰店 )
content: 30.714032 111.29258 7 Fareli steak Yichang flagship store ( 法来利牛排宜昌旗舰店 ), Xiling District Yiling Avenue Gezhou bar hotel , ☏ +86 7176714499 . It's a western restaurant that specializes in steak. It offers a diverse range of Western dishes that incorporate a variety of tastes and cooking styles, allowing customers to enjoy different culinary experiences. 150CNY . ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: 30.71947 111.29829 2 Peng guihua cold shrimp
content: 30.71947 111.29829 2 Peng guihua cold shrimp , Three Gorges Culture World, 169 Xiling District . 10AM-10PM . Pengguihua features osmanthus sugar as its main flavor, which is also very popular with the people of Yichang and is worth trying. ¥5 . ( updated Sep 2023 )

title: 29.751 116.255 2 Stone Bell Hill , Hukou City , ☏ +86 7926330376
content: 29.751 116.255 2 Stone Bell Hill , Hukou City , ☏ +86 7926330376 . 8:00am-17:30pm . Stone Bell Hill, known as "China's first mountain of ancient strange sounds", is located in Jiujiang City, Jiangxi Province, Hukou County, the old city,the Yangtze River and Poyang Lake intersection.Stone Bell Hill 61.8 meters above sea level, relative height of about 40 meters,an area of 0.2 square kilometers.It is named after the mountains, rocks, water and stone fight each other, striking the sound of a bell ( updated Sep 2024 )

title: 29.188064 115.87612 3 Boyang Lake (PoYangHu)
content: 29.188064 115.87612 3 Boyang Lake (PoYangHu) . Boyang Lake (PoYangHu), Located in Jiujiang, Nanchang and Shangrao,it is the largest freshwater lake in China and the second largest lake in China,after Qinghai Lake.Boyang Lake plays a huge role in regulating the water level of the Yangtze River,conserving water sources,improving the local climate and maintaining the ecological balance of the surrounding areas. ( updated Oct 2024 )

title: 29.663378 115.98891 4 Nanshan Park
content: 29.663378 115.98891 4 Nanshan Park . The total land area of the park is 69.12 hectares,of which 47.71 hectares are built in the west side of the mountain,7.55 hectares are built in the center square of the mountain,cultural and leisure square, civic service center, cultural exhibition center and music fountain. ( updated Oct 2024 )

title: 29.663378 115.98891 2 Nanshan Park ( Dehua Building )
content: 29.663378 115.98891 2 Nanshan Park ( Dehua Building ). Nanshan Park is the best place to visit in winter. So if you come to Jiujiang, you must stop by to see Nanshan Park's Ramei, built according to the mountain, steep stairs will wheeze.The park is not big but full of talent. All the way up to the highest point is Dehua Building, standing downstairs you can see Jiujiang city and beautiful Lushan. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: Osmanthus tea cake is a traditional Han nationality spot in Jiujiang City
content: Osmanthus tea cake is a traditional Han nationality spot in Jiujiang City, Jiangxi Province.Osmanthus tea cake is golden yellow, thin as paper, with "small and fine, thin and crisp, crisp and sweet, fragrant and beautiful" characteristics.

title: 29.066667 116.383333 1 Poyang Lake fish ( 鄱阳湖鱼 )
content: 29.066667 116.383333 1 Poyang Lake fish ( 鄱阳湖鱼 ). Steamed white fish，Braised white fish，Steamed mandarin fish.Freshwater fish served steamed or braised, highlighting natural flavors. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: 29.066667 116.383333 2 Poyang Lake crab ( 鄱阳湖螃蟹 )
content: 29.066667 116.383333 2 Poyang Lake crab ( 鄱阳湖螃蟹 ). Crabs are best enjoyed in autumn (September to November) and are widely served in local restaurants around Jiujiang and the Poyang Lake area during the season. ( updated Dec 2025 )

title: six grain rice dew ( Jiujiang )
content: six grain rice dew ( Jiujiang ). Jiujiang has a kind of wine very famous, called Jiujiang sealed jar wine.Six grain rice dew and it has quite a connection, it is produced by Jiangxi Fengcang Wine Industry Co. Ltd.Inherited intangible cultural heritage technology, drinking six grain rice dew, winter will warm the stomach, summer cool off.It's a very good drink to try. ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: Pedicab
content: Pedicab Leshan has many pedicabs that are cheap and convenient for short journeys.

title: Public bus
content: Public bus Buses are regular and uncrowded in Leshan. Most are fairly modern and charge ¥2 per journey which you normally pay to the conductor. You may have to request your stop.

title: Taxi
content: Taxi During the day the first 2 km are charged at ¥3, and after at the rate of ¥0.70/km. A fuel surcharge of ¥0.50 is added at the end of the journey and is explained by a white sticker in front of the front passenger seat.

title: 29.565682 103.774246 3 Leshan Giant Buddha Museum ( 乐山大佛博物馆
content: 29.565682 103.774246 3 Leshan Giant Buddha Museum ( 乐山大佛博物馆, 乐山博物馆 Leshan Museum ), 2345 Lingyun Road, Shizhong District (市中区凌云路2435号) ( take bus no. 18 to the Shanlong Intersection (山龙路口) or catch bus no. 4, 13, or 602 and get off at the Minjiang No. 1 Bridge East Station (岷江一桥东站); the museum is about 2 km north of the Leshan Giant Buddha Scenic Area ), ☏ +86 833 2302809 . 09:30-18:00 (low season), 09:30-20:00 (high season), 09:00-20:00 (during the Spring Festival and National Day holidays) . Free . ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: Old City Walls ( 古城墙, 嘉州古城墙 Jiazhou Old City Walls )
content: Old City Walls ( 古城墙, 嘉州古城墙 Jiazhou Old City Walls ). Leshan's old city walls were built during the Northern Zhou Dynasty and rebuilt during the Ming and Qing dynasties. The surviving remnants of the wall can be found in and around the city centre. ( updated Apr 2019 ) 29.555004 103.762738 4 Tieniu Gate ( 铁牛门 Tiěniúmén, lit. 'Iron Bull Gate' ), 148 Binhe Road, 滨河路148号 ( on the river bank in front of the Leshan City Government building ). One of eleven city gates that still survive. Tieniu Gate was built during the Song Dynasty and rebuilt in 1394. It used to be known as Lizheng Gate (丽正门). ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: 29.541678 103.773822 5 Oriental Buddha Park ( 东方佛都 )
content: 29.541678 103.773822 5 Oriental Buddha Park ( 东方佛都 ), 362 Lingyun Road, Shizhong District (市中区凌云路362号) ( a short distance south of the Giant Buddha; you will find signs pointing toward the park after you leave the vicinity of the Buddha ), ☏ +86 833 2301801 , scdffd1993@163.com . 08:00-18:00 . A Buddhist theme park. ¥80 . ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: 29.540472 103.769447 6 Wuyou Temple ( 乌尤寺 )
content: 29.540472 103.769447 6 Wuyou Temple ( 乌尤寺 ), Shizhong District (市中区) ( on a small island southwest of the Leshan Giant Buddha and the Oriental Buddha Park; the island is accessible on foot via a walk bridge ), ☏ +86 833 2302048 . 1 Apr-7 Oct: 07:30-18:30; 8 Oct-31 Mar: 08:00-17:30 . Free . ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: 29.351126 103.5352 9 Meinü Peak National Forest Park ( 美女峰国家森林公园
content: 29.351126 103.5352 9 Meinü Peak National Forest Park ( 美女峰国家森林公园, Beauty Peak National Forest Park ), Shawan District (沙湾区) ( take a bus to Shawan from either the Central Bus Station or Lianyun Bus Station, then transfer to bus no. 1 and get off at the final stop ), ☏ +86 833 3566299 . 08:30-18:00 . Meinü Peak (or Beauty Peak) is a 2027-metre high peak that derives its name from its shape, which is said to resemble a woman lying on her back. The famous writer Guo Morou, who wrote poems about the peak, referred to it as 'the sleeping beauty'. Other notable features of the park include Shawan Stone Forest (沙湾石林), a geological formation somewhat similar to the stone forest at Shilin and Lancanggou (澜仓沟), a valley filled with Alsophila spinulosa trees. ¥5 . ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: 29.206954 103.950415 11 Qianwei County Confucian Temple ( 犍为县文庙
content: 29.206954 103.950415 11 Qianwei County Confucian Temple ( 犍为县文庙, 犍为县文庙博物馆 Qianwei County Confucian Temple Museum ), 297 South Street, Yujin Town, Qianwei County (犍为县玉津镇南街297号) ( take a bus to Qianwei County from Leshan's Central Bus Station; it should take less than an hour to get there; the temple is just a few hundred metres east of the Qianwei County Central Bus Station ), ☏ +86 833 4266183 . 09:00-18:00 . This temple, which is on China's national heritage list, was founded during the Northern Song Dynasty and rebuilt during the Ming Dynasty. It is the fourth largest Confucian temple in China and the largest one in Sichuan Province. ¥30 . ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: 29.561874 103.758958 2 Laoxiaoding ( 老霄顶 )
content: 29.561874 103.758958 2 Laoxiaoding ( 老霄顶 ), Shizhong District (市中区) ( about 200 metres southwest of the intersection of Dingdong Street (叮咚街) and Haitang Road (海棠路); from Moruo Square take the road heading north to its end and then along the winding uphill path. The park gate will be to your right; the nearest bus stop is the Gas Company (煤气公司) bus stop, which is served by bus routes 6, 8, 10 and 13 ). 09:00-17:00 . The tallest hill within Leshan's old city limits. Now it is a pleasant park with pavilions and tea houses. Free . ( updated Apr 2019 )

title: You Zha Chuan Chuan
content: You Zha Chuan Chuan ( 油炸串串 ) - Similar to shao kao, but fried in oil

title: Shumai
content: Shumai (烧麦) Shumai (烧麦)- a snack with rice and meat wrapped in a thin layer of skin

title: atmospheric old photographs
content: 杨家老宅茶馆 ( yángjiā lǎozhái cháguǎn ) - 52 gǔlóu jiē (鼓楼街52号). +86 833-2115000. Open Monday to Sunday. An atmospheric teahouse set within a cluster of old buildings and decorated with old photographs of Leshan and the Grand Buddha.

title: 25.542331 119.036115 3 Southern Shaolin Monastery ( 莆田南少林寺 )
content: 25.542331 119.036115 3 Southern Shaolin Monastery ( 莆田南少林寺 ), Linshan Village, Xitianwei Town, Licheng District (荔城区西天尾镇林山村) ( take bus no. 201 from Putian Railway Station, get off at Xitianwei Circle (西天尾圆圈), then catch the special shuttle bus that goes to the temple ), ☏ +86 594 2899371 . 08:30-17:30 . A reconstructed Buddhist temple built on the remains of an old Tang Dynasty temple, claimed to be connected to the Shaolin Monastery in Henan Province which is one of China's most famous centers of martial arts . There is another Southern Shaolin temple in nearby Quanzhou . Free . ( updated Dec 2017 )

title: 25.4 119 2 Yanyi Authentic Minnan Cuisine (1971 Creative Park Branch) ( 院意地道闽南菜（1971文创园店）
content: 25.4 119 2 Yanyi Authentic Minnan Cuisine (1971 Creative Park Branch) ( 院意地道闽南菜（1971文创园店） ), 福建省莆田市荔城区东圳东路639弄 , ☏ +86 17759807777 . It offers traditional Minnan dishes, including Ginger Duck, Black Bean Tofu, Crispy Taro Mash, and Seaweed Rice, all popular with diners. Located in the 1971 Creative Park, the restaurant blends authentic flavors with a unique setting inspired by Putian's traditional architecture. ¥80 . ( updated Nov 2024 )

title: 25.41 119 2 Hanting Hotel ( 汉庭酒店 )
content: 25.41 119 2 Hanting Hotel ( 汉庭酒店 ). As a well-known budget hotel chain, Hanting provides economical accommodation with all essential amenities. ( updated Nov 2024 )

title: 25.4 119 5 Home-like Hotel ( 如家酒店 )
content: 25.4 119 5 Home-like Hotel ( 如家酒店 ). Affiliated with a popular hotel chain, it offers clean and minimalist rooms with basic amenities. 150-300¥ . ( updated Oct 2024 )

title: Meizhou Island Guesthouses
content: Meizhou Island Guesthouses Meizhou Island, the birthplace of Mazu, features many guesthouses with sea views and a chance to immerse in local culture. Staying on the island allows convenient access to the Mazu Temple and a peaceful island lifestyle.

title: Nanjiri Island Fishing Homestays
content: Nanjiri Island Fishing Homestays Nanjiri Island is known for its seafood. Visitors can stay with local fishermen, enjoy fresh seafood feasts, and participate in fishing activities, providing a unique island culture experience.

title: 32.217146 119.408959 2 Jinshan Park ( 金山公园 )
content: 32.217146 119.408959 2 Jinshan Park ( 金山公园 ). It's on the northwest side of Zhenjiang and includes a Buddhist monastery and another large pagoda. The Buddhist temple complex and a large lake (complete with paddle boats available for rent) form the majority of the park. ( updated Jan 2009 )

title: 32.218653 119.45195 3 Beigushan Park ( 北固山公园 ) ( on the north side of Zhenjiang )
content: 32.218653 119.45195 3 Beigushan Park ( 北固山公园 ) ( on the north side of Zhenjiang ). It has paths lit with lanterns after sundown. The park is surrounded by great landscaping and the Yangtze River. ( updated Jan 2009 )

title: 31.902861 119.229927 1 Maoshan Mountain ( 句容茅山景区 )
content: 31.902861 119.229927 1 Maoshan Mountain ( 句容茅山景区 ), 26 km southeast of Jurong City, Zhenjiang ( departing from Jurong Bus Terminal can reach ), ☏ +86 15052992370 , toll-free +87 5001089996 . 07:30-17:00 . At an altitude of 372 meters, it takes approximately one hour to climb. It is not only a Taoist holy site but also one of the bases during the Anti-Japanese War. 85 . ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: 32.215662 119.426286 7 Zhenjiang Museum ( 镇江博物馆 ), 85 Boxian Road (伯先路85号) ( Take bus no
content: 32.215662 119.426286 7 Zhenjiang Museum ( 镇江博物馆 ), 85 Boxian Road (伯先路85号) ( Take bus no. 2, 12, or 102 ), ☏ +86 511 85285032 , zjmuseum@163.com . Tu-Su 09:00-17:00, closed on Mondays . Free . ( updated Jan 2018 )

title: 32.102711 119.479942 8 China Vinegar Culture Museum ( 中国镇江醋文化博物馆 ), No
content: 32.102711 119.479942 8 China Vinegar Culture Museum ( 中国镇江醋文化博物馆 ), No. 60, Guangyuan Road, New City, Dandu District ( accessible by taking Bus No. 633，70,131 ), toll-free +86 511 85307790 . 9ː00am-16ː00pm . A museum dedicated to the history of Chinese vinegar culture, spanning an area of 4,000 square meters, offers free indoor WiFi. 30 . ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: Lotus peak and Celestial Capital peak are each typically open for five years at a time whi
content: Lotus peak and Celestial Capital peak are each typically open for five years at a time while the other closes. In 2019, Celestial Capital Peak reopened.

title: Less-popular and more-dangerous trails
content: Less-popular and more-dangerous trails, including Celestial Capital Peak and the trails up from the north and northwest, are normally closed in winter.

title: Zhuhai ( Buses do not run at night though
content: Zhuhai ( Buses do not run at night though, so if you want to go after 5PM, get a cab for ¥100-200. ). Do not miss this nearby gorgeous valley covered with a bamboo forest. Some very nice restaurants and rustic inns you can stay in (preferable to Tunxi). ¥30 .

title: 30.1253 118.1701 3 Yupinglou Hotel ( 玉屏楼宾馆 )
content: 30.1253 118.1701 3 Yupinglou Hotel ( 玉屏楼宾馆 ). Near the top of the Yuping cableway and the western steps. No view of sunrise. Doubles ¥600-2500 . ( updated Dec 2018 )

title: Huangshan International Youth Hostel , Tangkou
content: Huangshan International Youth Hostel , Tangkou . Their food is not very good, but the rooms are cheap and clean with warm water and western toilets. They arrange various tours which are generally good. From ¥100 to ¥300 for a private room in peak season .

title: Huangshan Old Street International Youth Hostel , 266 Laojie
content: Huangshan Old Street International Youth Hostel , 266 Laojie . Based in Tunxi. Decent looking hostel. Great at helping organise transport to Huangshan area and accommodation on the mountain

title: 27.6822 117.9659 2 Water Curtain Cave ( 水帘洞 )
content: 27.6822 117.9659 2 Water Curtain Cave ( 水帘洞 ). A waterfall (not really any cave) with a small old shrine behind it and a massive rock. Reachable from its bus stop by walking 20-30 min on a road to the base and then 5-10 min up to the waterfall. You can walk a small loop and end up back at the main path to continue to the tea valleys (towards Da Hong Pao and Tianxin Yongle Temple) or just return to the bus station. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: 27.6766 117.9561 3 Eagle Beak Rock
content: 27.6766 117.9561 3 Eagle Beak Rock . Halfway between Water Curtain Cave and Da Hong Pao Valley. A nicely-shaped rock but you can only walk past it within the valleys and no climbing is possible. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: 27.6784 117.9607 4 Ancient Cliff Dwellings ( 武夷古崖居遗构 )
content: 27.6784 117.9607 4 Ancient Cliff Dwellings ( 武夷古崖居遗构 ). Ancient wooden buildings built into an inaccessible crack in the cliff, once accessed via a pulley system. Can be seen from the trail but not visited. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: 27.6379 117.945 8 Tiger Roaring Rock ( 虎啸岩 )
content: 27.6379 117.945 8 Tiger Roaring Rock ( 虎啸岩 ). Great view over the surrounding rocky area, but the peak is closed off. There are still really nice places to see and the path continues to the Ray of Sky cave to the south or to Jade Beauty Peak to the north. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: 27.6286 117.9419 10 Spiral Cave ( 螺丝洞 )
content: 27.6286 117.9419 10 Spiral Cave ( 螺丝洞 ). Not famous but 200 m from Ray of Sky. A rock is carved from the bottom which is an amazing structure. Go there for a photo if you are already nearby anyway. As of Nov 2019, it is not accessible due to track maintenance. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: 27.6431 117.9553 11 Jade Beauty Peak ( 玉女峰 )
content: 27.6431 117.9553 11 Jade Beauty Peak ( 玉女峰 ). You see this from the rafting and from a rocky beach at the side of the river. It's a lovely rock, but there is not so much else to see. You can walk there from Tiger Roaring Rock or Ray of Sky. ( updated Oct 2018 )

title: Eagle's Beak Rock (on the way from Water Curtain Cave to Dahongpao Valley)
content: Eagle's Beak Rock (on the way from Water Curtain Cave to Dahongpao Valley)

title: Action Sports
content: Action Sports . Talk to a travel agent such as the one at the bridge between resort and park to do all sorts of paragliding and similar action sports. Touts will offer you this randomly too which is not so recommended.

title: Tea eggs
content: Tea eggs. These are eggs hardboiled in tea with a little hole to let the taste fill the egg white. Nice cheap snack found anywhere in China but particularly good at Wuyi Mountain if good tea is used. The ones at Dahongpao valley rest stop, for example, are usually really good, but at the rafting area you might just find lousy ones. ¥3 for one or perhaps ¥10 for three. Careful as they might be hot. Good to have with a cup of tea on the side.

title: Beer and wine
content: Beer and wine . There is local beer and wine but it is nothing special.

title: Wuyi Mountain Water
content: Wuyi Mountain Water . Bottled water from the mountain (you could fill your bottles in the little rivers inside the park area for probably the same water). Do not drink the water from the larger rivers. ¥1 for 500 ml .

title: Dragon Resort
content: Dragon Resort . The staff is very friendly and the quality of the hotel is good. A great breakfast is included. ¥238 for a double room .

title: 29.28644 117.17879 2 Ancient Kiln Folk Customs Museum ( 古窑民俗博览区 )
content: 29.28644 117.17879 2 Ancient Kiln Folk Customs Museum ( 古窑民俗博览区 ), 1 Guyao Road, Cidou Avenue, Changjiang District (昌江区瓷都大道古窑路1号) ( The nearest bus stop is Fengshushan (枫树山), which is served by over a dozen bus routes, including routes 1, 2, 3, 6. 7, 10, 11, 13, 16, 17, 23, 30, 33, 123, k106 and several others ), ☏ +86 798-8534444 , 133831728@qq.com . 08:00-17:30 . ¥95 for regular ticket, ¥50 for persons aged 60 to 65 and children over 2 years old who have a student card, free for persons over 65 and children under 1.2 metres in height . ( updated May 2018 )

title: 29.29712 117.20182 3 Jingdezhen Imperial Kiln National Archaeological Remains Park ( 景德镇御窑
content: 29.29712 117.20182 3 Jingdezhen Imperial Kiln National Archaeological Remains Park ( 景德镇御窑厂国家考古遗址公园 ), 187 Zhushan Middle Road, Zhushan District (珠山区珠山中路187号) ( Catch bus no. 27 or K26 and get off at the Imperial Kiln Galleries (御窑长廊) ), ☏ +86 798-8201378 . 8:00-17:30 . ¥60 . ( updated May 2018 )

title: 29.2977 117.2301 4 Taoxichuan Ceramic Art Avenue
content: 29.2977 117.2301 4 Taoxichuan Ceramic Art Avenue . A hub for ceramics. The old industrial area of red brick buildings and tall coal chimneys was converted into an art district of studios, galleries, and coffee shops. It serves as a gathering point every week for artists and students to sell their ceramics. A nice place for an evening stroll. ( updated Aug 2019 )

title: 29.256506 117.262598 5 Sanbao Village ( 三宝村 )
content: 29.256506 117.262598 5 Sanbao Village ( 三宝村 ). There are many artists' studios, private museums and homestays in Sambo Village. Most houses can see ceramic elements. ( updated Dec 2023 )

title: Explore the three treasures ( 寻味三宝 )
content: Explore the three treasures ( 寻味三宝 ), 260 Sanbao Road, Jingdezhen Jingcheng Town 景德镇竟成镇三宝路260号 , ☏ +86 798-8339919 . 11:00-14:00；17:00-20:30 . CNY103 . ( updated Mar 2024 )

title: 29.299115 117.254792 2 Jingdezhen International Youth Hostel ( 景德镇国际青年旅舍 )
content: 29.299115 117.254792 2 Jingdezhen International Youth Hostel ( 景德镇国际青年旅舍 ), No.139, Xinchangdong Road . Hostel across from the Saturday Creative Market site.The streets behind the hostel has lots of shops selling contemporary style porcelain. ( updated Aug 2019 )

title: Siping City Jiping Hotel ( 四平市吉平宾馆; Sìpíngshìjípíngbīnguǎn )
content: Siping City Jiping Hotel ( 四平市吉平宾馆; Sìpíngshìjípíngbīnguǎn ), 104 Xinhua Avenue (新华大街104号; Xīnhuádàjiē ( On the east of the city government site and next to Nanhu Park ), ☏ +86 434 2222303 . The only four star hotel in town. Sauna, hair salon, business center, supermarket, book shop, international travel agency, bar and coffee shop available

title: 34.8167 114.3648 4 Iron Pagoda ( 铁塔 )
content: 34.8167 114.3648 4 Iron Pagoda ( 铁塔 ), Next to North Gate on Jiefeng Rd , ☏ +86 371-22826629 . 08：30-21：00 . Built in 1049 the 13-storey octagonal pagoda is said to be the most famous pagoda in China . It got its name in the Yuan Dynasty due the brown glazed tile covering its exterior giving the appearance of iron. It is still in good condition and can be climbed using the internal stairs for ¥30 (not for the claustrophobic, no viewing platform, just a dead end at the top, but several windows along the way and interesting bricks to look at). There is a Buddhist temple located near the pagoda and a small lake. ¥60, ¥30 concession .

title: 34.7707 114.3586 5 Po Pagoda ( 繁塔, pó tǎ ), 30 Po Ta West Road, 禹王台区繁塔西街30号
content: 34.7707 114.3586 5 Po Pagoda ( 繁塔, pó tǎ ), 30 Po Ta West Road, 禹王台区繁塔西街30号 . Standing nine storeys tall until the Ming dynasty, this stocky three-storey hexagonal pagoda dates to 974, and is covered in large tiles featuring Buddhist figures. Tourists seldom visit. It can be climbed if the internal stairway's gate is unlocked that day. ¥30, ¥15 concession . ( updated Apr 2018 )

title: 34.7939 114.333 6 Baogong Memorial Temple ( 包公祠 )
content: 34.7939 114.333 6 Baogong Memorial Temple ( 包公祠 ), No.1 Xiangyang Road, Gulou District ( on the shore of Baogong Lake, buses 1 and 20 ). 08:00-17:30 . Temple built to honor Lord Bao. ¥20 . ( updated Jun 2024 )

title: 34.7931 114.3403 7 Yanqing Taoist Temple ( 延庆观 )
content: 34.7931 114.3403 7 Yanqing Taoist Temple ( 延庆观 ), No.53 Guanqian Street, Gulou District ( Northwest of Kaifeng Mansion ). A small temple containing a two-story pagoda with a beautiful blue glazed tile balcony and painted carvings on the front gate. ¥15 . ( updated Jun 2024 )

title: The city wall
content: The city wall . Surrounding the city is the old city walls punctuated at various points with gates. Of most interest are the North gate and Little South gate on either end of Jiefeng Road that resemble the arched gates in Xi'an. The other gates are merely gaps in the wall.

title: Kaifengfujian Street ( Kaifeng Tourist Theme Park )
content: Kaifengfujian Street ( Kaifeng Tourist Theme Park ). Set on the edge of Baogong Lake this new construction is supposed to be a recreation of old Kaifeng and is of little interest unless you are into hourly parades of people dressed up like Song dynasty officials. ¥50 .

title: Yellow River Yellow River ( besides taxis
content: Yellow River Yellow River ( besides taxis, there is a city bus which leaves from near the Northern entrance to Iron Pagoda park (Bus 6) ).

title: China Kaifeng Chrysanthemum Cultural Festival
content: China Kaifeng Chrysanthemum Cultural Festival . 28 October-28 November . The chrysanthemum is the city flower of Kaifeng, and 1,200 varieties are planted there. ( updated Nov 2023 )

title: Diyilou Restaurant
content: Diyilou Restaurant . A famous place to get the Kaifeng specialty, baozi, in best quality. These baozi contain soup, so be careful when eating them.

title: Youyixin Restaurant , 23 Drum Tower St , ☏ +86 378 2552888
content: Youyixin Restaurant , 23 Drum Tower St , ☏ +86 378 2552888 . Serves traditional local food.

title: Zuitaibei , Drum Tower Square , ☏ +86 378 5251619 . Soft music and dance. Warning
content: Zuitaibei , Drum Tower Square , ☏ +86 378 5251619 . Soft music and dance. Warning: controlled by Hongmen.

title: Jin Xue Hotel
content: Jin Xue Hotel . A few doors south of the PSB on ZhongShan Lu. This old hotel is no-frills, no English speaking staff. Standard ¥150-180 .

title: Haiyou Hotel (Kaifeng Xiao Songcheng Branch) ( 海友酒店（开封小宋城店） )
content: Haiyou Hotel (Kaifeng Xiao Songcheng Branch) ( 海友酒店（开封小宋城店） ), Intersection of Yishan Street and Jin'an Road, Longting District , ☏ +86 371 25286688 . ¥300-600 . ( updated May 2024 )

title: 41.099444 123.011944 1 Jade Buddha Temple ( 鞍山玉佛苑 ) ( Enter either by the gate on Qianshan
content: 41.099444 123.011944 1 Jade Buddha Temple ( 鞍山玉佛苑 ) ( Enter either by the gate on Qianshan Lu Road, near Dongshan, or through 219 park from Yuanlin Lu Road ). Claiming to be the world's largest jade statue of the Buddha and carved form the world's largest single piece of jade stone, at almost 8 meters high and weighing in at 260.76 tons, this is an impressive sight. The statue is housed within a large temple complex in the Dongshan section of 219 park. ¥60 .

title: 219 Park , Yuanlin Lu, Anshan
content: 219 Park , Yuanlin Lu, Anshan. ( From the train station, follow Eryijiu Lu (219 Road) due east. ). The largest park in the region. Named after the date of liberation of Anshan by the PLA on the nineteenth of February 1948. The park contains woodland areas around a series of lakes. The area is very popular with the local people who can frequently be seen exercising, dancing, singing, playing music and practicing taichi in the grounds — especially in the early morning of mid evening. free .

title: Lieshishan Park , Shengli Lu, Anshan
content: Lieshishan Park , Shengli Lu, Anshan. ( From the train station, follow Eryijiu Lu (219 Road) due east to Shengli Square. Turn righ (south) and the park is at the end of the road. ). A small park in the centre of the city. Most of the city is visible from the top of the hill. If the steps look too daunting, there is a gentle path to the east side of the entrance that will spiral up to the top. free .

title: Yongle Park , Mingsheng Road, Anshan
content: Yongle Park , Mingsheng Road, Anshan. ( In Tiexi district. ). A small park in the west end of the city. free .

title: Mengtai Park , Jianguo Street, Lishan, Anshan
content: Mengtai Park , Jianguo Street, Lishan, Anshan. ( From train station, go east along 219 Road, turn left onto Zhonghua Street and follow this road till its conclusion. ). A large and popular park in Lishan district to the north of the city. The park includes an attractive lake behind which run a crescent shaped ridge of hills. free .

title: Aviary ( Inside Qianshan park, near to the Matria Buddha cable car )
content: Aviary ( Inside Qianshan park, near to the Matria Buddha cable car ). A large netted complex within which a huge variety of birds may be observed.

title: Anshan Country Club ( Take Anhai Road south out of the Anshan city just after Tangangzi
content: Anshan Country Club ( Take Anhai Road south out of the Anshan city just after Tangangzi, take a left where signposted. The road will turn to the right and cross the railway line. ). A Country Club and 18 hole golf course on the south side of the city near Tangangzi. Golf cubs are available to hire and prices are per round.

title: Anshan Qianshan Ski Centre ( Near Qianshan National Park
content: Anshan Qianshan Ski Centre ( Near Qianshan National Park. Take bus No.8. ). This small ski centre is open throughout most of the winter. There are several slopes for beginners through to intermediate levels. Advanced skiers may find the slopes a little short though. The centre also has snow mobiles, quad bikes and rubber ring slides for the kids. After skiing, you can relax in the mixed-sex outdoor hot spring spa included in the price so remember your swimwear.

title: Skating ( In 219 park or Lieshishan park
content: Skating ( In 219 park or Lieshishan park. ). During winter you can skate on the lakes in the parks. The ice is maintained by the park attendant. If you bring your own shoes it is free or you can hire skates for a modest fee. free .

title: Chengdong the Quartet Tai'an Hot Springs ( 鞍山市海城东四方台温泉度假区 )
content: Chengdong the Quartet Tai'an Hot Springs ( 鞍山市海城东四方台温泉度假区 ). Resort

title: Fu Shi Ting ( Several branches in the city
content: Fu Shi Ting ( Several branches in the city, Shengli Road near No.2 middle school, Next to Gaungdu School, west of Leishishan park, and Yuanlin Road just south of No.9 Middle School ). Japanese fast food restaurant with set meals at low prices. ¥15-30 .

title: Savour Life Coffee Shop , Shengli South Street ( Near to No.2 Middle School
content: Savour Life Coffee Shop , Shengli South Street ( Near to No.2 Middle School. ). A small coffee shop but the best in the city. Popular with the young professionals and foreigners. Espresso ¥15, Caramel Macchiato ¥22 .

title: San Bao BBQ , Yuanlin Road ( Just south of No.9 Middles School )
content: San Bao BBQ , Yuanlin Road ( Just south of No.9 Middles School ). Anshan is close to the border with Korea, so a large Korea population lives here. The town has dozens of Korean BBQ restaurants. Food is served raw, marinated in a variety of spicy sauces. In the center of the table is a pit containing hot coals. It is over these coals that you cook your food. A selection of spices and sauces are provided for you to dip the cooked meat into. ¥40-60 per person .

title: Pizza house , Tiedong Wodao Jie ( Behind No.2 middle school (Er Zhong Xue)
content: Pizza house , Tiedong Wodao Jie ( Behind No.2 middle school (Er Zhong Xue). ). Serves a variety of pizzas as well as steaks. Will deliver locally.

title: Jullette Cafe ( Qi Yue Kafe ), Zhonghua Street
content: Jullette Cafe ( Qi Yue Kafe ), Zhonghua Street. ( Between Qingnian and Wenhua Street on Zhonghua Street in the centre of the city. ). 10am to 10pm . Western food in a relaxing atmosphere. The buildings were originally houses built by the Japanese in the 1930s and now converted into a restaurant. The front building is no smoking and the rear building allows smoking. The chef used to work in Taiwan and is proficient at cooking western food. The fillet steak is particularly popular. ¥50-100 per person .

title: San Bao Wan Chai , Two branches
content: San Bao Wan Chai , Two branches: Yuanlin Lu and 219 Road ( Opposite No.9 Middle School and near the TV station. ). Rice porridge, dim sum and dumplings Hong Kong style.

title: Sun Club ( Off of Dongshan Street, near Silong shopping centre
content: Sun Club ( Off of Dongshan Street, near Silong shopping centre. ). This is one of the more popular music bars. They have a live band playing every night from 9pm.

title: 40.01 119.76 2 Shanhaiguan Pass，First Pass under Heaven ( 山海关，天下第一关 ) ( East of the Drum T
content: 40.01 119.76 2 Shanhaiguan Pass，First Pass under Heaven ( 山海关，天下第一关 ) ( East of the Drum Tower in the center of the old town ), ☏ +86 335-5258000 . 08:00-17:00 . The area between the sea and the mountains at Qinhuangdao is called the "First Pass under Heaven", being the place where the Ming dynasty Great Wall began. Guarding the pass is the city of Qinhuangdao, with its (restored) east gate marking the main road through the pass. You can see the tower guarding the gate and, depending on choice of ticket, various exhibitions or take a walk along the city walls. ¥50 .

title: Shanhaiguan Fortifications
content: Shanhaiguan Fortifications . The walls of the old city of Qinhuangdao can essentially be considered part of the Great Wall: the whole city was built as a wall fortification to guard the pass between the mountains and the sea. The walls of Qinhuangdao are square, with a perimeter of around 4 km in length. The walls reach the height of 14 m, and are 7 meters thick. The east, south and north sides of the fortification are surrounded by a moat 3 m deep and 5 m wide. There are drawbridges to get over the moat. You can only go up on the wall by buying a ticket for the First Pass under Heaven (see above). The other sides of the city have gates as well, but these have been rebuilt: the original buildings long gone.

title: Laodao Ocean Park ( Laodao Ocean park )
content: Laodao Ocean Park ( Laodao Ocean park ). Laodao Ocean Park, with the theme of Ocean Park, is 8 km from Qinhuangdao Airport and 2 km to Old Dragon's Head Great Wall. The park offers rich and colorful entertainment items, which all bring happiness in your tour. The park breeds numerous sea animals and the sea lion, dolphin, and beluga will play brilliant performance. At the bottom of the sea, you can get zero-distance contract with wild animal of ocean, and explore the arcanum of nature as much as you like. Meanwhile, if you are interested in the natural culture, you will have a chance to view the performance full of exoticism. The polar region exhibition hall takes you to the romantic world of ice and snow, and hope you will have a good time with the cute polar bear and penguin. At night, the ebullient bonfire party will give you an enthusiastic evening.

title: 39.87 119.52 5 Qinhuangdao Wildlife Park ( 秦皇岛野生动物园 ), ☏ +86 335-4182201
content: 39.87 119.52 5 Qinhuangdao Wildlife Park ( 秦皇岛野生动物园 ), ☏ +86 335-4182201 . Located near Beidaihe Scenic Area, covering an area of ​​about 5,000 acres, it is a large-scale wild free-range zoo. There are more than 150 kinds of animals in the park, including tigers, lions, giraffes and pandas. Visitors can take a sightseeing car to enter the stocking area, or walk to visit the bird area and herbivore area. It is a popular place for families and nature lovers. ¥90 . ( updated Oct 2025 )

title: Thirteen Invitations Bistro ( 十三邀小酒馆 Shísān Yāo Xiǎojiǔguǎn ), No
content: Thirteen Invitations Bistro ( 十三邀小酒馆 Shísān Yāo Xiǎojiǔguǎn ), No. 13-105, 9th District, Tinghai Holiday Living Area, Binhai New Avenue, Tuanlin Township, Changli County ( 团林乡滨海新大道听海假日生活区九区13-105号) , ☏ +86 335-5829013 . 18:30-01:00 . ¥133 . ( updated Oct 2023 )

title: naive ( 理想国(阿那亚店) )
content: naive ( 理想国(阿那亚店) ), 101, Building 14, Phase 6, Anaya Cultural and Creative District, Binhai New Avenue (滨海新大道阿那亚文创街区6期14栋101) , ☏ +86 15690066891 . 09:30-01:00 . ¥62 . ( updated Oct 2023 )
